        "originalContents": "\u003e 本文对比用到的两个机器学习方法：聚类、 降维\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 主要调用技术栈：scikit-learn\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 注意：\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 1. umap不在sklearn库中，需要单独安装umap-learn\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 2. 目前并没有在前端实现选择接口，需要后端修改参数\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e    - 修改dimReduction: backend\\tools\\dim_reduction.py:line10\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e    - 修改clustering: backend\\tools\\cluster_analysis: line51\r\n\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n# 聚类Clustering\r\n\r\n提供的方法包括：K-Means、GMM\r\n\r\nDBSCAN因为参数问题和无聚类中心问题暂不支持\r\n\r\n使用的数据集为：Class1+2+3 \u0026 All major\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Kmeans.png\" alt=\"Kmeans\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Kmeans.png\" alt=\"Kmeans\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n# 降维DimReduction\r\n\r\n提供的方法包括：PCA、UMAP、t-SNE、LocallyLinearEmbedding、MDS、Isomap\r\n\r\n使用的数据集为：Class1 \u0026 All major\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n以下为PCA \u0026 UMAP\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/PCA.png\" alt=\"PCA\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/UMAP.png\" alt=\"UMAP\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n以下为t-SNE \u0026 lle\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/t-SNE.png\" alt=\"t-SNE\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/lle.png\" alt=\"lle\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n以下为MDS \u0026 Isomap\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/MDS.png\" alt=\"MDS\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Isomap.png\" alt=\"Isomap\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 52
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "notes/MachineLearning.md"
      },
      "score": 0.5334481596946716
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 自主实现PCA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import numpy as np\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class MyPCA:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, n_components):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.n_components = n_components\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.components = None  # 主成分（特征向量）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.mean = None        # 数据的均值（用于标准化）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    def fit(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        # 1. 数据标准化（中心化）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        self.mean = np.mean(X, axis=0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        X_centered = X - self.mean\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        # 2. 计算协方差矩阵\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        # rowvar=False表示每列是一个特征\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        cov_matrix = np.cov(X_centered, rowvar=False)  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 3. 特征值分解\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        eigenvalues, eigenvectors = np.linalg.eigh(cov_matrix)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        # 4. 按特征值降序排序，选择前n_components个主成分\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        # np.argsort(eigenvalues) 返回从小到大排序的索引；\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        # [::-1] 反转顺序得到从大到小的索引；\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        sorted_indices = np.argsort(eigenvalues)[::-1]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        self.components = eigenvectors[:, sorted_indices[:self.n_components]]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    def transform(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        # 将数据投影到主成分空间\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        X_centered = X - self.mean\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        return np.dot(X_centered, self.components)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    def fit_transform(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        self.fit(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        return self.transform(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  from sklearn.decomposition import PCA as PCA"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 自主实现PCA\r\nimport numpy as np\r\n\r\nclass MyPCA:\r\n    def __init__(self, n_components):\r\n        self.n_components = n_components\r\n        self.components = None  # 主成分（特征向量）\r\n        self.mean = None        # 数据的均值（用于标准化）\r\n    \r\n    def fit(self, X):\r\n        # 1. 数据标准化（中心化）\r\n        self.mean = np.mean(X, axis=0)\r\n        X_centered = X - self.mean\r\n        \r\n        # 2. 计算协方差矩阵\r\n        # rowvar=False表示每列是一个特征\r\n        cov_matrix = np.cov(X_centered, rowvar=False)  \r\n        \r\n        # 3. 特征值分解\r\n        eigenvalues, eigenvectors = np.linalg.eigh(cov_matrix)\r\n        \r\n        # 4. 按特征值降序排序，选择前n_components个主成分\r\n\r\n        # np.argsort(eigenvalues) 返回从小到大排序的索引；\r\n        # [::-1] 反转顺序得到从大到小的索引；\r\n        sorted_indices = np.argsort(eigenvalues)[::-1]\r\n        \r\n        self.components = eigenvectors[:, sorted_indices[:self.n_components]]\r\n    \r\n    def transform(self, X):\r\n        # 将数据投影到主成分空间\r\n        X_centered = X - self.mean\r\n        return np.dot(X_centered, self.components)\r\n    \r\n    def fit_transform(self, X):\r\n        self.fit(X)\r\n        return self.transform(X)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 46,
            "line": 39
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/MyPCA.py"
      },
      "score": 0.5322743654251099
    },

        ],
        "originalContents": "import numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Union\r\n\r\nclass ClusterAnalysis:\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        students_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]],\r\n        method: str = \"kmeans\",\r\n        n_clusters: int = 3,\r\n        **kwargs\r\n    ):\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        初始化聚类分析\r\n        \r\n        参数:\r\n            students_data: 学生数据，格式为 {学生ID: {科目: 分数}}\r\n            method: 聚类方法，支持 \"kmeans\", \"dbscan\", \"agg\", \"gmm\"\r\n            n_clusters: 聚类数量（仅适用于 K-Means、Agglomerative、GMM）\r\n            **kwargs: 传递给聚类算法的额外参数\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        self.raw_data = students_data\r\n        self.method = method.lower()\r\n        self.n_clusters = n_clusters\r\n        self.kwargs = kwargs\r\n        \r\n        # 提取特征向量\r\n        self.features_array = self.extract_features(self.raw_data)\r\n        \r\n        # 初始化聚类模型\r\n        self.cluster_model = self.create_cluster_model(\r\n            method=self.method,\r\n            n_clusters=self.n_clusters,\r\n            **self.kwargs\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # 训练模型\r\n        self.cluster_model.fit(self.features_array)\r\n\r\n    def extract_features(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]]) -\u003e np.ndarray:\r\n        \"\"\"提取特征向量\"\"\"\r\n        features = []\r\n        for student_id, values in raw_data.items():\r\n            if isinstance(values, dict):\r\n                feature_vector = list(values.values())\r\n                features.append(feature_vector)\r\n            else:\r\n                raise ValueError(f\"Invalid data format for student {student_id}: {values}\")\r\n        return np.array(features)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 144
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 自主实现K-means聚类\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import numpy as np\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class MyKMeans:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, n_clusters=3, max_iter=300, random_state=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.n_clusters = n_clusters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.max_iter = max_iter\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.random_state = random_state\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.cluster_centers_ = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.labels_ = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def _initialize_cluster_centers_(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        # 随机选择 K 个数据点作为初始中心点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        np.random.seed(self.random_state)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        indices = np.random.permutation(X.shape[0])[:self.n_clusters]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        return X[indices]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    def _compute_distances(self, X, cluster_centers_):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 计算每个点到所有中心点的距离（欧氏距离）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        distances = np.zeros((X.shape[0], self.n_clusters))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        for i in range(self.n_clusters):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            # axis=1 表示按行计算向量的模长（即每个样本到中心的距离）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            distances[:, i] = np.linalg.norm(X - cluster_centers_[i], axis=1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        return distances\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    def _assign_clusters(self, distances):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        # 分配每个点到最近的中心点所属的簇\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        return np.argmin(distances, axis=1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    def _update_cluster_centers_(self, X, labels):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        # 计算每个簇的新中心点（均值）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        new_cluster_centers_ = np.zeros((self.n_clusters, X.shape[1]))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        for i in range(self.n_clusters):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            new_cluster_centers_[i] = np.mean(X[labels == i], axis=0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        return new_cluster_centers_\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    def fit(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        # 1. 初始化中心点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 自主实现K-means聚类\r\nimport numpy as np\r\n\r\nclass MyKMeans:\r\n    def __init__(self, n_clusters=3, max_iter=300, random_state=None):\r\n        self.n_clusters = n_clusters\r\n        self.max_iter = max_iter\r\n        self.random_state = random_state\r\n        self.cluster_centers_ = None\r\n        self.labels_ = None\r\n\r\n    def _initialize_cluster_centers_(self, X):\r\n        # 随机选择 K 个数据点作为初始中心点\r\n        np.random.seed(self.random_state)\r\n        indices = np.random.permutation(X.shape[0])[:self.n_clusters]\r\n        return X[indices]\r\n\r\n    def _compute_distances(self, X, cluster_centers_):\r\n        # 计算每个点到所有中心点的距离（欧氏距离）\r\n        distances = np.zeros((X.shape[0], self.n_clusters))\r\n        for i in range(self.n_clusters):\r\n            # axis=1 表示按行计算向量的模长（即每个样本到中心的距离）\r\n            distances[:, i] = np.linalg.norm(X - cluster_centers_[i], axis=1)\r\n        return distances\r\n\r\n    def _assign_clusters(self, distances):\r\n        # 分配每个点到最近的中心点所属的簇\r\n        return np.argmin(distances, axis=1)\r\n\r\n    def _update_cluster_centers_(self, X, labels):\r\n        # 计算每个簇的新中心点（均值）\r\n        new_cluster_centers_ = np.zeros((self.n_clusters, X.shape[1]))\r\n        for i in range(self.n_clusters):\r\n            new_cluster_centers_[i] = np.mean(X[labels == i], axis=0)\r\n        return new_cluster_centers_",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 59
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/MyKMeans.py"
      },
      "score": 0.5207170248031616
    },

          },

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "class DimReduction:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, final_feature_calculator):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "        self.final_feature_calculator = final_feature_calculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.raw_pca_data = self.get_raw_dim_data()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    def get_raw_dim_data(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        return self.final_feature_calculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    def get_transformed_data(self, method=\"pca\", **kwargs):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        \"\"\"支持选择性导入\"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        method = method.lower()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        available_methods = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            # \"pca\": (\"sklearn.decomposition\", \"PCA\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "            \"pca\": (\"tools.MyPCA\", \"MyPCA\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            \"tsne\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"TSNE\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            \"umap\": (\"umap\", \"UMAP\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            \"lle\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"LocallyLinearEmbedding\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            \"mds\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"MDS\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            \"isomap\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"Isomap\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        if method not in available_methods:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            raise ValueError(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                f\"未知的降维方法: {method}。支持的方法: {', '.join(available_methods.keys())}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        module_name, class_name = available_methods[method]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            # 动态导入\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            module = __import__(module_name, fromlist=[class_name])"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nclass DimReduction:\r\n    def __init__(self, final_feature_calculator):\r\n        self.final_feature_calculator = final_feature_calculator\r\n        self.raw_pca_data = self.get_raw_dim_data()\r\n\r\n    def get_raw_dim_data(self):\r\n        return self.final_feature_calculator\r\n    def get_transformed_data(self, method=\"pca\", **kwargs):\r\n        \"\"\"支持选择性导入\"\"\"\r\n        method = method.lower()\r\n        available_methods = {\r\n            # \"pca\": (\"sklearn.decomposition\", \"PCA\"),\r\n            \"pca\": (\"tools.MyPCA\", \"MyPCA\"),\r\n            \"tsne\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"TSNE\"),\r\n            \"umap\": (\"umap\", \"UMAP\"),\r\n            \"lle\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"LocallyLinearEmbedding\"),\r\n            \"mds\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"MDS\"),\r\n            \"isomap\": (\"sklearn.manifold\", \"Isomap\"),\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if method not in available_methods:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"未知的降维方法: {method}。支持的方法: {', '.join(available_methods.keys())}\"\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        module_name, class_name = available_methods[method]",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/dim_reduction.py"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " \"cells\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \"#  手动实现 PCA 主成分分析\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \"本 Notebook 用于学习PCA，一步步拆解 PCA 算法的实现过程，并解释其背后的数学原理。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \"###  PCA 是什么？\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \"- PCA（Principal Component Analysis）是一种常用的无监督降维技术。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \"- 它通过找到数据中方差最大的方向（主成分），将高维数据投影到低维空间。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \"- 目标：保留尽可能多的信息（方差），同时减少特征数量。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \"###  核心步骤回顾\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    \"1. 数据标准化（中心化）\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \"2. 计算协方差矩阵\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    \"3. 特征值分解 → 得到主成分方向\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \"4. 投影到前 n 个主成分空间\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,

        "originalContents": "{\n \"cells\": [\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"#  手动实现 PCA 主成分分析\\n\",\n    \"本 Notebook 用于学习PCA，一步步拆解 PCA 算法的实现过程，并解释其背后的数学原理。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"###  PCA 是什么？\\n\",\n    \"- PCA（Principal Component Analysis）是一种常用的无监督降维技术。\\n\",\n    \"- 它通过找到数据中方差最大的方向（主成分），将高维数据投影到低维空间。\\n\",\n    \"- 目标：保留尽可能多的信息（方差），同时减少特征数量。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"###  核心步骤回顾\\n\",\n    \"1. 数据标准化（中心化）\\n\",\n    \"2. 计算协方差矩阵\\n\",\n    \"3. 特征值分解 → 得到主成分方向\\n\",\n    \"4. 投影到前 n 个主成分空间\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 1,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"import numpy as np\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.datasets import load_iris\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 1: 加载数据\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 3,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [\n    {\n     \"name\": \"stdout\",\n     \"output_type\": \"stream\",\n     \"text\": [\n      \"原始数据 X shape: (150, 4)\\n\",\n      \"前5个样本:\\n\",\n      \" [[5.1 3.5 1.4 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.9 3.  1.4 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.7 3.2 1.3 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.6 3.1 1.5 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [5.  3.6 1.4 0.2]]\\n\"\n     ]\n    }\n   ],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 加载鸢尾花数据集\\n\",\n    \"data = load_iris()\\n\",\n    \"X = data.data\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"原始数据 X shape:\\\", X.shape)\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"前5个样本:\\\\n\\\", X[:5])\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 2: 数据标准化（中心化）\"\n   ]\n  },\n",

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        method: str = \"kmeans\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        **kwargs\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    ):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "def extract_features(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]]) -\u003e np.ndarray:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        return np.array(features)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    def create_cluster_model(self, method: str=\"kmeans\", n_clusters: int = 3, **kwargs):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        \"\"\"动态创建聚类模型\"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        method = method.lower()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "        available_methods = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "            \"kmeans\": (\"tools.MyKMeans\", \"MyKMeans\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "            # \"kmeans\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"KMeans\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "            \"dbscan\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"DBSCAN\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "            \"agg\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"AgglomerativeClustering\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "            \"gmm\": (\"sklearn.mixture\", \"GaussianMixture\"),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        if method not in available_methods:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "            raise ValueError(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "                f\"未知的聚类方法: {method}。支持的方法: {', '.join(available_methods.keys())}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        module_name, class_name = available_methods[method]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "            # 动态导入\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            module = __import__(module_name, fromlist=[class_name])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            model_class = getattr(module, class_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "            # 初始化聚类器（不同方法的参数可能不同）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "            if method == \"kmeans\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "                return model_class(n_clusters=n_clusters, random_state=42, **kwargs)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "            elif method == \"dbscan\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "                return model_class(**kwargs)  # DBSCAN 不需要 n_clusters\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "            elif method == \"agg\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "                return model_class(n_clusters=n_clusters, **kwargs)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "            elif method == \"gmm\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "                return model_class(n_components=n_clusters, random_state=42, **kwargs)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        except ImportError as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "            raise ImportError(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "                f\"无法导入 {method} 所需的库，请先安装。例如：\\n\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "                f\"pip install scikit-learn\\n\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "            ) from e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    def get_student_clusters(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Dict[str, Union[int, Dict[str, float]]]]:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def create_cluster_model(self, method: str=\"kmeans\", n_clusters: int = 3, **kwargs):\r\n        \"\"\"动态创建聚类模型\"\"\"\r\n        method = method.lower()\r\n        available_methods = {\r\n            \"kmeans\": (\"tools.MyKMeans\", \"MyKMeans\"),\r\n            # \"kmeans\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"KMeans\"),\r\n            \"dbscan\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"DBSCAN\"),\r\n            \"agg\": (\"sklearn.cluster\", \"AgglomerativeClustering\"),\r\n            \"gmm\": (\"sklearn.mixture\", \"GaussianMixture\"),\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if method not in available_methods:\r\n            raise ValueError(\r\n                f\"未知的聚类方法: {method}。支持的方法: {', '.join(available_methods.keys())}\"\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        module_name, class_name = available_methods[method]\r\n        \r\n        try:\r\n            # 动态导入\r\n            module = __import__(module_name, fromlist=[class_name])\r\n            model_class = getattr(module, class_name)\r\n            \r\n            # 初始化聚类器（不同方法的参数可能不同）\r\n            if method == \"kmeans\":\r\n                return model_class(n_clusters=n_clusters, random_state=42, **kwargs)\r\n            elif method == \"dbscan\":\r\n                return model_class(**kwargs)  # DBSCAN 不需要 n_clusters\r\n            elif method == \"agg\":\r\n                return model_class(n_clusters=n_clusters, **kwargs)\r\n            elif method == \"gmm\":\r\n                return model_class(n_components=n_clusters, random_state=42, **kwargs)\r\n        \r\n        except ImportError as e:\r\n            raise ImportError(\r\n                f\"无法导入 {method} 所需的库，请先安装。例如：\\n\"\r\n                f\"pip install scikit-learn\\n\"\r\n            ) from e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 144
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 36,
            "line": 2
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/cluster_analysis.py"
      },
      "score": 0.47714099287986755
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " \"cells\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \"# 手动实现 K-Means 聚类算法\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \"本 Notebook 用于学习K-Means，将一步步拆解 K-Means 算法的实现过程，帮助理解其内部机制。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \"### K-Means 是什么？\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \"- K-Means（K-Means Clustering）是一种常用的无监督聚类算法。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \"- 它通过将数据集划分为K个集群，使得每个集群的样本相似。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \"- 目标：将数据集划分成K个相似的子集，每个子集内样本相似。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \"### 核心步骤回顾\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    \"1. 初始化聚类中心（随机数取）\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \"2. 迭代：\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    \"    - 计算每个样本到聚类中心的距离\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \"    - 将样本分配到距离最近的聚类中心\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    \"    - 更新聚类中心\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    \"3. 停止：当聚类中心不再改变/到最大迭代次数，停止迭代\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"code\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "   \"execution_count\": 1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "   \"outputs\": [],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    \"import numpy as np\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \"from sklearn.cluster import KMeans  # 用于最后对比\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \"##  Step 1: 生成测试数据\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"code\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "   \"execution_count\": 2,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "   \"outputs\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "     \"name\": \"stdout\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "     \"output_type\": \"stream\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "     \"text\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "      \"原始数据 X shape: (100, 2)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      \"前5行样本:\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "      \" [[0.37454012 0.95071431]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      \" [0.73199394 0.59865848]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      \" [0.15601864 0.15599452]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      \" [0.05808361 0.86617615]\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      \" [0.60111501 0.70807258]]\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "     ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "   ],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    \"# 设置随机种子以确保结果可复现\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    \"np.random.seed(42)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    \"# 生成 100 个二维点作为测试数据\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    \"X = np.random.rand(100, 2)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"原始数据 X shape:\\\", X.shape)\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    \"print(\\\"前5行样本:\\\\n\\\", X[:5])\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "{\n \"cells\": [\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 手动实现 K-Means 聚类算法\\n\",\n    \"本 Notebook 用于学习K-Means，将一步步拆解 K-Means 算法的实现过程，帮助理解其内部机制。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"### K-Means 是什么？\\n\",\n    \"- K-Means（K-Means Clustering）是一种常用的无监督聚类算法。\\n\",\n    \"- 它通过将数据集划分为K个集群，使得每个集群的样本相似。\\n\",\n    \"- 目标：将数据集划分成K个相似的子集，每个子集内样本相似。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"### 核心步骤回顾\\n\",\n    \"1. 初始化聚类中心（随机数取）\\n\",\n    \"2. 迭代：\\n\",\n    \"    - 计算每个样本到聚类中心的距离\\n\",\n    \"    - 将样本分配到距离最近的聚类中心\\n\",\n    \"    - 更新聚类中心\\n\",\n    \"3. 停止：当聚类中心不再改变/到最大迭代次数，停止迭代\\n\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 1,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"import numpy as np\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.cluster import KMeans  # 用于最后对比\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 1: 生成测试数据\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 2,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [\n    {\n     \"name\": \"stdout\",\n     \"output_type\": \"stream\",\n     \"text\": [\n      \"原始数据 X shape: (100, 2)\\n\",\n      \"前5行样本:\\n\",\n      \" [[0.37454012 0.95071431]\\n\",\n      \" [0.73199394 0.59865848]\\n\",\n      \" [0.15601864 0.15599452]\\n\",\n      \" [0.05808361 0.86617615]\\n\",\n      \" [0.60111501 0.70807258]]\\n\"\n     ]\n    }\n   ],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 设置随机种子以确保结果可复现\\n\",\n    \"np.random.seed(42)\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"# 生成 100 个二维点作为测试数据\\n\",\n    \"X = np.random.rand(100, 2)\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"原始数据 X shape:\\\", X.shape)\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"前5行样本:\\\\n\\\", X[:5])\"\n   ]\n  },\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 73
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "notes/hands_on_KMeans.ipynb"
      },
      "score": 0.4615303874015808
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "class DimReduction:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, final_feature_calculator):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "        self.final_feature_calculator = final_feature_calculator"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    def get_transformed_data(self, method=\"pca\", **kwargs):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        \"\"\"支持选择性导入\"\"\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        module_name, class_name = available_methods[method]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            # 动态导入\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            module = __import__(module_name, fromlist=[class_name])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            transformer_class = getattr(module, class_name)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "            # 初始化降维器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            transformer = transformer_class(n_components=2, **kwargs)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "            # 执行降维\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            transformed_data = transformer.fit_transform(self.raw_pca_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "            # 将数据缩放到 [-5, 5], 便于前端统一视口渲染\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "            scaler = MinMaxScaler(feature_range=(-5, 5))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "            scaled_data = scaler.fit_transform(transformed_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            return pd.DataFrame(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "                scaled_data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "                index=self.raw_pca_data.index,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "                columns=['x', 'y']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        except ImportError as e:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "            raise ImportError(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "                f\"无法导入 {method} 所需的库，请先安装。例如：\\n\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "                f\"pip install scikit-learn   # PCA, t-SNE, LLE, MDS, Isomap\\n\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "                f\"pip install umap-learn     # UMAP\\n\"\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "            ) from e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  # 示例用法\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  # features_df是从features.py中计算得出的特征DataFrame\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            # 动态导入\r\n            module = __import__(module_name, fromlist=[class_name])\r\n            transformer_class = getattr(module, class_name)\r\n\r\n            # 初始化降维器\r\n            transformer = transformer_class(n_components=2, **kwargs)\r\n\r\n            # 执行降维\r\n            transformed_data = transformer.fit_transform(self.raw_pca_data)\r\n\r\n            # 将数据缩放到 [-5, 5], 便于前端统一视口渲染\r\n            from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\r\n            scaler = MinMaxScaler(feature_range=(-5, 5))\r\n            scaled_data = scaler.fit_transform(transformed_data)\r\n\r\n            return pd.DataFrame(\r\n                scaled_data,\r\n                index=self.raw_pca_data.index,\r\n                columns=['x', 'y']\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        except ImportError as e:\r\n            raise ImportError(\r\n                f\"无法导入 {method} 所需的库，请先安装。例如：\\n\"\r\n                f\"pip install scikit-learn   # PCA, t-SNE, LLE, MDS, Isomap\\n\"\r\n                f\"pip install umap-learn     # UMAP\\n\"\r\n            ) from e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 66,
            "line": 60
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/dim_reduction.py"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class MyKMeans:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, n_clusters=3, max_iter=300, random_state=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.n_clusters = n_clusters"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "def _update_cluster_centers_(self, X, labels):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        # 计算每个簇的新中心点（均值）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        return new_cluster_centers_\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    def fit(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        # 1. 初始化中心点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        self.cluster_centers_ = self._initialize_cluster_centers_(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        for _ in range(self.max_iter):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            # 2. 计算距离并分配簇\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "            distances = self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "            labels = self._assign_clusters(distances)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "            # 3. 更新中心点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "            new_cluster_centers_ = self._update_cluster_centers_(X, labels)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "            # 4. 检查是否收敛\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            if np.allclose(self.cluster_centers_, new_cluster_centers_):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "                break\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "            self.cluster_centers_ = new_cluster_centers_\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "        self.labels_ = self._assign_clusters(self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        return self\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    def predict(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        distances = self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_)\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        return self._assign_clusters(distances)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  # 生成测试数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  np.random.seed(42)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def fit(self, X):\r\n        # 1. 初始化中心点\r\n        self.cluster_centers_ = self._initialize_cluster_centers_(X)\r\n\r\n        for _ in range(self.max_iter):\r\n            # 2. 计算距离并分配簇\r\n            distances = self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_)\r\n            labels = self._assign_clusters(distances)\r\n\r\n            # 3. 更新中心点\r\n            new_cluster_centers_ = self._update_cluster_centers_(X, labels)\r\n\r\n            # 4. 检查是否收敛\r\n            if np.allclose(self.cluster_centers_, new_cluster_centers_):\r\n                break\r\n\r\n            self.cluster_centers_ = new_cluster_centers_\r\n\r\n        self.labels_ = self._assign_clusters(self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_))\r\n        return self\r\n\r\n    def predict(self, X):\r\n        distances = self._compute_distances(X, self.cluster_centers_)\r\n        return self._assign_clusters(distances)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 20,
            "line": 64
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 18,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/MyKMeans.py"
      },

            "text": "\r"

            "lineNumber": 62,

            "lineNumber": 63,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  my_labels = my_kmeans.predict(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "  # scikit-learn K-Means\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "  from sklearn.cluster import KMeans as KMeans\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "  sk_kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 79,

            "lineNumber": 80,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  # 比较结果\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  print(\"My K-Means 中心点:\\n\", my_centroid)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "  print(\"sklearn K-Means 中心点:\\n\", sk_centroid)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n  # 生成测试数据\r\n  np.random.seed(42)\r\n  X = np.random.rand(100, 2)  # 100个2维数据点\r\n  print(X.shape[0])\r\n  # MyK-Means\r\n  my_kmeans = MyKMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)\r\n  my_kmeans.fit(X)\r\n  my_centroid = my_kmeans.cluster_centers_\r\n  print(my_kmeans.labels_)\r\n  my_labels = my_kmeans.predict(X)\r\n\r\n\r\n  # scikit-learn K-Means\r\n  from sklearn.cluster import KMeans as KMeans\r\n  sk_kmeans = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=42)\r\n  sk_kmeans.fit(X)\r\n  sk_centroid = sk_kmeans.cluster_centers_\r\n  sk_labels = sk_kmeans.predict(X)\r\n\r\n  # 比较结果\r\n  print(\"My K-Means 中心点:\\n\", my_centroid)\r\n  print(\"sklearn K-Means 中心点:\\n\", sk_centroid)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 52,
            "line": 84
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 3
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/MyKMeans.py"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "class ScatterRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, feature_factory):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "        self.feature_factory = feature_factory\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.scatter_bp = Blueprint('pca', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.register_routes()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    def register_routes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.scatter_bp.add_url_rule('/pca/scatter', view_func=self.pca_cluster, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def pca_cluster(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        # 获取PCA变换后的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        transformed_data = self.feature_factory.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        transformed_data.index = self.feature_factory.dim_reduction.raw_pca_data.index  # 确保索引一致\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "       \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        student_clusters = self.feature_factory.cluster_analysis.get_student_clusters()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 合并聚类结果和PCA结果\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        result = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        for student_id, cluster_info in student_clusters.items():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            cluster = cluster_info['cluster']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            transformed_point = transformed_data.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            result.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                'student_id': student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                'cluster': cluster,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                'transform': transformed_point\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        return jsonify(result)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify\r\n\r\nclass ScatterRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, feature_factory):\r\n        self.feature_factory = feature_factory\r\n        self.scatter_bp = Blueprint('pca', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.scatter_bp.add_url_rule('/pca/scatter', view_func=self.pca_cluster, methods=['GET'])\r\n\r\n    def pca_cluster(self):\r\n        # 获取PCA变换后的数据\r\n        transformed_data = self.feature_factory.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data()\r\n        transformed_data.index = self.feature_factory.dim_reduction.raw_pca_data.index  # 确保索引一致\r\n       \r\n        student_clusters = self.feature_factory.cluster_analysis.get_student_clusters()\r\n\r\n        # 合并聚类结果和PCA结果\r\n        result = []\r\n        for student_id, cluster_info in student_clusters.items():\r\n            cluster = cluster_info['cluster']\r\n            transformed_point = transformed_data.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r\n            result.append({\r\n                'student_id': student_id,\r\n                'cluster': cluster,\r\n                'transform': transformed_point\r\n            })\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(result)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 30,
            "line": 29
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/scatter_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.42198556661605835
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class MyPCA:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    def fit_transform(self, X):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        self.fit(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        return self.transform(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  from sklearn.decomposition import PCA as PCA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  from sklearn.datasets import load_iris\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  # 加载数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  data = load_iris()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  X = data.data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  # 自定义PCA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  my_pca = MyPCA(n_components=2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  X_my = my_pca.fit_transform(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "  # scikit-learn PCA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  sk_pca = PCA(n_components=2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "  X_sk = sk_pca.fit_transform(X)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  # 验证结果是否一致（允许微小误差）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  print(\"MyPCA结果:\\n\", X_my[:5])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  print(\"sklearn PCA结果:\\n\", X_sk[:5])"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n  from sklearn.decomposition import PCA as PCA\r\n  from sklearn.datasets import load_iris\r\n  \r\n  # 加载数据\r\n  data = load_iris()\r\n  X = data.data\r\n  \r\n  # 自定义PCA\r\n  my_pca = MyPCA(n_components=2)\r\n  X_my = my_pca.fit_transform(X)\r\n  \r\n  # scikit-learn PCA\r\n  sk_pca = PCA(n_components=2)\r\n  X_sk = sk_pca.fit_transform(X)\r\n  \r\n  # 验证结果是否一致（允许微小误差）\r\n  print(\"MyPCA结果:\\n\", X_my[:5])\r\n  print(\"sklearn PCA结果:\\n\", X_sk[:5])",

            "text": ".keys(), center))\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "    # 示例用法\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "    students_data = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        'student1': {'math': 88, 'science': 92, 'english': 85},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        'student2': {'math': 75, 'science': 80, 'english': 78},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        'student3': {'math': 95, 'science': 90, 'english': 92},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        'student4': {'math': 60, 'science': 65, 'english': 68}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    # 使用 K-Means（默认）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    kmeans_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"kmeans\", n_clusters=2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    print(\"K-Means 聚类结果:\", kmeans_analysis.get_student_clusters())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "    # 使用 DBSCAN（不需要 n_clusters）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "    dbscan_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"dbscan\", eps=10, min_samples=2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "    print(\"DBSCAN 聚类结果:\", dbscan_analysis.get_student_clusters())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "    # 使用 GMM\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    gmm_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"gmm\", n_clusters=2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "    print(\"GMM 聚类中心:\", gmm_analysis.get_cluster_centers())"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    # 示例用法\r\n    students_data = {\r\n        'student1': {'math': 88, 'science': 92, 'english': 85},\r\n        'student2': {'math': 75, 'science': 80, 'english': 78},\r\n        'student3': {'math': 95, 'science': 90, 'english': 92},\r\n        'student4': {'math': 60, 'science': 65, 'english': 68}\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    # 使用 K-Means（默认）\r\n    kmeans_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"kmeans\", n_clusters=2)\r\n    print(\"K-Means 聚类结果:\", kmeans_analysis.get_student_clusters())\r\n\r\n    # 使用 DBSCAN（不需要 n_clusters）\r\n    dbscan_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"dbscan\", eps=10, min_samples=2)\r\n    print(\"DBSCAN 聚类结果:\", dbscan_analysis.get_student_clusters())\r\n\r\n    # 使用 GMM\r\n    gmm_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data, method=\"gmm\", n_clusters=2)\r\n    print(\"GMM 聚类中心:\", gmm_analysis.get_cluster_centers())",

        "originalContents": "\u003e 本文对比用到的两个机器学习方法：聚类、 降维\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 主要调用技术栈：scikit-learn\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 注意：\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 1. umap不在sklearn库中，需要单独安装umap-learn\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e 2. 目前并没有在前端实现选择接口，需要后端修改参数\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e    - 修改dimReduction: backend\\tools\\dim_reduction.py:line10\r\n\u003e\r\n\u003e    - 修改clustering: backend\\tools\\cluster_analysis: line51\r\n\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n# 聚类Clustering\r\n\r\n提供的方法包括：K-Means、GMM\r\n\r\nDBSCAN因为参数问题和无聚类中心问题暂不支持\r\n\r\n使用的数据集为：Class1+2+3 \u0026 All major\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Kmeans.png\" alt=\"Kmeans\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Kmeans.png\" alt=\"Kmeans\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n# 降维DimReduction\r\n\r\n提供的方法包括：PCA、UMAP、t-SNE、LocallyLinearEmbedding、MDS、Isomap\r\n\r\n使用的数据集为：Class1 \u0026 All major\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n以下为PCA \u0026 UMAP\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/PCA.png\" alt=\"PCA\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/UMAP.png\" alt=\"UMAP\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n以下为t-SNE \u0026 lle\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/t-SNE.png\" alt=\"t-SNE\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/lle.png\" alt=\"lle\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n以下为MDS \u0026 Isomap\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/MDS.png\" alt=\"MDS\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\u003cimg src=\"src/MachineLearning/Isomap.png\" alt=\"Isomap\" style=\"zoom: 80%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            n_clusters: 聚类数量（仅适用于 K-Means、Agglomerative、GMM）\r"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 22,

            "text": "    def extract_features(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]]) -\u003e np.ndarray:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        \"\"\"提取特征向量\"\"\"\r"

            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        features = []\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        for student_id, values in raw_data.items():\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "            if isinstance(values, dict):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "                feature_vector = list(values.values())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "                features.append(feature_vector)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "            else:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "                raise ValueError(f\"Invalid data format for student {student_id}: {values}\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        return np.array(features)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    def create_cluster_model(self, method: str=\"kmeans\", n_clusters: int = 3, **kwargs):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Union\r\n\r\nclass ClusterAnalysis:\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        students_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]],\r\n        method: str = \"kmeans\",\r\n        n_clusters: int = 3,\r\n        **kwargs\r\n    ):\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        初始化聚类分析\r\n        \r\n        参数:\r\n            students_data: 学生数据，格式为 {学生ID: {科目: 分数}}\r\n            method: 聚类方法，支持 \"kmeans\", \"dbscan\", \"agg\", \"gmm\"\r\n            n_clusters: 聚类数量（仅适用于 K-Means、Agglomerative、GMM）\r\n            **kwargs: 传递给聚类算法的额外参数\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        self.raw_data = students_data\r\n        self.method = method.lower()\r\n        self.n_clusters = n_clusters\r\n        self.kwargs = kwargs\r\n        \r\n        # 提取特征向量\r\n        self.features_array = self.extract_features(self.raw_data)\r\n        \r\n        # 初始化聚类模型\r\n        self.cluster_model = self.create_cluster_model(\r\n            method=self.method,\r\n            n_clusters=self.n_clusters,\r\n            **self.kwargs\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # 训练模型\r\n        self.cluster_model.fit(self.features_array)\r\n\r\n    def extract_features(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]]) -\u003e np.ndarray:\r\n        \"\"\"提取特征向量\"\"\"\r\n        features = []\r\n        for student_id, values in raw_data.items():\r\n            if isinstance(values, dict):\r\n                feature_vector = list(values.values())\r\n                features.append(feature_vector)\r\n            else:\r\n                raise ValueError(f\"Invalid data format for student {student_id}: {values}\")\r\n        return np.array(features)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 144
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/cluster_analysis.py"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# 竞赛内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "NorthClass是一家知名的高等教育培训机构，开设了超过100门课程，涵盖文学、理学、工学、医学、经济学、管理学等多个学科领域，吸引了约30万名注册的学习者。该机构通过提供优质的教学服务，为学习者创造了一个灵活便捷的学习环境。为了顺应数字化时代的发展趋势，提升在科技领域中的市场竞争力，该机构策划并推出了一门编程课程，要求学习者在学习期间完成指定的编程任务，同时允许进行多次尝试和提交，以确保充分掌握和应用所学知识。 课程结束后，机构收集了学习者的时序学习数据，用于评估教学效果是否达到预设的标准和要求。为了优化教学资源和提升教学质量，该机构计划成立专门的智学发展革新小组，探索如何利用新一代人工智能技术赋能教育，以更好地培养适应新时代发展需求的创新型人才。可视化与可视分析利用高带宽的视觉感知通道，将复杂的时序学习行为数据转换为图形表达，对学习者的知识掌握水平进行诊断与分析，动态追踪学习行为的演变趋势，识别并剖析产生学习困难的潜在因素。 假如你是智学发展革新小组的成员，请您设计并实现一套可视分析解决方案，帮助该机构直观感知学习者的学习现状，为调整教学策略和课程设计提出可行的建议。  **请完成以下内容：**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "1. 分析学习者答题行为日志记录，从答题分数、答题状态等多维度属性量化评估知识点掌握程度，并识别其知识体系中存在的薄弱环节。（建议参赛者回答此题文字不多于800字，图片不多于5张）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "2. 结合学习者的特征挖掘个性化学习行为模式，从多角度设计并展示学习者画像，如答题高峰时段、偏好题型、正确答题率等。（建议参赛者回答此题文字不多于800字，图片不多于5张）\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# 竞赛内容\r\n\r\nNorthClass是一家知名的高等教育培训机构，开设了超过100门课程，涵盖文学、理学、工学、医学、经济学、管理学等多个学科领域，吸引了约30万名注册的学习者。该机构通过提供优质的教学服务，为学习者创造了一个灵活便捷的学习环境。为了顺应数字化时代的发展趋势，提升在科技领域中的市场竞争力，该机构策划并推出了一门编程课程，要求学习者在学习期间完成指定的编程任务，同时允许进行多次尝试和提交，以确保充分掌握和应用所学知识。 课程结束后，机构收集了学习者的时序学习数据，用于评估教学效果是否达到预设的标准和要求。为了优化教学资源和提升教学质量，该机构计划成立专门的智学发展革新小组，探索如何利用新一代人工智能技术赋能教育，以更好地培养适应新时代发展需求的创新型人才。可视化与可视分析利用高带宽的视觉感知通道，将复杂的时序学习行为数据转换为图形表达，对学习者的知识掌握水平进行诊断与分析，动态追踪学习行为的演变趋势，识别并剖析产生学习困难的潜在因素。 假如你是智学发展革新小组的成员，请您设计并实现一套可视分析解决方案，帮助该机构直观感知学习者的学习现状，为调整教学策略和课程设计提出可行的建议。  **请完成以下内容：**\r\n\r\n1. 分析学习者答题行为日志记录，从答题分数、答题状态等多维度属性量化评估知识点掌握程度，并识别其知识体系中存在的薄弱环节。（建议参赛者回答此题文字不多于800字，图片不多于5张）\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 7
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "problem.md"
      },
      "score": 0.2889498472213745
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools.dim_reduction import DimReduction\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools.cluster_analysis import ClusterAnalysis\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class FeatureFactory:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    def _initialize_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        features = self.preliminary_feature_calculator.get_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID', 'knowledge']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = DimReduction(self.feature_bonus)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data=self.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data().to_dict(orient='index'))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()"
