        ],
        "originalContents": "},\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData()\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.renderSelectedData()\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n#portrait-view {\r\n  .title {\r\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n    padding-left: 20px;\r\n    padding-top: 10px;\r\n    padding-bottom: 5px;\r\n    margin-bottom: 5px;\r\n    span {\r\n      font-size: 20px;\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  .vis-container {\r\n    height: 480px;\r\n    width: 100%;\r\n    margin-left: 10px;\r\n    display: flex;\r\n    justify-content: space-between;\r\n    margin-top: 25px;\r\n    .vis-panel {\r\n      position: relative;\r\n      width: 100%;\r\n      display: flex;\r\n      justify-content: space-between;\r\n      margin-left: 0px;\r\n      box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\r\n  \r\n      [id^='visualization'] {\r\n        flex: 1;\r\n        padding-top: 55px;\r\n        display: inline-block;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    .labels {\r\n      width: 300px;\r\n      margin: 30px 0;\r\n      display: flex;\r\n      flex-direction: column;\r\n      justify-content: space-between;\r\n      align-items: center;\r\n  \r\n      #label-bar,\r\n      #label-radar,\r\n      #label-legend {\r\n        width: 100%;\r\n        height: calc(100% / 3);\r\n        margin-top: 35px;\r\n        display: flex;\r\n        justify-content: center;\r\n        align-items: center;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 584
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 503
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/PortraitView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.3187706470489502
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "       .attr('font-size', '0.6em')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "       .text(d =\u003e d)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "    renderLabelRadar() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "      const height = 200\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      const width = 270\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "      // const boxHeight = 50\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "      const labelRadius = 55\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "      const labelCenter = { \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "        X: width / 2,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        Y: height / 2 \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#label-radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "        .html('') // Clear previous content\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "        .attr('width', width)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "        .attr('height', height)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${5},${0})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "      const labelG = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "        .attr('class', 'label-radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${labelCenter.X}, ${labelCenter.Y})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "      // let features_dimension = Object.keys(Object.values(this.PortraitData)[0].radar)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "      // 调整渲染顺序\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "      const features_dimension = this.radar_dimension\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "      const levels = 2\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "      const opcityCircles = 0.01\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 330,
            "text": "          .domain(features_dimension)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331,
            "text": "          .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 332,
            "text": "          .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 333,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334,
            "text": "      // 圆圈虚线\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "      labelG.selectAll('.level-radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "        .data(d3.range(1, levels + 1).reverse())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 337,
            "text": "        .join('circle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 338,
            "text": "        .attr('class', 'grid-circle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 339,
            "text": "        .attr('r', d =\u003e d * (labelRadius / levels))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "        .style('fill', '#CDCDCD')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341,
            "text": "        .style('stroke', '#CDCDCD')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 342,
            "text": "        .style('fill-opacity', opcityCircles)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 343,
            "text": "        .style('stroke-dasharray', '9, 9')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "      // 直虚线\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 345,
            "text": "      const axis = labelG.selectAll('.axis-radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346,
            "text": "        .data(features_dimension)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347,
            "text": "        .join('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 348,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349,
            "text": "      axis.append('line')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 350,
            "text": "        .attr('class', 'radar-line')\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "renderLabelRadar() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 200\r\n      const width = 270\r\n      // const boxHeight = 50\r\n      const labelRadius = 55\r\n      const labelCenter = { \r\n        X: width / 2,\r\n        Y: height / 2 \r\n      }\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#label-radar')\r\n        .html('') // Clear previous content\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', width)\r\n        .attr('height', height)\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${5},${0})&#96;)\r\n      const labelG = svg.append('g')\r\n        .attr('class', 'label-radar')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${labelCenter.X}, ${labelCenter.Y})&#96;)\r\n      \r\n      // let features_dimension = Object.keys(Object.values(this.PortraitData)[0].radar)\r\n      // 调整渲染顺序\r\n      const features_dimension = this.radar_dimension\r\n      const levels = 2\r\n      const opcityCircles = 0.01\r\n\r\n      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r\n          .domain(features_dimension)\r\n          .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r\n          .align(0)\r\n      \r\n      // 圆圈虚线\r\n      labelG.selectAll('.level-radar')\r\n        .data(d3.range(1, levels + 1).reverse())\r\n        .join('circle')\r\n        .attr('class', 'grid-circle')\r\n        .attr('r', d =\u003e d * (labelRadius / levels))\r\n        .style('fill', '#CDCDCD')\r\n        .style('stroke', '#CDCDCD')\r\n        .style('fill-opacity', opcityCircles)\r\n        .style('stroke-dasharray', '9, 9')\r\n      // 直虚线\r\n      const axis = labelG.selectAll('.axis-radar')\r\n        .data(features_dimension)\r\n        .join('g')\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 350
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 299
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/PortraitView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.29521286487579346
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"app-container\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv class=\"header\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    \u003cNavHeader/\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv class=\"body\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"main\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"top\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- A. Scatter View or Parallel View --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,

          },
          {

            "text": "     const labelG = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "       .attr('class', 'label-bar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "       .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${labelCenter.X}, ${labelCenter.Y})&#96;)\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "     const str = ['Mastery', 'of', 'knowledge']\r"

            "text": "     labelG.selectAll('.label-bar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "       .data(str)\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "       .join('g')\r"
          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "       .text(d =\u003e d)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {

            "text": "     const knowledge_dimension = Object.keys(Object.values(this.PortraitData)[0].knowledge)\r"

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "     const knowledgeNum = knowledge_dimension.length\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "     const labelData = knowledge_dimension.map((_, i) =\u003e ({ r1: labelRadius * 0.8, r2: labelRadius, index: i }))\r"
          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,

          },
          {

          {

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

          {

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    loadStudentPanel(index) {\r\n      if (this.visibleIndices.has(index)) return // 如果已经加载过，则跳过\r\n\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const width = 440 // SVG 宽度\r\n      const studentTitleHeight = 30 // 学生标题高度\r\n      const labelPadding = 5 // 标签内边距\r\n      const labelMargin = 20 // 标签外边距\r\n      const labelContent = ['name', 'class', 'major'] // 标签内容\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 10, left: 20 } // 边距\r\n      const padding = { top: 5, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 5 } // 内边距\r\n      const studentTipHeight = 40 // 学生提示高度\r\n      const tipBlockWidth = (width - margin.right - margin.left) / 3 // 提示块宽度\r\n      const tipContent = ['Knowledge', 'State', 'Score'] // 提示内容\r\n\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationStu') // 选择 SVG 元素\r\n\r\n      const g = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n      \r\n      const s = this.filteredTreeData[index]\r\n      \r\n      this.currentCluster = this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.name] // 设置当前集群\r\n      const studentPanelHeight = studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight + margin.bottom // 计算学生面板高度\r\n      const varToggleFunc = this.togglePanelHeight\r\n      const studentPanel = g.append('svg') // 创建学生面板\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${0})&#96;)  \r\n        .attr('class', 'student-panel')\r\n        .attr('width', width - margin.left - margin.right)\r\n        .attr('height', studentPanelHeight)\r\n        // .attr('height', this.PanelsHeight[index])\r\n        .style('box-shadow', '0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)')\r\n        .on(\"click\", function() {\r\n          // 点击时，切换面板的高度\r\n          varToggleFunc(d3.select(this), index)\r\n        })\r\n\r\n      const sg = studentPanel.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${studentTitleHeight})&#96;)\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 208
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 165
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools import fileSystem as fileSystem\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools import StudentView as sv\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class StudentRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.class_df_filtered_majors = self.config.get_class_df_filtered_majors()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.student_bp = Blueprint('student', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.register_routes()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def register_routes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self.student_bp.add_url_rule('/student/submissions', view_func=self.get_submissions, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        self.student_bp.add_url_rule('/student/tree_data', view_func=self.get_tree_data, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.class_df_filtered_majors = self.config.get_class_df_filtered_majors()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    def get_submissions(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        df = self.class_df_filtered_majors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        if df is None:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            return jsonify({\"error\": \"Failed to load submissions data.\"}), 500\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        # 获取查询参数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        student_id = request.args.get('studentID')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        title_id = request.args.get('titleID')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        limit = request.args.get('limit')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        # 过滤数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        filtered_records = df.copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        if student_id:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "                student_id = int(student_id)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "                filtered_records = filtered_records[filtered_records['student_ID'] == student_id]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "            except ValueError:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid studentID parameter.\"}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        if title_id:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "            try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "                title_id = int(title_id)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "                filtered_records = filtered_records[filtered_records['title_ID'] == title_id]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "            except ValueError:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "                return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid titleID parameter.\"}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        # 如果指定了 limit 参数，则返回指定数量的记录\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r\nfrom tools import fileSystem as fileSystem\r\nfrom tools import StudentView as sv\r\n\r\nclass StudentRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = self.config.get_class_df_filtered_majors()\r\n        self.student_bp = Blueprint('student', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.student_bp.add_url_rule('/student/submissions', view_func=self.get_submissions, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.student_bp.add_url_rule('/student/tree_data', view_func=self.get_tree_data, methods=['GET'])\r\n\r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = self.config.get_class_df_filtered_majors()\r\n    def get_submissions(self):\r\n        df = self.class_df_filtered_majors\r\n        if df is None:\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": \"Failed to load submissions data.\"}), 500\r\n\r\n        # 获取查询参数\r\n        student_id = request.args.get('studentID')\r\n        title_id = request.args.get('titleID')\r\n        limit = request.args.get('limit')\r\n\r\n        # 过滤数据\r\n        filtered_records = df.copy()\r\n        if student_id:\r\n            try:\r\n                student_id = int(student_id)\r\n                filtered_records = filtered_records[filtered_records['student_ID'] == student_id]\r\n            except ValueError:\r\n                return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid studentID parameter.\"}), 400\r\n        if title_id:\r\n            try:\r\n                title_id = int(title_id)\r\n                filtered_records = filtered_records[filtered_records['title_ID'] == title_id]\r\n            except ValueError:\r\n                return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid titleID parameter.\"}), 400",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 78
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/student_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.35852688550949097
    },

            "text": "// 获取学生视图相关数据\r"

            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "export const getStudents = (selectedIds) =\u003e {\r"

        ],

        "originalContents": "},\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n#student-view {\r\n  .title {\r\n    font-size: 20px;\r\n    font-weight: bold;\r\n    margin-left: 10px;\r\n    margin-top: 10px;\r\n    padding: 5px;\r\n    padding-top: 0;\r\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n    .filter {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      margin-right: 5px;\r\n      font-size: 17px;\r\n      font-weight: 400;\r\n    }\r\n    .filter-input {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      width: 100px;\r\n      height: 26px;\r\n      margin-right: 10px;\r\n      border: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n      border-radius: 4px;\r\n      padding: 2px;\r\n      font-size: 14px;\r\n    }\r\n    .filter{\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  .wait-prompt{\r\n    position: absolute;\r\n    top: 50%;\r\n    left: 50%;\r\n    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);;\r\n    font-size: 30px;\r\n    font-weight: bold;\r\n    color: #eee;\r\n  }\r\n  .student-panel {\r\n    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\r\n    cursor: pointer;\r\n    /*超出页面增加滚动效果*/\r\n    overflow-y: scroll;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n/deep/ .simplebar-vertical {\r\n  width: 16px;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",

StudentView,\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      \r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo']),\r\n    studentClusterInfo(){\r\n      return this.getStudentClusterInfo\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n   \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n    this.fetchClusterData()\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['fetchClusterData']),\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    \r\n  }\r\n};\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n@spacing: 4px;\r\n@total-width : 2300px + @spacing * 2;\r\n@total-height : 1250px + @spacing * 3;\r\n@panel-color: #fff;\r\n@background-color: #ccc;\r\n@border-radius: 5px;\r\n*{\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  padding: 0;\r\n  box-sizing: border-box;\r\n  gap: @spacing;\r\n}\r\n.app-container {\r\n  width: @total-width;\r\n  height: @total-height;\r\n  background-color: @background-color;\r\n  padding: 0 @spacing;\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  flex-direction: column;\r\n  align-items: center;\r\n  border-radius: 5px;\r\n}\r\n\r\n@header-height: 50px;\r\n.header{\r\n  width: @total-width;\r\n  height: @header-height;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.body {\r\n  width: @total-width;\r\n  display: flex;\r\n}\r\n\r\n@main-width: 1850px;\r\n.main{\r\n  width: @main-width;\r\n  display: flex;\r\n  flex-direction: column;\r\n  \r\n  .top\r\n  ,.bottom{\r\n    width: inherit;\r\n    height: 600px;\r\n    display: flex;\r\n    flex-direction: row;\r\n    justify-content: space-between;\r\n  }\r\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# ------------学生视图部分----------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "# 将数据转换为树状图数据结构\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "def transform_data(df, student_info):\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    # 构建树状图数据结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    root = {'name': 'Root', 'children': []}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    students = df['student_ID'].unique()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    for student in students:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        student_data = df[df['student_ID'] == student]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        # 获取major信息\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        major = student_info[student_info['student_ID'] == student]['major'].iloc[0]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        student_node = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            'name': str(student),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "            'class': student_data['class'].iloc[0],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            'major': major,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            'children': []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        titles = student_data['title_ID'].unique()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        for title in titles:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            title_data = student_data[student_data['title_ID'] == title]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            title_node = {'name': str(title), 'children': []}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            states = title_data['state'].unique()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            for state in states:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                state_data = title_data[title_data['state'] == state]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "                state_node = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "                        'name': state,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "                        'times': len(state_data),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "                        'value': int(state_data['score'].max()),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "                        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "                title_node['children'].append(state_node)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            if len(title_node['children']) \u003e 0:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "                student_node['children'].append(title_node)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        if len(student_node['children']) \u003e 0:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "            root['children'].append(student_node)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    return root"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# ------------学生视图部分----------------\r\n# 将数据转换为树状图数据结构\r\ndef transform_data(df, student_info):\r\n    # 构建树状图数据结构\r\n    root = {'name': 'Root', 'children': []}\r\n    students = df['student_ID'].unique()\r\n\r\n    for student in students:\r\n        student_data = df[df['student_ID'] == student]\r\n        # 获取major信息\r\n        major = student_info[student_info['student_ID'] == student]['major'].iloc[0]\r\n        \r\n        student_node = {\r\n            'name': str(student),\r\n            'class': student_data['class'].iloc[0],\r\n            'major': major,\r\n            'children': []\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        titles = student_data['title_ID'].unique()\r\n        \r\n        for title in titles:\r\n            title_data = student_data[student_data['title_ID'] == title]\r\n            \r\n            title_node = {'name': str(title), 'children': []}\r\n            \r\n            states = title_data['state'].unique()\r\n            \r\n            for state in states:\r\n                state_data = title_data[title_data['state'] == state]\r\n                state_node = {\r\n                        'name': state,\r\n                        'times': len(state_data),\r\n                        'value': int(state_data['score'].max()),\r\n                        }\r\n                \r\n                title_node['children'].append(state_node)\r\n            \r\n            if len(title_node['children']) \u003e 0:\r\n                student_node['children'].append(title_node)\r\n        \r\n        if len(student_node['children']) \u003e 0:\r\n            root['children'].append(student_node)\r\n    \r\n    return root",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 15,
            "line": 44
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/StudentView.py"
      },
      "score": 0.33181560039520264
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "    handleScroll() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,

          {

          },

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    handleScroll() {\r\n      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r\n      const scrollPosition = container.scrollTop\r\n      const containerHeight = container.clientHeight\r\n      // const totalHeight = container.scrollHeight\r\n\r\n      const panelHeight = 100 // 假设每个面板的高度为80px，可以根据实际情况调整\r\n\r\n      const startIdx = Math.floor(scrollPosition / panelHeight)\r\n      const endIdx = Math.ceil((scrollPosition + containerHeight) / panelHeight)\r\n\r\n      for (let i = startIdx; i \u003c= endIdx \u0026\u0026 i \u003c this.filteredTreeData.length; i++) {\r\n        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    togglePanelHeight(element, index) {\r\n      const targetHeight = this.expandedIndices.has(index) ? 80 : this.PanelsHeight[index]\r\n      element\r\n        .transition()\r\n        .duration(400)  // 动画时长 300ms\r\n        .attr(\"height\", targetHeight)\r\n      \r\n      if (this.expandedIndices.has(index)) {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.delete(index)\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.add(index)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    applyFilter() {\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      if(render){\r\n        await this.getTreeData(this.getSelectedIds) // 初始化时获取学生数据\r\n        this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  ",

            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"portrait-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003ePortrait View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"vis-container\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"vis-panel\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization0\" ref=\"visualization0\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization1\" ref=\"visualization1\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization2\" ref=\"visualization2\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-bar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-radar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-legend\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters, mapActions } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterStudents } from '@/api/PortraitView'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'PortraitView',\r\n  components:{\r\n    LoadingSpinner,\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      PortraitData: {},\r\n      arc: null,\r\n      radarLine: null,\r\n      ourGroup: [null, null, null],\r\n      hadRender: [false, false, false],\r\n      radar_dimension: [\r\n          'Error-Free Bonus', \r\n          'Test-Free Bonus',\r\n          'Score',\r\n          'Explore', \r\n          'Mem Bonus', \r\n          'TC Bonus', \r\n          'Rank',\r\n          'Enthusiasm', \r\n        ] //便于控制指标渲染顺序\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  created() {\r\n    this.hadRender = [false, false, false]\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    await this.getPortraitData()\r\n    this.initialChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getSelectedData', 'getColors']),\r\n  },\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "import LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  name: 'WeekView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  components: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    Simplebar,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    LoadingSpinner\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  data() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "      debugger: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      loading: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "      isWaiting: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      WeekData: [],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      PeakData:[],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      selectedKind: '',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      showPeakView: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      selectedDay: 5\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    filteredWeekData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    filteredPeakData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  async created() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "  methods: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      this.WeekData = data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      this.renderWeekData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "      this.PeakData = data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "      this.renderPeakData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    renderWeekData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "      const height = 600\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "      const width = 1000\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      const stu_icon = 40\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "      // 定义维度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'WeekView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      WeekData: [],\r\n      PeakData:[],\r\n      selectedKind: '',\r\n      showPeakView: false,\r\n      selectedDay: 5\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredWeekData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r\n      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    },\r\n    filteredPeakData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r\n      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r\n      this.WeekData = data\r\n      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r\n      this.renderWeekData()\r\n    },\r\n    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r\n      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r\n      this.PeakData = data\r\n      this.renderPeakData()\r\n    },\r\n    renderWeekData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 600\r\n      const width = 1000\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r\n      const stu_icon = 40\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r\n\r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r\n\r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 102
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 39
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/WeekView.vue"

      "score": 0.28679776191711426

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "所以在平行线图中，可以这样理解：x轴代表的是不同属性，y轴代表的是数值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "在本视图中，共有8个属性---------因此需要渲染8个“y轴”，“x轴”需要定义（为了确定每个Y轴的放置位置）但是无需渲染\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/ParallelViewSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 50%;\" /\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "### 1.2 scatter graph - PCA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "散点图\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "每个属性具有8个指标，所以想要在二维平面可视化，就要对数据进行降维，常见的方法有==PCA、t-SNE，PCA==处理在后端使用sklearn处理，变为两个指标即可，这里数据结构为：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "~~~json\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "{\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    \"student_id\": xxx,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    \"cluster\": x,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    \"transform\": {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        \"x\": xxx,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        \"y\": xxx\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "~~~\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "接下来就是常规的渲染步骤\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "## 2. PortraitView\r"

        "originalContents": "所以在平行线图中，可以这样理解：x轴代表的是不同属性，y轴代表的是数值\r\n\r\n在本视图中，共有8个属性---------因此需要渲染8个“y轴”，“x轴”需要定义（为了确定每个Y轴的放置位置）但是无需渲染\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/ParallelViewSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 50%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n### 1.2 scatter graph - PCA\r\n\r\n散点图\r\n\r\n每个属性具有8个指标，所以想要在二维平面可视化，就要对数据进行降维，常见的方法有==PCA、t-SNE，PCA==处理在后端使用sklearn处理，变为两个指标即可，这里数据结构为：\r\n\r\n~~~json\r\n{\r\n    \"student_id\": xxx,\r\n    \"cluster\": x,\r\n    \"transform\": {\r\n        \"x\": xxx,\r\n        \"y\": xxx\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n~~~\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n接下来就是常规的渲染步骤\r\n\r\n## 2. PortraitView\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/PortraitViewSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 50%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n### 2.1 relative axis and labels\r\n\r\n这里的虚线坐标轴本质是圆圈、直线\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/PortraitViewLabel.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 67%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n### 2.2 circular barplot\r\n\r\n旭日图/环形柱状图\r\n\r\n### 2.3 radar/spider plot\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/RadarSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 50%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n雷达图\r\n\r\n### 2.4 radialGradient\r\n\r\n径向渐变渲染\r\n\r\n## 3. StudentView\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/StudentViewSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 67%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n### 3.1 view pannel\r\n\r\n视图框\r\n\r\n### 3.2 tree diragram\r\n\r\n树状图\r\n\r\n## 4. QuestionView\r\n\r\n### ~~view pannel~~\r\n\r\n与StudentView的view pannel思路别无二致，不再赘述\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/D3_study/QuestionViewSample.png\" alt=\"image-20250222165644840\" style=\"zoom: 67%;\" /\u003e\r\n\r\n### 4.1 area chart\r\n\r\n填充图-折线图\r\n\r\n### 4.2 horizontal stacked bar\r\n\r\n水平堆栈图\r\n\r\n### 4.3 candy chart\r\n\r\n棒棒糖图\r\n\r\n## 5. WeekView\r\n\r\n### ~~circular barplot~~\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n      let nowBoxStartPosition = 0\r\n      for(let k = 0; k \u003c labelContent.length; k++) {\r\n        let textElement = sg.append('text') // 添加学生标签\r\n          .attr('x', padding.left + nowBoxStartPosition)\r\n          .attr('y', padding.top)\r\n          .text(s[labelContent[k]])\r\n          .attr('font-size', '12px')\r\n          .attr('font-weight', '600')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'start')\r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r\n        nowBoxStartPosition += (Bbox.width  + labelMargin + labelPadding * 2) // 更新下一个标签的起始位置\r\n        // console.log('nowBoxStartPosition', nowBoxStartPosition)\r\n        // 添加背景矩形\r\n        sg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      for(let t = 0; t \u003c tipContent.length; t++){\r\n        sg.append('text') // 添加tip标签\r\n          .attr('x', padding.left + tipBlockWidth * t)\r\n          .attr('y', padding.top + studentTitleHeight)\r\n          .text(tipContent[t])\r\n          .attr('font-size', '17px')\r\n          .attr('font-weight', '300')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'start')\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const Questions = s.children // 获取学生的问题\r\n      this.renderQuestions(sg, Questions, index) // 渲染问题\r\n\r\n      this.visibleIndices.add(index) // 标记为已加载\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    loadInitialBatch() {\r\n      for (let i = 0; i \u003c Math.min(this.batchSize, this.filteredTreeData.length); i++) {\r\n        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n",

            "text": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r"

          },

        "originalContents": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterEveryone } from '@/api/ParallelView.js'\r\nimport { getSelectedData } from '@/api/NavHeader.js'\r\n\r\n\r\nexport default createStore({\r\n  state: {\r\n    configLoaded: 0,    // 表示后端配置是否加载完成\r\n    studentClusterInfo: {}, // 存储从后端获取的聚类数据,key:stu_id,value:cluster\r\n    selectedStudentIds: [], // 存储选中的学生 ID ，从前端交互而来\r\n    selectedStudentData: [], // 对应的学生各项指标数据，需要从后端获取\r\n    colors: ['#ff7f00', '#377eb8', '#4daf4a'],\r\n  },\r\n  mutations: {\r\n    // 更新 configLoaded 状态\r\n    SET_CONFIG_LOADED(state, value) {\r\n      state.configLoaded = value;\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置 studentClusterInfo\r\n    setStudentClusterInfo(state, data) {\r\n      state.studentClusterInfo = data\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 切换学生 ID 的选中状态（添加或移除）\r\n    setSelectedStudents(state, student_ids){\r\n      state.selectedStudentIds = student_ids\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置selectedStudentData\r\n    setSelectedStudentData(state, students_data){\r\n      state.selectedStudentData = students_data\r\n    },\r\n  },",
        "range": {

          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'WeekView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      WeekData: [],\r\n      PeakData:[],\r\n      selectedKind: '',\r\n      showPeakView: false,\r\n      selectedDay: 5\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredWeekData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r\n      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    },\r\n    filteredPeakData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r\n      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r\n      this.WeekData = data\r\n      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r\n      this.renderWeekData()\r\n    },\r\n    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r\n      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r\n      this.PeakData = data\r\n      this.renderPeakData()\r\n    },\r\n    renderWeekData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 600\r\n      const width = 1000\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r\n      const stu_icon = 40\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r\n\r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r\n\r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 102
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 39
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/WeekView.vue"

            "text": "      \r"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "          rg.append(\"line\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "            .attr(\"x1\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "            .attr(\"y1\", firstHalfHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "            .attr(\"x2\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "            .attr(\"y2\", secondHalfHeight)\r"
          },
          {

          {

            "text": "            .attr(\"stroke\", \"#fff\");\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "        }); // w\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "      }); // s\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    transformScores(scores) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "    updateKind() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "      if (this.showPeakView) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "      this.renderPeakData();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "      } else {\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499,
            "text": "    },\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 500,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501,
            "text": "      this.loading = true\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r"

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "      if (render) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "        if (this.showPeakView) {\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r"

            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      this.loading = false\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,
            "text": "  watch: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "    configLoaded(newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "      if (!newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "        return\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": "      this.isWaiting = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "    showPeakView() {\r"
          },
          {

          {

            "text": "      this.loadData()\r"

          {

            "text": "\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "#week-view {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "  .title {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n          // 连接线\r\n          rg.append(\"line\")\r\n            .attr(\"x1\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y1\", firstHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"x2\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y2\", secondHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke-width\", 1)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke\", \"#fff\");\r\n        }); // w\r\n      }); // s\r\n    },\r\n    transformScores(scores) {\r\n      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r\n    },\r\n    updateKind() {\r\n      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n      this.renderPeakData();\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.renderWeekData();\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.WeekData = []\r\n      this.PeakData = []\r\n      if (render) {\r\n        if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r\n        } else {\r\n          await this.getWeekData(this.getSelectedIds);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    },\r\n    // 监听 switch 变化，重新加载数据并渲染\r\n    showPeakView() {\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData()\r\n    },\r\n    selectedDay() {\r\n      if(this.showPeakView){\r\n        this.isWaiting = false;\r\n        this.loadData();\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 549
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 10,

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/WeekView.vue"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "      // 定义缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "      // 计算每个周的宽度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "          rg.append('rect')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        // 绘制每个周的标签\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        rg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "          .attr('y', 0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "          .attr('font-size', 14)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "      const radius = width / 24\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "      const outerRadius = radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      // 定义角度缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        .domain(knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      // 定义半径缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n      const g = svg.append('g')\r\n\r\n      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n      // 定义缩放尺\r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r\n\r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r\n\r\n      // 计算每个周的宽度\r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r\n\r\n      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r\n      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r\n        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r\n          rg.append('rect')\r\n            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r\n            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r\n            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r\n            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 绘制每个周的标签\r\n        rg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r\n          .attr('y', 0)\r\n          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .attr('font-size', 14)\r\n          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r\n      const radius = width / 24\r\n      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r\n      const outerRadius = radius\r\n      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r\n\r\n      // 定义角度缩放尺\r\n      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(knowledge)\r\n        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r\n        .align(0)\r\n",
