    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv id=\"week-view\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cspan\u003eWeek View\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"view-mode-switch\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        \u003cspan class=\"mode-label\"\u003eMode: {{showPeakView ? 'p' : 'r'}}\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        \u003clabel class=\"switch\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "          \u003cinput type=\"checkbox\" class=\"switch-input\" v-model=\"showPeakView\" /\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "          \u003cspan class=\"slider round\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        \u003c/label\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      \u003cselect class=\"kind-select\" v-model=\"selectedKind\" @change=\"updateKind\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eAll Kinds\u003c/option\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        \u003coption v-for=\"i in 3\" :key=\"i\" :value=\"i\"\u003e{{ i - 1 }}\u003c/option\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "      \u003c/select\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "      \u003cselect \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        v-model=\"selectedDay\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        @change=\"loadData\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        :disabled=\"!showPeakView\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        class=\"day-select\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        title=\"Only available in Peak View mode\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      \u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        \u003coption v-for=\"day in 7\" :key=\"day\" :value=\"day\"\u003eDay {{ day }}\u003c/option\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      \u003c/select\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"limit\"\u003ekind:\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 550px; width: 98%\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=loading /\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"wait-prompt\"  v-if=\"isWaiting\"\u003eWaiting for brush :) ...\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationW\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\u003c/template\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "import { getWeeks, getPeaks } from '@/api/WeekView'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "import { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "import Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "import 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "import LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  name: 'WeekView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  components: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    Simplebar,\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"week-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003eWeek View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"view-mode-switch\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cspan class=\"mode-label\"\u003eMode: {{showPeakView ? 'p' : 'r'}}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003clabel class=\"switch\"\u003e\r\n          \u003cinput type=\"checkbox\" class=\"switch-input\" v-model=\"showPeakView\" /\u003e\r\n          \u003cspan class=\"slider round\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/label\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cselect class=\"kind-select\" v-model=\"selectedKind\" @change=\"updateKind\"\u003e\r\n        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eAll Kinds\u003c/option\u003e\r\n        \u003coption v-for=\"i in 3\" :key=\"i\" :value=\"i\"\u003e{{ i - 1 }}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n      \u003c/select\u003e\r\n      \u003cselect \r\n        v-model=\"selectedDay\" \r\n        @change=\"loadData\"\r\n        :disabled=\"!showPeakView\"\r\n        class=\"day-select\"\r\n        title=\"Only available in Peak View mode\"\r\n      \u003e\r\n        \u003coption v-for=\"day in 7\" :key=\"day\" :value=\"day\"\u003eDay {{ day }}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n      \u003c/select\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"limit\"\u003ekind:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 550px; width: 98%\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=loading /\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"wait-prompt\"  v-if=\"isWaiting\"\u003eWaiting for brush :) ...\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationW\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getWeeks, getPeaks } from '@/api/WeekView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\n",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    renderPeakData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "      const height = 600;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "      const width = 1000;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "      const stu_icon = 40;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "      // 定义维度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "      );\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "      // 添加 tooltip\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "      const tooltip = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "}) // forEach.s\r\n    },\r\n    renderPeakData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3;\r\n      const height = 600;\r\n      const width = 1000;\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r\n      const stu_icon = 40;\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r\n    \r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r\n        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r\n      );\r\n    \r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r\n    \r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r\n      const g = svg.append('g');\r\n    \r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n    \r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r\n    \r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r\n    \r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r\n    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "def calculate_week_of_year(timestamp, start_date=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    delta = (timestamp - start_timestamp).days // 7\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    return delta\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    将提供的数据转换为适合前端可视化的格式。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    参数:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    - data (dict): 包含学生ID及其知识点分数的数据字典。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    - e.g. data = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    '01d8aa21ef476b66c573': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    返回:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    - dict: 转换后的数据字典，适合JSON序列化。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    - e.g.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    \"students\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            \"id\": \"01d8aa21ef476b66c573\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "                {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "                    \"week\": 36,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "                    \"scores\": {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "                        \"r8S3g\": 0.0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "                        \"t5V9e\": 0.0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "                        ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "                    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "                },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "                ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    students = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    for student_id, weekly_scores in data.items():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        weeks = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        # 遍历每个学生的所有周数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        for week_number in range(min([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]), max([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]) + 1):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "            scores = {kp: weekly_scores.get((week_number, kp), 0.0) for kp in set(kp for _, kp in weekly_scores.keys())}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            weeks.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "                \"week\": week_number,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "                \"scores\": scores\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        students.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            \"id\": student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    # 获取\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    return {\"students\": students}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "def calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    将提供的数据转换为适合前端可视化的格式。\r\n    \r\n    参数:\r\n    - data (dict): 包含学生ID及其知识点分数的数据字典。\r\n    - e.g. data = {\r\n    '01d8aa21ef476b66c573': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    ...\r\n}\r\n    \r\n    返回:\r\n    - dict: 转换后的数据字典，适合JSON序列化。\r\n    - e.g.\r\n    {\r\n    \"students\": [\r\n        {\r\n            \"id\": \"01d8aa21ef476b66c573\",\r\n            \"weeks\": [\r\n                {\r\n                    \"week\": 36,\r\n                    \"scores\": {\r\n                        \"r8S3g\": 0.0,\r\n                        \"t5V9e\": 0.0,\r\n                        ...\r\n                    }\r\n                },\r\n                ...\r\n            ]\r\n        },\r\n        ...\r\n    ]\r\n}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    students = []\r\n    \r\n    for student_id, weekly_scores in data.items():\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        \r\n        # 遍历每个学生的所有周数据\r\n        for week_number in range(min([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]), max([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]) + 1):\r\n            scores = {kp: weekly_scores.get((week_number, kp), 0.0) for kp in set(kp for _, kp in weekly_scores.keys())}\r\n            \r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_number,\r\n                \"scores\": scores\r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        students.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    \r\n    # 获取\r\n    return {\"students\": students}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/WeekView.py"
      },
      "score": 0.46453121304512024
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": ".domain(knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      // 定义半径缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        .domain([0, 1])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        .range([innerRadius, outerRadius])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "      // 定义曲线生成器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      const arc = d3.arc()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        .innerRadius(innerRadius)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        .outerRadius(d =\u003e radiusY(d.value))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        .startAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        .endAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge) + angleX.bandwidth())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        .padAngle(0.05)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        .padRadius(innerRadius)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      const colors = this.getColors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "       filteredWeekData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        const student_id = s.id\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        const student_weeks = s.weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        // console.log(kind)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "        const student_color = colors[kind]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        // 定义legend组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "        const lg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "        // 渲染学生名称\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "        const labelPadding = 5 // 背景矩形的内边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "          .style('font-size', '14px')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "          .text(student_id.slice(-5))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "        // 添加背景矩形\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "          "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 定义半径缩放尺\r\n      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, 1])\r\n        .range([innerRadius, outerRadius])\r\n\r\n      // 定义曲线生成器\r\n      const arc = d3.arc()\r\n        .innerRadius(innerRadius)\r\n        .outerRadius(d =\u003e radiusY(d.value))\r\n        .startAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge))\r\n        .endAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge) + angleX.bandwidth())\r\n        .padAngle(0.05)\r\n        .padRadius(innerRadius)\r\n      const colors = this.getColors\r\n      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo\r\n       filteredWeekData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id]\r\n        // console.log(kind)\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind]\r\n\r\n        // 定义legend组\r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生名称\r\n        const labelPadding = 5 // 背景矩形的内边距\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5))\r\n\r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 10,
            "line": 195
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 8,

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    # 获取\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    return {\"students\": students}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "def calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    df = df.copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    # 计算周数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    # 判断时间段\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        columns='period',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        values='count',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        fill_value=0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        aggfunc='sum'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    result_list = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "        weeks = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "            weeks.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "                \"week\": week_num,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        result_list.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "            \"id\": student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    return {\"peaks\": result_list}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r\n    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r\n    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r\n    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df = df.copy()\r\n    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r\n    start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n\r\n    # 计算周数\r\n    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n\r\n    # 判断时间段\r\n    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r\n    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r\n\r\n    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r\n    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r\n    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r\n    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r\n        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r\n        columns='period',\r\n        values='count',\r\n        fill_value=0,\r\n        aggfunc='sum'\r\n    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r\n    \r\n    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r\n     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r\n    result_list = []\r\n    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r\n            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_num,\r\n                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r\n                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r\n            })\r\n        result_list.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    return {\"peaks\": result_list}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 33,
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 20
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/WeekView.py"
      },

        "originalContents": "\r\n        // 添加背景矩形\r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生头像\r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png'\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar)\r\n\r\n        // 对每一周\r\n        student_weeks.forEach(w =\u003e {\r\n          const position = &#96;translate(${weekX(w.week) + weekWidth}, ${studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2})&#96;\r\n          const radarChartG = rg.append('g')\r\n            .attr('class', 'radar')\r\n            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制柱状图\r\n          radarChartG.selectAll('.radar')\r\n            .data(this.transformScores(w.scores))\r\n            .enter()\r\n            .append('g')\r\n            .append(\"path\")\r\n            .attr('fill', &#96;${student_color}&#96;)\r\n            .attr('d', arc)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制标签圆\r\n          const labelOuterRadius = innerRadius\r\n          const labelInnerRadius = 0.7 * labelOuterRadius\r\n          const innerCircleRadius = 0.8 * labelInnerRadius\r\n          const labelArc = d3.arc()\r\n            .innerRadius(d =\u003e d.r1)\r\n            .outerRadius(d =\u003e d.r2)\r\n            .startAngle(0)\r\n            .endAngle(Math.PI * 2)\r\n",

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 添加 tooltip\r\n      const tooltip = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\r\n        .attr(\"class\", \"tooltip\")\r\n        .style(\"position\", \"absolute\")\r\n        .style(\"text-align\", \"center\")\r\n        .style(\"padding\", \"4px\")\r\n        .style(\"background\", \"#fff\")\r\n        .style(\"border\", \"0px\")\r\n        .style(\"border-radius\", \"8px\")\r\n        .style(\"pointer-events\", \"none\")\r\n        .style(\"font-size\", \"12px\")\r\n        .style(\"opacity\", 0);\r\n    \r\n      // 区分x轴奇数列\r\n      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r\n        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r\n          rg.append('rect')\r\n            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r\n            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5')\r\n            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r\n            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r\n        }\r\n      \r\n        rg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r\n          .attr('y', 0)\r\n          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .attr('font-size', 14)\r\n          .attr('font-weight', 'bold');\r\n      }\r\n    \r\n      const colors = this.getColors;\r\n      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo;\r\n    ",

            "lineNumber": 4,

            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r"
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"

            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def register_routes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,

            "lineNumber": 22,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,

          },

            "lineNumber": 32,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,

            "text": "        return jsonify(result)\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        student_ids"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r\nfrom tools import WeekView as wv\r\nfrom tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\n\r\nclass WeekRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n    \r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        \r\n    def week_analysis(self):\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n\r\n        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n        if student_ids:\r\n            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r\n            \r\n        start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r\n        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r\n\r\n        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r\n        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r\n        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r\n\r\n        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r\n        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r\n        return jsonify(result)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/week_routes.py"
      },

    },

        "originalContents": "\r\n      filteredPeakData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id;\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks;\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id];\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind];\r\n      \r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n      \r\n        const labelPadding = 5;\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5));\r\n      \r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox();\r\n      \r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child')\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0');\r\n      \r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png';\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar);\r\n      \r\n        const peaKHeight = 25;\r\n        const peakWidth = weekWidth / 2;\r\n      \r\n        const positionYBase = studentsY(i) + 4 * studentsY.bandwidth() / 5;\r\n      ",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        const yScale = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n          .domain([0, 30])\r\n          .range([positionYBase, positionYBase - peaKHeight]);\r\n      \r\n        student_weeks.forEach(w =\u003e {\r\n          const positionX = weekX(w.week) + weekWidth - weekWidth / 4;\r\n          const positionY = positionYBase;\r\n        \r\n          const firstHalfHeight = yScale(w.Mon_to_Day);\r\n          const secondHalfHeight = yScale(w.after_Day_to_Sun);\r\n        \r\n          const defs = svg.append(\"defs\");\r\n        \r\n          const grad1 = defs.append(\"linearGradient\")\r\n            .attr(\"id\", &#96;grad1-${s.id}-week${w.week}&#96;)\r\n            .attr(\"x1\", \"0%\")\r\n            .attr(\"y1\", \"0%\")\r\n            .attr(\"x2\", \"0%\")\r\n            .attr(\"y2\", \"100%\");\r\n          grad1.append(\"stop\")\r\n            .attr(\"offset\", \"0%\")\r\n            .attr(\"style\", &#96;stop-color:${student_color};stop-opacity:1&#96;);\r\n          grad1.append(\"stop\")\r\n            .attr(\"offset\", \"100%\")\r\n            .attr(\"style\", \"stop-color:#fff;stop-opacity:1\");\r\n      // 前半周三角形\r\n      // const frontTriangle = \r\n      ",

          {

            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "      const width = 655\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 30, right: 5, bottom: 20, left: 5 }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "      const padding = 20\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      const innerWidth = width - margin.left - margin.right - padding\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "      const timelineHeight = 50\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "      const distributionHeight = 20\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "      const QuestionTitleHeight = 28\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "      const QuestionPanelHeight = QuestionTitleHeight + timelineHeight + distributionHeight + padding * 5\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      const filteredData = this.QuestionData.filter(q =\u003e this.selectedKnowledge[q.knowledge])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      // console.log('Filtered Data:', filteredData)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "      // 困难度排序\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "      if (this.sortAscending) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        filteredData.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "          const diffA = (a.avg_score / a.sum_submit) \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "          const diffB = (b.avg_score / b.sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "          return diffA - diffB\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "      } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "        filteredData.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          const diffA = (a.avg_score / a.sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "          const diffB = (b.avg_score / b.sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "          return diffB - diffA\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "      }      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "      // 获取可视化目标容器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "      const main = d3.select('#visualizationQ')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 188,

        "originalContents": "},\r\n    // 渲染题目视图数据\r\n    renderQuestion() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const width = 655\r\n      const margin = { top: 30, right: 5, bottom: 20, left: 5 }\r\n      const padding = 20\r\n      const innerWidth = width - margin.left - margin.right - padding\r\n      const timelineHeight = 50\r\n      const distributionHeight = 20\r\n      const QuestionTitleHeight = 28\r\n      const QuestionPanelHeight = QuestionTitleHeight + timelineHeight + distributionHeight + padding * 5\r\n      const filteredData = this.QuestionData.filter(q =\u003e this.selectedKnowledge[q.knowledge])\r\n      // console.log('Filtered Data:', filteredData)\r\n      // 困难度排序\r\n      if (this.sortAscending) {\r\n        filteredData.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\r\n          const diffA = (a.avg_score / a.sum_submit) \r\n          const diffB = (b.avg_score / b.sum_submit)\r\n          return diffA - diffB\r\n        })\r\n      } else {\r\n        filteredData.sort((a, b) =\u003e {\r\n          const diffA = (a.avg_score / a.sum_submit)\r\n          const diffB = (b.avg_score / b.sum_submit)\r\n          return diffB - diffA\r\n        })\r\n      }      \r\n      // 获取可视化目标容器\r\n      const main = d3.select('#visualizationQ')\r\n\r\n      // 给容器添加组\r\n      const g = main.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${margin.top})&#96;)\r\n\r\n      // 添加题目容器\r\n      // 添加题目容器\r\n      const questionPanel = g.selectAll('.question-panel')\r\n      .data(filteredData)\r\n      .enter()\r\n      .append('svg')\r\n      .attr('width', width)\r\n      .attr('height', QuestionPanelHeight)\r\n      .style('box-shadow', '0px 0px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)')\r\n      .append('g')\r\n      .attr('transform',&#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${0})&#96;)\r\n      .attr('class', 'question-panel')\r\n      .attr('height', QuestionPanelHeight)\r\n      .attr('width', width)\r\n\r\n      const qg = questionPanel.append('g')\r\n",

            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 64,

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "import { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "import { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "import Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "import { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "import LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  name: 'QuestionView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  components: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    Simplebar,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    Dropdown,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    DropdownContent,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    LoadingSpinner\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "  data() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      debugger: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      loading: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      QuestionData: [],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "      selectedKnowledge: {},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      difficultyIndex: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "      submissionMin: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      submissionMax: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "      scoreMin: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "      scoreMax: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  async mounted() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    this.getQuestionData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters([]),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    displayButton() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      else return 'None'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  methods: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    async getQuestionData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      // 获取问题数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "      // 获取唯一的 knowledge 类别\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter\"\u003eKnowledge:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 555px\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationQ\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\"/\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'QuestionView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    Dropdown,\r\n    DropdownContent,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      QuestionData: [],\r\n      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r\n      selectedKnowledge: {},\r\n      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r\n      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r\n      difficultyIndex: null,\r\n      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r\n      submissionMin: null,\r\n      submissionMax: null,\r\n      scoreMin: null,\r\n      scoreMax: null,\r\n    };\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    this.getQuestionData()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters([]),\r\n    displayButton() {\r\n      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r\n      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r\n      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r\n      else return 'None'\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getQuestionData() {\r\n      // 获取问题数据\r\n      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r\n      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r\n      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"question-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003eQuestion View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n      \u003c!-- 困难度排序按钮 --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"filter difficulty\" @click=\"toggleSortOrder\"\u003eDifficulty Order:{{ this.sortAscending ? \" ↑\" : \" ↓\" }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c!-- 下拉菜单筛选知识点 --\u003e\r\n\r\n      \u003cDropdown\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- trigger element --\u003e\r\n        \u003ctemplate #trigger\u003e\r\n          \u003cbutton type=\"button\" style=\"font-weight: bold\"\u003e\r\n            {{ displayButton }}\r\n          \u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003c/template\u003e\r\n        \u003cDropdownContent\u003e\r\n          \u003c!-- contents display in dropdown --\u003e\r\n          \u003cform id=\"checkboxs\" name=\"myForm\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"selectK\" v-for=\"(item, index) in uniqueKnowledge\" :key=\"index\" style=\"border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px\"\u003e\r\n              \u003cinput \r\n              type=\"checkbox\"\r\n              :name=\"item\"\r\n              v-model=\"selectedKnowledge[item]\"\r\n              @change=\"handleKnowledgeCheck\"\r\n              /\u003e\r\n              \u003clabel\r\n              style=\"list-style: none;\r\n              width: 80px;\r\n              border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n              margin-top: 5px;\r\n              padding-bottom: 8px;\r\n              text-align: center;\"\r\n              \u003e\r\n              {{ item }}\r\n            \u003c/label\u003e\r\n          \u003c/div\u003e\r\n          \r\n          \u003cdiv class=\"all\" style=\"border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n            name=\"all\"\r\n            type=\"checkbox\"\r\n            class=\"knowledge-list\"\r\n            v-model=\"selectAllKnowledge\"\r\n            @change=\"handleSelectAllKnowledge\"\r\n            /\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel \r\n            for=\"all\"\r\n            style=\"list-style: none;\r\n            width: 80px;\r\n            border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n            margin-top: 5px;\r\n            padding-bottom: 8px;\r\n            text-align: center;\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            All\r\n          \u003c/label\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n          \u003c/form\u003e\r\n        \u003c/DropdownContent\u003e\r\n      \u003c/Dropdown\u003e\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 61

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "            tooltip.style('visibility', 'hidden')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "          })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "      })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "    handleKnowledgeCheck() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "      this.selectAllKnowledge = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).every(Boolean)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540,
            "text": "      // 重新渲染图表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "      this.renderQuestion()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "    handleSelectAllKnowledge() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544,
            "text": "      Object.keys(this.selectedKnowledge).forEach(key =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "        this.selectedKnowledge[key] = this.selectAllKnowledge\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "      })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "      // 重新渲染图表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "      this.renderQuestion()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "    toggleSortOrder() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 553,
            "text": "      this.sortAscending = !this.sortAscending\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 554,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 555,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 556,
            "text": "      // 重新渲染图表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557,
            "text": "      this.renderQuestion()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 558,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 559,
            "text": "    async loadData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 560,
            "text": "      this.loading = true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 561,
            "text": "      this.$d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562,
            "text": "      await this.getQuestionData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 563,
            "text": "      this.loading = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 564,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 565,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 566,
            "text": "  watch: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 567,
            "text": "    configLoaded(newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568,
            "text": "      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 569,
            "text": "        // 重新加载逻辑\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570,
            "text": "        this.loadData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 571,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 573,
            "text": "  }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 574,

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 615,

            "lineNumber": 616,

          },

            "lineNumber": 617,

          {
            "lineNumber": 618,
