            "lineNumber": 619,
            "text": "  "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "})\r\n    },\r\n    handleKnowledgeCheck() {\r\n      this.selectAllKnowledge = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).every(Boolean)\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      // 重新渲染图表\r\n      this.renderQuestion()\r\n    },\r\n    handleSelectAllKnowledge() {\r\n      Object.keys(this.selectedKnowledge).forEach(key =\u003e {\r\n        this.selectedKnowledge[key] = this.selectAllKnowledge\r\n      })\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      // 重新渲染图表\r\n      this.renderQuestion()\r\n    },\r\n    toggleSortOrder() {\r\n      this.sortAscending = !this.sortAscending\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      // 重新渲染图表\r\n      this.renderQuestion()\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData() {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationQ').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      await this.getQuestionData()\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData()\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n  }\r\n};\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n#question-view {\r\n  margin-left: 5px;\r\n  .title {\r\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; \r\n    width: 100%;\r\n    padding-left: 20px;\r\n    padding-top: 10px;\r\n    padding-bottom: 5px;\r\n    margin-bottom: 5px;\r\n    span{\r\n      font-size: 20px;\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n    }\r\n    .filter {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      cursor: pointer;\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n      font-size: 18px;\r\n      padding-right: 10px;\r\n    }\r\n    .difficulty{\r\n      margin-left: 20px;\r\n      padding-right: 30px;\r\n    }\r\n    .dd-trigger {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      button {\r\n        border: 0;\r\n        margin-top: 5px;\r\n        margin-right: 5px;\r\n        background-color: #fff;\r\n        padding: 0;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n}\r\n.highlight {\r\n  color: #3b82f6;\r\n}\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 618
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 531
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/QuestionView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.41620755195617676
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "      // 获取唯一的 knowledge 类别\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "      this.uniqueKnowledge = [...new Set(this.QuestionData.map(q =\u003e q.knowledge))]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "      // 初始化 selectedKnowledge 对象\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "      this.selectedKnowledge = {}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "      this.uniqueKnowledge.forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        this.selectedKnowledge[knowledge] = true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "      })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "      // 计算归一化所需的 min/max 值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "      this.submissionMin = d3.min(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "      this.submissionMax = d3.max(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "      this.scoreMin = d3.min(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.avg_score)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "      this.scoreMax = d3.max(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.avg_score)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "      this.difficultyIndex = (dd) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "          // 标准化 submissions（越大表示越简单）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "          const submissionNorm =\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "            (dd.sum_submit - this.submissionMin) / (this.submissionMax - this.submissionMin);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "          // 标准化 avg_score（取反后，分数越低则难度越高）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "          const scoreNorm =\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "            1 - (dd.avg_score - this.scoreMin) / (this.scoreMax - this.scoreMin);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "          // 等权重加权\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "          const w1 = 0.5;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "          const w2 = 0.5;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "          return w1 * submissionNorm + w2 * scoreNorm; // 范围 [0, 1]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      this.renderQuestion()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "    // 渲染题目视图数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "    renderQuestion() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "      "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 获取唯一的 knowledge 类别\r\n      this.uniqueKnowledge = [...new Set(this.QuestionData.map(q =\u003e q.knowledge))]\r\n      \r\n      // 初始化 selectedKnowledge 对象\r\n      this.selectedKnowledge = {}\r\n      this.uniqueKnowledge.forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r\n        this.selectedKnowledge[knowledge] = true\r\n      })\r\n\r\n      // 计算归一化所需的 min/max 值\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      this.submissionMin = d3.min(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.sum_submit)\r\n      this.submissionMax = d3.max(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.sum_submit)\r\n      this.scoreMin = d3.min(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.avg_score)\r\n      this.scoreMax = d3.max(this.QuestionData, d =\u003e d.avg_score)\r\n      this.difficultyIndex = (dd) =\u003e {\r\n          // 标准化 submissions（越大表示越简单）\r\n          const submissionNorm =\r\n            (dd.sum_submit - this.submissionMin) / (this.submissionMax - this.submissionMin);\r\n\r\n          // 标准化 avg_score（取反后，分数越低则难度越高）\r\n          const scoreNorm =\r\n            1 - (dd.avg_score - this.scoreMin) / (this.scoreMax - this.scoreMin);\r\n\r\n          // 等权重加权\r\n          const w1 = 0.5;\r\n          const w2 = 0.5;\r\n\r\n          return w1 * submissionNorm + w2 * scoreNorm; // 范围 [0, 1]\r\n        }\r\n      this.renderQuestion()\r\n    ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 159
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 123
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/QuestionView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.3993494510650635
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "      .attr('width', width)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "      const qg = questionPanel.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "      // 绘制题目标签\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "      const labelPadding = 4\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "      const labelMargin = 10\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "      const labelContent = ['title_id', 'knowledge'] // 标签内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "      let nowBoxStartPosition = 0\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "      for(let k = 0; k \u003c labelContent.length; k++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "        let textElement = qg.append('text') // 添加学生标签\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "          .attr('x', nowBoxStartPosition)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "          .attr('y', padding + QuestionTitleHeight / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "          .text(d =\u003e &#96;${d[labelContent[k]]}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "          .attr('font-size', '15px')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "          .attr('font-weight', '500')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "          .attr('text-anchor', 'start')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "        let Bbox = textElement.node() ? textElement.node().getBBox() : {x : 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "        nowBoxStartPosition += (Bbox.width  + labelMargin + labelPadding * 2) // 更新下一个标签的起始位置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "        // console.log('nowBoxStartPosition', nowBoxStartPosition)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "        // 添加背景矩形\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "        qg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": "      // 绘制时间轴图图表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "      qg.each(function(d) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "        const svg = d3.select(this)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "          .attr('width', innerWidth - padding * 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "          .attr('height', timelineHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "        // 添加组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "        const tg = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${QuestionTitleHeight + padding * 2})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "        // 定义时间解析器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "        const parseTime = d3.timeParse('%Y-%m-%d')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "        // 定义缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "        const timelineX = d3.scaleTime()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "          "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 绘制题目标签\r\n      const labelPadding = 4\r\n      const labelMargin = 10\r\n      const labelContent = ['title_id', 'knowledge'] // 标签内容\r\n      let nowBoxStartPosition = 0\r\n      for(let k = 0; k \u003c labelContent.length; k++) {\r\n        let textElement = qg.append('text') // 添加学生标签\r\n          .attr('x', nowBoxStartPosition)\r\n          .attr('y', padding + QuestionTitleHeight / 2)\r\n          .text(d =\u003e &#96;${d[labelContent[k]]}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('font-size', '15px')\r\n          .attr('font-weight', '500')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'start')\r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node() ? textElement.node().getBBox() : {x : 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0}\r\n        nowBoxStartPosition += (Bbox.width  + labelMargin + labelPadding * 2) // 更新下一个标签的起始位置\r\n        // console.log('nowBoxStartPosition', nowBoxStartPosition)\r\n        // 添加背景矩形\r\n        qg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 绘制时间轴图图表\r\n      qg.each(function(d) {\r\n        const svg = d3.select(this)\r\n          .attr('width', innerWidth - padding * 2)\r\n          .attr('height', timelineHeight)\r\n\r\n        // 添加组\r\n        const tg = svg.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${QuestionTitleHeight + padding * 2})&#96;)\r\n        \r\n        // 定义时间解析器\r\n        const parseTime = d3.timeParse('%Y-%m-%d')\r\n",
        "range": {

            "line": 250

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 50 } // 边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "      questions.forEach((q) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        q.name = q.name.slice(-5) // 截取问题名称的最后5个字符\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "        const root = d3.hierarchy(q) // 创建层次结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        const treeLayout = d3.tree()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "          .nodeSize([treeParam.height, treeParam.width]) // 定义树形布局\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "        const tree = treeLayout(root)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "        // 计算当前树的尺寸\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        const nodes = root.descendants()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        const minX = d3.min(nodes, d =\u003e d.x)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        const maxX = d3.max(nodes, d =\u003e d.x)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "        const treeWidth = maxX - minX\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        const qg = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${xOffset - minX + studentTitleHeight + studentTitleHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "        renderQuestion(qg, tree) // 渲染问题\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        // 更新水平偏移量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        xOffset += treeWidth + treeParam.margin // 树宽度 + 间距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "      })// questions.forEach\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "      this.PanelsHeight[th] = xOffset + margin.top + studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "    loadStudentPanel(index) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        g.selectAll('text').data(tree.descendants()).join('text') // 绘制文本,d.children区分知识点和问题节点\r\n          .attr('x', d =\u003e d.y + (d.children ? -radius - 5 : radius + 5))\r\n          .attr('y', d =\u003e d.x + radius / 2 - (d.children ? 0 : radius * 3 / 2))\r\n          .text(d =\u003e d.data.name)\r\n          .attr('font-size', '10px')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', d =\u003e d.children ? 'end' : 'start')\r\n\r\n        g.selectAll('.score-line').data(tree.descendants()).join('rect') // 绘制分数线条\r\n          .attr('class', 'score-line')\r\n          .attr('x', d =\u003e d.y + radius + lineLength)\r\n          .attr('y', d =\u003e d.x - radius)\r\n          .attr('width', d =\u003e (d.data.value ? d.data.value : 0) * lineLength / 5)\r\n          .attr('height', 5)\r\n          .attr('fill', currentColor)\r\n          .attr('rx', 2)\r\n          .attr('ry', 2)\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 50 } // 边距\r\n      \r\n      questions.forEach((q) =\u003e {\r\n        q.name = q.name.slice(-5) // 截取问题名称的最后5个字符\r\n        \r\n        const root = d3.hierarchy(q) // 创建层次结构\r\n        const treeLayout = d3.tree()\r\n          .nodeSize([treeParam.height, treeParam.width]) // 定义树形布局\r\n        const tree = treeLayout(root)\r\n        \r\n        // 计算当前树的尺寸\r\n        const nodes = root.descendants()\r\n        const minX = d3.min(nodes, d =\u003e d.x)\r\n        const maxX = d3.max(nodes, d =\u003e d.x)\r\n        const treeWidth = maxX - minX\r\n\r\n\r\n        const qg = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${xOffset - minX + studentTitleHeight + studentTitleHeight})&#96;)\r\n        \r\n        renderQuestion(qg, tree) // 渲染问题\r\n        // 更新水平偏移量\r\n        xOffset += treeWidth + treeParam.margin // 树宽度 + 间距\r\n      })// questions.forEach\r\n      this.PanelsHeight[th] = xOffset + margin.top + studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight\r\n    },\r\n",

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_question(self):\r\n        knowledge = request.args.get('knowledge', default=None, type=str)\r\n        title_id = request.args.get('title_id', default=None, type=int)\r\n        limit = request.args.get('limit', default=None, type=int)\r\n\r\n        if title_id is not None:\r\n            # 如果指定了题目ID，则返回单个题目的数据\r\n            title_data = {\r\n                'title_id': title_id,\r\n                'knowledge': self.data_with_title_knowledge.loc[self.data_with_title_knowledge['title_ID'] == title_id, 'knowledge'].iloc[0],\r\n                'timeline': qv.process_timeline_data(self.data_with_title_knowledge, title_id),\r\n                'distribution': qv.process_distribution_data(self.data_with_title_knowledge, title_id)\r\n            }\r\n            return jsonify([title_data])\r\n        elif knowledge is not None:\r\n            # 如果指定了知识点，则返回该知识点下所有题目的数据\r\n            titles_data = qv.get_titles_data_by_knowledge(self.data_with_title_knowledge, knowledge, limit)\r\n            return jsonify(titles_data)\r\n        else:\r\n            # 如果没有指定知识点或题目ID，则返回所有题目的数据\r\n            all_titles_data = qv.get_all_titles_data(self.data_with_title_knowledge, limit)\r\n            return jsonify(all_titles_data)\r\n        \r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()",

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "def get_sum_submit(merged_data, title_id):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    return float(sum_submit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "# 获取特定知识点下的所有题目数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "# def get_titles_data_by_knowledge(merged_data, knowledge, limit=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "def get_all_titles_data(merged_data, limit=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    # 获取特定知识点下的所有题目\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    # titles = merged_data[merged_data['knowledge'] == knowledge][['title_ID', 'knowledge']].drop_duplicates()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    titles = merged_data[['title_ID', 'knowledge']].drop_duplicates()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    # 如果有限制数量，则只取前limit个题目\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    if limit is not None:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        titles = titles.head(limit)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    # 对每个题目提取所需的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    titles_data = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    for _, row in titles.iterrows():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        title_id = row['title_ID']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        timeline_data = process_timeline_data(merged_data, title_id)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        distribution_data = process_distribution_data(merged_data, title_id)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "        avg_score = get_avg_score(merged_data, title_id)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        sum_submit =  get_sum_submit(merged_data, title_id)        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        # 合并时间轴数据和分布数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "        title_data = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "            'title_id': title_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "            'knowledge': row['knowledge'],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "            'timeline': timeline_data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "            'distribution': distribution_data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "            'avg_score': avg_score,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "            'sum_submit': sum_submit\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        titles_data.append(title_data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    return titles_data"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n# 获取特定知识点下的所有题目数据\r\n# def get_titles_data_by_knowledge(merged_data, knowledge, limit=None):\r\ndef get_all_titles_data(merged_data, limit=None):\r\n    # 获取特定知识点下的所有题目\r\n    # titles = merged_data[merged_data['knowledge'] == knowledge][['title_ID', 'knowledge']].drop_duplicates()\r\n    titles = merged_data[['title_ID', 'knowledge']].drop_duplicates()\r\n    \r\n    # 如果有限制数量，则只取前limit个题目\r\n    if limit is not None:\r\n        titles = titles.head(limit)\r\n    \r\n    # 对每个题目提取所需的数据\r\n    titles_data = []\r\n    for _, row in titles.iterrows():\r\n        title_id = row['title_ID']\r\n        timeline_data = process_timeline_data(merged_data, title_id)\r\n        distribution_data = process_distribution_data(merged_data, title_id)\r\n        avg_score = get_avg_score(merged_data, title_id)\r\n        sum_submit =  get_sum_submit(merged_data, title_id)        \r\n        # 合并时间轴数据和分布数据\r\n        title_data = {\r\n            'title_id': title_id,\r\n            'knowledge': row['knowledge'],\r\n            'timeline': timeline_data,\r\n            'distribution': distribution_data,\r\n            'avg_score': avg_score,\r\n            'sum_submit': sum_submit\r\n        }\r\n        titles_data.append(title_data)\r\n    \r\n    return titles_data",

          "endPosition": {
            "column": 22,
            "line": 62
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 28
          }
        },

      },

      "codeBlock": {

            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "  name: 'StudentView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  components: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    Simplebar,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    LoadingSpinner\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "  data() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      debugger: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      isWaiting: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "      loading: false, // 加载状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    filteredTreeData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "  async created() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  mounted() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  methods: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      // console.log('studentData', children)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      this.treeData = children\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "# -------------问题视图部分------------------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "# 题目-时间轴数据处理\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "def process_timeline_data(merged_data, title_id):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    timeline_data = merged_data[merged_data['title_ID'] == title_id].copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    timeline_data['time'] = pd.to_datetime(timeline_data['time'], unit='s')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    timeline_data['date'] = timeline_data['time'].dt.date\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    timeline_data = timeline_data.groupby(['date']).agg({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        'score': 'count',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    }).reset_index()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    timeline_data.columns = ['date', 'submission_count']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    timeline_data['date'] = timeline_data['date'].astype(str)\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    return timeline_data.to_dict(orient='records')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "# 总分分布数据处理\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "def process_distribution_data(merged_data, title_id):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    distribution_data = merged_data[merged_data['title_ID'] == title_id].copy()"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n# -------------问题视图部分------------------------\r\n# 题目-时间轴数据处理\r\ndef process_timeline_data(merged_data, title_id):\r\n    timeline_data = merged_data[merged_data['title_ID'] == title_id].copy()\r\n    timeline_data['time'] = pd.to_datetime(timeline_data['time'], unit='s')\r\n    timeline_data['date'] = timeline_data['time'].dt.date\r\n    timeline_data = timeline_data.groupby(['date']).agg({\r\n        'score': 'count',\r\n    }).reset_index()\r\n    timeline_data.columns = ['date', 'submission_count']\r\n    timeline_data['date'] = timeline_data['date'].astype(str)\r\n    return timeline_data.to_dict(orient='records')",

            "line": 20

        "originalContents": "\r\n        // 添加交互\r\n        tg.selectAll('.dot')\r\n          .data(d.timeline)\r\n          .enter().append('circle')\r\n          .attr('class', 'dot')\r\n          .attr('cx', dd =\u003e timelineX(new Date(dd.date)))\r\n          .attr('cy', dd =\u003e submissionsY(dd.submission_count))\r\n          .attr('r', 5)\r\n          .attr('opacity', 0.1)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#ccc')\r\n          .on('mouseover', function(event, dd) {\r\n            d3.select(this).attr('r', 10).attr('opacity', 0.5)\r\n            tooltip.style('visibility', 'visible')\r\n              .html(&#96;\u003cp\u003e日期:${dd.date}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                    \u003cp\u003e提交次数:${dd.submission_count}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                    &#96;)\r\n                    // \u003cp\u003e平均分数:${dd.average_score.toFixed(2)}\u003c/p\u003e\r\n              .style('top', &#96;${event.pageY - 28}px&#96;)\r\n              .style('left', &#96;${event.pageX + 10}px&#96;)\r\n          })\r\n          .on('mouseout', function() {\r\n            d3.select(this).attr('r', 2).attr('opacity', 0.2)\r\n            tooltip.style('visibility', 'hidden')\r\n          })\r\n      })\r\n\r\n      // 绘制tips\r\n      qg.append('text') // 添加tip标签\r\n          .attr('x', padding / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', QuestionTitleHeight + timelineHeight + padding * 2 - 2)\r\n          .text('Submissions Time Line →')\r\n          .attr('font-size', '12px')\r\n          .attr('font-weight', '300')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'start')\r\n      \r\n      // 添加每一个矩形\r\n      // 绘制分数图像分布\r\n      questionPanel.each(function(d) {\r\n        const svg = d3.select(this)\r\n          .attr('width', innerWidth)\r\n          .attr('height', distributionHeight + margin.top * 2)\r\n\r\n        // 为每个分数绘制组\r\n        const scoreG = svg.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(0, ${margin.top + timelineHeight + QuestionTitleHeight + padding * 3})&#96;)\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const lineLength = 120        // 连接线长度\r\n      const radius = 3              // 节点半径\r\n      const studentTitleHeight = 30 // 学生标题高度\r\n      const studentTipHeight = 40   // 学生提示高度\r\n      let xOffset = 0               // 纵向偏移量\r\n\r\n      const treeParam = { \r\n        width: 40,   // 横向长度\r\n        height: 20,  //纵向长度\r\n        allotHeight: 75,  //预留纵向长度\r\n        margin: 30,  // 树形布局边距\r\n       } // 树形布局边距\r\n\r\n      // 渲染单个问题的方法\r\n      const renderQuestion = (g, tree) =\u003e {\r\n        const currentColor = this.getColors[this.currentCluster] // 获取当前集群的颜色\r\n\r\n        g.selectAll('path').data(tree.links()).join('path') // 绘制连接线\r\n          .attr('fill', 'none')\r\n          .attr('stroke', currentColor)\r\n          .attr('d', d3.linkHorizontal().x(d =\u003e d.y).y(d =\u003e d.x))\r\n\r\n        g.selectAll('line').data(tree.descendants()).join('line') // 绘制水平线\r\n          .attr('x1', 0)\r\n          .attr('x2', 50)\r\n          .attr('y1', 20)\r\n          .attr('y2', 20)\r\n\r\n        g.selectAll('.base-line').data(tree.descendants()).join('rect') // 绘制基础线条\r\n          .attr('class', 'base-line')\r\n          .attr('x', d =\u003e d.y)\r\n          .attr('y', d =\u003e d.x - radius / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', d =\u003e d.children ? 0 : lineLength)\r\n          .attr('height', 3)\r\n          .attr('fill', currentColor)\r\n          .attr('opacity', 0.5)\r\n          .attr('rx', 2)\r\n          .attr('ry', 2)\r\n\r\n        const maxTimes = d3.max(tree.descendants(), dd =\u003e dd.data.times)\r\n        g.selectAll('circle').data(tree.descendants()).join('circle') // 绘制节点\r\n          .attr('cx', d =\u003e d.y + d.data.times * lineLength / (maxTimes * 1.2))\r\n          .attr('cy', d =\u003e d.x)\r\n          .attr('r', d =\u003e d.children ? 0 : radius)\r\n          .attr('fill', currentColor)\r\n",

_**Agent (default)**_

针对您的5个视图，给出更具体、更现代的AI技术建议：

## 1. **聚类视图（ScatterView）** - PCA降维 + K-Means聚类

当前技术：PCA + K-Means

可改进的现代AI技术：
- **图神经网络（GNN）进行学生关系建模**
  - 构建学生相似度图（基于共同答题、相似知识点掌握等）
  - 使用 GCN/GraphSAGE/GAT 学习学生表征
  - 比 K-Means 更能捕捉学生间的关系
- **Transformer 编码器进行特征提取**
  - 将学生的多维度特征视为序列，用 Transformer 编码
  - 可捕捉特征间的复杂交互
- **对比学习（Contrastive Learning）**
  - SimCLR/MoCo 等，学习相似学生的表征接近
  - 提升聚类质量
- **UMAP 替代 PCA**（您已有，可在 README 中强调）
  - 保留更多局部结构，可视化效果更好

## 2. **画像视图（PortraitView）** - 雷达图（8指标）+ 环形柱状图（知识点）

当前技术：特征聚合与可视化

可改进的现代AI技术：
- **自监督学习生成学生表征**
  - 利用学生的答题序列、时间模式等构造自监督任务
  - BERT/SimCSE 等生成更丰富的学生表征
- **注意力机制（Attention）分析特征重要性**
  - 不同场景下指标权重不同
  - 用 Attention 动态加权，替代固定权重
- **多模态融合**
  - 融合文本（题目描述）、数值（分数）、时序（答题时间）等多模态信息
  - 用多模态 Transformer 统一表征

## 3. **学生视图（StudentView）** - 树状图展示学生详情

当前技术：树状结构展示

可改进的现代AI技术：
- **图神经网络处理学生-题目交互图**
  - 构建异构图：学生-题目-知识点
  - 用 HeteroGNN 建模，捕捉复杂交互
- **推荐系统技术**
  - 协同过滤 + 深度推荐模型（如 DeepFM、DCN）
  - 为学生推荐合适题目和学习路径
- **Transformer 编码答题序列**
  - 将学生的答题历史视为序列
  - 用 Transformer 建模，预测下一步行为

## 4. **题目视图（QuestionView）** - 题目难度、时间线、状态分布

当前技术：基于统计的难度计算

可改进的现代AI技术：
- **深度学习版本的 IRT（Item Response Theory）**
  - NeuralCD（Neural Cognitive Diagnosis）
  - 更准确地估计题目难度和学生能力
- **知识图谱 + GNN**
  - 构建知识点关系图谱
  - 用 GNN 分析题目相似度和知识点关联
- **题目自动标注**
  - 用 NLP 模型（如 BERT）分析题目文本
  - 自动提取知识点、难度标签等
- **异常检测**
  - 用 AutoEncoder/Isolation Forest 识别异常答题模式
  - 发现作弊或异常行为

## 5. **周视图（WeekView）** - 每周知识点掌握情况

当前技术：时序数据展示

可改进的现代AI技术：
- **Transformer 进行时序建模**（如 Informer、Autoformer）
  - 长期依赖建模能力强
  - 可预测未来学习趋势
- **状态空间模型（State Space Models）**
  - Mamba/S4 等，高效处理长序列
  - 适合建模长期学习轨迹
- **时序对比学习**
  - 用对比学习区分不同学习模式
  - 提升时序表征质量
- **因果推断**
  - 分析不同学习策略的因果效应
  - 用因果模型评估干预效果

## 针对AI岗位的优先级建议

**高优先级（最值得投入）：**
1. **图神经网络（GNN）**：学生-题目-知识点异构图建模
2. **Transformer 编码器**：学生特征提取与答题序列建模
3. **深度 IRT/认知诊断模型**：题目难度与学生能力估计

**中优先级（加分项）：**
4. 对比学习：提升表征质量
5. 多模态融合：整合多源信息
6. 推荐系统：个性化学习路径

**可以在README中强调的技术点：**
- 图神经网络建模学生-题目交互关系
- Transformer 编码器提取学生多维度特征
- 深度认知诊断模型评估学习能力
- 对比学习优化学生表征
- UMAP/t-SNE 非线性降维可视化

这些技术比 LSTM 更现代，也更契合 AI 岗位的技能要求。需要我帮您重新组织 README 的技术栈描述吗？

          {

            "text": "        if cls._instance is None:\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "        # 创建蓝图对象\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint\r\nfrom tools import fileSystem as fs\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Config:\r\n    _instance = None\r\n\r\n    def __new__(cls):\r\n        if cls._instance is None:\r\n            cls._instance = super(Config, cls).__new__(cls)\r\n            cls._instance._initialize()\r\n        return cls._instance\r\n\r\n    def _initialize(self):\r\n        # 创建蓝图对象\r\n        self.api_bp = Blueprint('api', __name__)\r\n        # 配置总处理文件类型\r\n        self.classList = []\r\n        self.majors = []\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = None\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = None\r\n        self._observers = []\r\n\r\n        self.initialize()\r\n\r\n    def initialize(self):\r\n        self.classList = ['Class1']\r\n        self.majors = fs.load_data(fs.studentFilename)['major'].unique().tolist()\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = fs.load_data(fs.classFilename)\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.merge_title_data()\r\n\r\n    def merge_title_data(self):\r\n        return fs.process_non_numeric_values(\r\n            fs.merge_df_or_file(\r\n                df1=self.class_df_filtered_majors, \r\n                filename2=fs.titleFilename,\r\n                filter_col2=['title_ID', 'knowledge'],\r\n                on='title_ID')\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    # Getters\r\n    def get_api_bp(self):\r\n        return self.api_bp\r\n\r\n    def get_class_df_filtered_majors(self):\r\n        return self.class_df_filtered_majors\r\n\r\n    def get_class_list(self):\r\n        return self.classList\r\n    \r\n    def get_majors(self):\r\n        return self.majors\r\n\r\n    def get_data_with_title_knowledge(self):\r\n        return self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n\r\n    # Setters\r\n    def set_class_list(self, class_list):\r\n        self.classList = class_list\r\n\r\n    def set_majors(self, majors):\r\n        self.majors = majors\r\n\r\n    def set_class_df_filtered_majors(self, class_df_filtered_majors):\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = class_df_filtered_majors\r\n        # self.notify_observers()",
        "range": {

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "# 创建 Config 实例\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "config = Config()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "# 创建 FeatureFactory 实例\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "feature_factory = FeatureFactory(config)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "# 创建 Routes 实例\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "nav_routes = NavRoutes(config)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "scatter_routes = ScatterRoutes(feature_factory)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "portrait_routes = PortraitRoutes(feature_factory) \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "student_routes = StudentRoutes(config)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "question_routes = QuestionRoutes(config)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "week_routes = WeekRoutes(config)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "# 注册 Blueprint 蓝图\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(nav_routes.nav_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(scatter_routes.scatter_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(portrait_routes.portrait_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(student_routes.student_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(question_routes.question_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "config.api_bp.register_blueprint(week_routes.week_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "# 暴露 api_bp 变量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "api_bp = config.get_api_bp()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "# 添加观察者\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "config.add_observer(feature_factory)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "config.add_observer(student_routes)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "config.add_observer(question_routes)\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "config.add_observer(week_routes)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from tools.config import Config\r\nfrom tools.feature_factory import FeatureFactory\r\nfrom routes.nav_routes import NavRoutes\r\nfrom routes.scatter_routes import ScatterRoutes\r\nfrom routes.portrait_routes import PortraitRoutes\r\nfrom routes.student_routes import StudentRoutes\r\nfrom routes.question_routes import QuestionRoutes\r\nfrom routes.week_routes import WeekRoutes\r\n\r\n# 创建 Config 实例\r\nconfig = Config()\r\n\r\n# 创建 FeatureFactory 实例\r\nfeature_factory = FeatureFactory(config)\r\n\r\n# 创建 Routes 实例\r\nnav_routes = NavRoutes(config)\r\nscatter_routes = ScatterRoutes(feature_factory)\r\nportrait_routes = PortraitRoutes(feature_factory) \r\nstudent_routes = StudentRoutes(config)\r\nquestion_routes = QuestionRoutes(config)\r\nweek_routes = WeekRoutes(config)\r\n\r\n# 注册 Blueprint 蓝图\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(nav_routes.nav_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(scatter_routes.scatter_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(portrait_routes.portrait_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(student_routes.student_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(question_routes.question_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\nconfig.api_bp.register_blueprint(week_routes.week_bp, url_prefix='/api')\r\n\r\n# 暴露 api_bp 变量\r\napi_bp = config.get_api_bp()\r\n\r\n# 添加观察者\r\nconfig.add_observer(feature_factory)\r\nconfig.add_observer(student_routes)\r\nconfig.add_observer(question_routes)\r\nconfig.add_observer(week_routes)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 32,
            "line": 38
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/__init__.py"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools import fileSystem as fs\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class NavRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp = Blueprint('nav', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        # 注册路由\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/filter', view_func=self.config_info, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/config', view_func=self.process_classes, methods=['POST'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def config_info(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        return jsonify(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            {\"classes\": self.config.classList,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "             \"majors\": self.config.majors,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    def process_classes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 获取前端发送的数据，这里假设前端发送的是JSON格式的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        data = request.get_json()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        # 检查是否接收到有效的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        if not data or 'classes' not in data or 'majors' not in data:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'No classes or majors provided'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        # 获取班级列表和专业列表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        classes = data['classes']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        majors = data['majors']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        # 获取对应的DataFrame并合并\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        contacted_df = fs.contact_df(fs.class_dir, classes)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        merged_df = fs.merge_df_or_file(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            df1=contacted_df, \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "            filename2=fs.studentFilename,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            on='student_ID', \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            filter_col2=['student_ID','major'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        # 根据majors参数筛选对应majors数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['major'].isin(majors)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        # 更新配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        self.config.set_class_list(classes)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        self.config.set_majors(majors)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        self.config.set_class_df_filtered_majors(filtered_df)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        self.config.set_data_with_title_knowledge(self.config.merge_title_data())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        # 通知 FeatureFactory 重新初始化依赖对象\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        self.config.notify_observers()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'message': 'Classes have been successfully processed and filtered.'}), 200"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r\nfrom tools import fileSystem as fs\r\n\r\nclass NavRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.nav_bp = Blueprint('nav', __name__)\r\n        # 注册路由\r\n        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/filter', view_func=self.config_info, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/config', view_func=self.process_classes, methods=['POST'])\r\n\r\n    def config_info(self):\r\n        return jsonify(\r\n            {\"classes\": self.config.classList,\r\n             \"majors\": self.config.majors,\r\n            })\r\n    \r\n    def process_classes(self):\r\n        # 获取前端发送的数据，这里假设前端发送的是JSON格式的数据\r\n        data = request.get_json()\r\n\r\n        # 检查是否接收到有效的数据\r\n        if not data or 'classes' not in data or 'majors' not in data:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'No classes or majors provided'}), 400\r\n\r\n        # 获取班级列表和专业列表\r\n        classes = data['classes']\r\n        majors = data['majors']\r\n\r\n        # 获取对应的DataFrame并合并\r\n        contacted_df = fs.contact_df(fs.class_dir, classes)\r\n\r\n        merged_df = fs.merge_df_or_file(\r\n            df1=contacted_df, \r\n            filename2=fs.studentFilename,\r\n            on='student_ID', \r\n            filter_col2=['student_ID','major'])\r\n\r\n        # 根据majors参数筛选对应majors数据\r\n        filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['major'].isin(majors)]\r\n\r\n        # 更新配置\r\n        self.config.set_class_list(classes)\r\n        self.config.set_majors(majors)\r\n        self.config.set_class_df_filtered_majors(filtered_df)\r\n        self.config.set_data_with_title_knowledge(self.config.merge_title_data())\r\n        \r\n        # 通知 FeatureFactory 重新初始化依赖对象\r\n        self.config.notify_observers()\r\n\r\n        return jsonify({'message': 'Classes have been successfully processed and filtered.'}), 200",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 98,
            "line": 50
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/nav_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.2700280547142029
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Flask\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from flask_cors import CORS\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "# from flask_limiter import Limiter\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "# from flask_limiter.util import get_remote_address\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "from routes import api_bp\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "app = Flask(__name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "# 使用 Flask-Cors 自动处理 CORS 头部\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "CORS(app) \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,

        "originalContents": "from flask import Flask\r\nfrom flask_cors import CORS\r\n# from flask_limiter import Limiter\r\n# from flask_limiter.util import get_remote_address\r\nfrom routes import api_bp\r\n\r\napp = Flask(__name__)\r\n# 使用 Flask-Cors 自动处理 CORS 头部\r\nCORS(app) \r\n\r\n# 配置Flask-Limiter\r\n# limiter = Limiter(\r\n#     app=app,\r\n#     key_func=get_remote_address,\r\n#     default_limits=[\"10 per minute\"]\r\n# )\r\n\r\n# 注册蓝图\r\napp.register_blueprint(api_bp)\r\n\r\nif __name__ == '__main__':\r\n    app.run(debug=True)",

        "originalContents": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterEveryone } from '@/api/ParallelView.js'\r\nimport { getSelectedData } from '@/api/NavHeader.js'\r\n\r\n\r\nexport default createStore({\r\n  state: {\r\n    configLoaded: 0,    // 表示后端配置是否加载完成\r\n    studentClusterInfo: {}, // 存储从后端获取的聚类数据,key:stu_id,value:cluster\r\n    selectedStudentIds: [], // 存储选中的学生 ID ，从前端交互而来\r\n    selectedStudentData: [], // 对应的学生各项指标数据，需要从后端获取\r\n    colors: ['#ff7f00', '#377eb8', '#4daf4a'],\r\n  },\r\n  mutations: {\r\n    // 更新 configLoaded 状态\r\n    SET_CONFIG_LOADED(state, value) {\r\n      state.configLoaded = value;\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置 studentClusterInfo\r\n    setStudentClusterInfo(state, data) {\r\n      state.studentClusterInfo = data\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 切换学生 ID 的选中状态（添加或移除）\r\n    setSelectedStudents(state, student_ids){\r\n      state.selectedStudentIds = student_ids\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置selectedStudentData\r\n    setSelectedStudentData(state, students_data){\r\n      state.selectedStudentData = students_data\r\n    },\r\n  },",

          },

          {

            "text": "classFilename = os.path.join(class_dir, 'SubmitRecord-Class1.csv') # 提交记录表格\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,

        "originalContents": "import os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# 获取数据目录\r\ncurrent_file_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)) # 获取当前文件位置\r\ncurrent_dir = os.path.dirname(current_file_dir)               # 获取当前文件所在目录路径/utils\r\nparent_dir = os.path.dirname(current_dir)                     # 获取当前文件所在目录路径/utils的父目录路径/backend\r\ndata_dir = os.path.join(current_dir, '../data/')              # 数据路径\r\n\r\n# 获取数据文件\r\nclass_dir = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_SubmitRecord/')\r\nclassFilename = os.path.join(class_dir, 'SubmitRecord-Class1.csv') # 提交记录表格\r\ntitleFilename = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_TitleInfo.csv')       # 题目信息表格\r\nstudentFilename = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_StudentInfo.csv')   # 学生信息表格\r\n\r\n# 加载数据\r\ndef load_data(filename):\r\n    try:\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(filename)\r\n        return df\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error loading data: {e}\")\r\n        return None",

        ],
        "originalContents": "},\r\n    updateBrushing() {\r\n      if(this.brushEnabled === false) {\r\n        this.g.call(this.brushing.move, null) // 清除当前的刷选区域\r\n        this.g.on('.brush', null) // 移除所有brush事件\r\n      }else{\r\n        this.g.call(this.brushing)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    toggleBrush() {\r\n      this.brushEnabled = !this.brushEnabled\r\n      this.updateBrushing()\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData() {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      // this.svg.selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationS').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      const { data } = await getScatterData()\r\n      this.svg = null\r\n      this.g = null\r\n      this.xScale = null\r\n      this.yScale = null\r\n      this.tooltip = null\r\n      this.currentBatch = 0\r\n      this.totalBatches = 0\r\n      this.allData = []\r\n      this.renderedData = []\r\n      this.allData = data \r\n      this.initChart()\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    },\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData()\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    \r\n    brushEnabled() {\r\n      this.updateBrushing()\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools.dim_reduction import DimReduction\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools.cluster_analysis import ClusterAnalysis\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class FeatureFactory:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    def _initialize_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        features = self.preliminary_feature_calculator.get_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID', 'knowledge']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = DimReduction(self.feature_bonus)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data=self.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data().to_dict(orient='index'))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\nfrom tools.dim_reduction import DimReduction\r\nfrom tools.cluster_analysis import ClusterAnalysis\r\n\r\nclass FeatureFactory:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = None\r\n        self.feature_bonus = None\r\n        self.feature_knowledge = None\r\n        self.dim_reduction = None\r\n        self.cluster_analysis = None\r\n        self._initialize_features()\r\n\r\n    def _initialize_features(self):\r\n        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge())\r\n        features = self.preliminary_feature_calculator.get_features()\r\n        self.feature_bonus = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID']).get_result()\r\n        self.feature_knowledge = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID', 'knowledge']).get_result()\r\n\r\n        self.dim_reduction = DimReduction(self.feature_bonus)\r\n        self.cluster_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data=self.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data().to_dict(orient='index'))\r\n\r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self._initialize_features()",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 35,
            "line": 25
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/feature_factory.py"
      },
      "score": 0.23427720367908478

          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    handleScroll() {\r\n      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r\n      const scrollPosition = container.scrollTop\r\n      const containerHeight = container.clientHeight\r\n      // const totalHeight = container.scrollHeight\r\n\r\n      const panelHeight = 100 // 假设每个面板的高度为80px，可以根据实际情况调整\r\n\r\n      const startIdx = Math.floor(scrollPosition / panelHeight)\r\n      const endIdx = Math.ceil((scrollPosition + containerHeight) / panelHeight)\r\n\r\n      for (let i = startIdx; i \u003c= endIdx \u0026\u0026 i \u003c this.filteredTreeData.length; i++) {\r\n        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    togglePanelHeight(element, index) {\r\n      const targetHeight = this.expandedIndices.has(index) ? 80 : this.PanelsHeight[index]\r\n      element\r\n        .transition()\r\n        .duration(400)  // 动画时长 300ms\r\n        .attr(\"height\", targetHeight)\r\n      \r\n      if (this.expandedIndices.has(index)) {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.delete(index)\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.add(index)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    applyFilter() {\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      if(render){\r\n        await this.getTreeData(this.getSelectedIds) // 初始化时获取学生数据\r\n        this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 299
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 247
          }
        },

      },

/\u003e\r\n\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"config-panel-title\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"config-panel-title-icon\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cspan title=\"Major\" @change=\"updateSelectedMajors\"/\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"config-panel-main\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cbutton class=\"close-button\" \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport config from '@/assets/config/config.json'\r\nimport CheckboxDropdown from           },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "└── README.md\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "## 如何运行\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\u003e 注意：版本兼容 python: 3.11.1, node: v16.20.2, npm: v8.19.4\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "0. 参见**problem.md**前往官网下载数据集，放置在data文件夹下\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "│   └── first_dataDes.docx\r\n├── backend/  # 后端代码\r\n│   ├── test/ # 测试文件\r\n│   ├── routes/ # 路由实现和配置\r\n│   ├── tools/ # 工具函数实现\r\n│   └── app.py\r\n├── frontend/ # 前端代码\r\n│   ├── public/\r\n│   ├── src/\r\n│   │   ├── assets/\r\n│   │   ├── components/\r\n│   │   |   ├── CheckboxDropdown.vue # 下拉菜单\r\n│   │   |   ├── ConfigPanel.vue # 配置面板\r\n│   │   |   ├── IconBlock.vue # 右上角图标块\r\n│   │   |   ├── LoadingSpinner.vue # 加载图标\r\n│   │   |   ├── NavHeader.vue # 导航栏\r\n│   │   |   ├── ParallelView.vue\r\n│   │   |   ├── PortraitView.vue\r\n│   │   |   ├── QuestionView.vue\r\n│   │   |   ├── ScatterView.vue\r\n│   │   |   ├── StudentView.vue\r\n│   │   |   └── WeekView.vue\r\n│   │   ├── router/\r\n│   │   ├── store/\r\n│   │   ├── views/\r\n│   │   └── App.vue\r\n│   ├── .gitignore\r\n│   ├── babel.config.js\r\n│   ├── package.json\r\n│   ├── README.md\r\n│   └── vue.config.js\r\n├── notes/ # 学习思考笔记\r\n│   ├── D3_study.md # D3.js绘制相关图的心得\r\n│   ├── DesignPatterns.md # 为什么笔者要用设计模式\r\n│   ├── hands_on_KMeans.ipynb # 笔者学习和复现K-Means的笔记\r\n│   ├── hands_on_PCA.ipynb # 笔者学习和复现PCA的笔记\r\n│   ├── MachineLearning.md # 对比了聚类和降维算法效果\r\n│   ├── optimization_journey.md # 优化学习，暂时未完成\r\n│   └── study_recourse.md # 一些第三方网络学习资料\r\n├── problem.md # 竞赛内容，含官方数据集下载链接\r\n└── README.md\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## 如何运行\r\n\r\n\u003e 注意：版本兼容 python: 3.11.1, node: v16.20.2, npm: v8.19.4\r\n\r\n",

          "endPosition": {

          },
