      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "          \u003c/form\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        \u003c/DropdownContent\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      \u003c/Dropdown\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter\"\u003eKnowledge:\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 555px\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationQ\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\"/\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "\u003c/template\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "import { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "import { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "import Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "import 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "import { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "import LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  name: 'QuestionView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "  components: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    Simplebar,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    Dropdown,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    DropdownContent,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    LoadingSpinner\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "  data() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      debugger: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      loading: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      QuestionData: [],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "      selectedKnowledge: {},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      difficultyIndex: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "      submissionMin: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      submissionMax: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "      scoreMin: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "      scoreMax: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "  async mounted() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    this.getQuestionData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters([]),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    displayButton() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      else return 'None'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  methods: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "    async getQuestionData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      // 获取问题数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "      // 获取唯一的 knowledge 类别\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter\"\u003eKnowledge:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 555px\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationQ\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\"/\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'QuestionView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    Dropdown,\r\n    DropdownContent,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      QuestionData: [],\r\n      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r\n      selectedKnowledge: {},\r\n      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r\n      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r\n      difficultyIndex: null,\r\n      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r\n      submissionMin: null,\r\n      submissionMax: null,\r\n      scoreMin: null,\r\n      scoreMax: null,\r\n    };\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    this.getQuestionData()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters([]),\r\n    displayButton() {\r\n      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r\n      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r\n      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r\n      else return 'None'\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getQuestionData() {\r\n      // 获取问题数据\r\n      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r\n      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r\n      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 126
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/QuestionView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.21359029412269592
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\u003e 注意：版本兼容 python: 3.11.1, node: v16.20.2, npm: v8.19.4\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "0. 参见**problem.md**前往官网下载数据集，放置在data文件夹下\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "1. 克隆项目到本地：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "git clone https://github.com/holyguacamoleCoder/NorthClassVision.git\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "2. 进入项目目录：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "cd NorthClassVision\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "3. 安装后端依赖：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "pip install -r requirements.txt\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "4. 启动后端服务：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "cd backend\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "flask run\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "5. 安装前端依赖\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "cd ../frontend\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "npm install\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "6. 启动前端服务：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "npm run serve\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "7. 打开浏览器，访问 &#96;http://localhost:8080&#96; 查看可视化效果。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "## 样式预览\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "1. 选择配置班级和专业\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "![image-preview1](src/README/image-preview1.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "2.点击submit按钮，等待后端配置成功\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "![image-preview2](src/README/image-preview2.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "3.此时后端配置完成，前端部分组件也已经更新渲染\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "![image-preview3](src/README/image-preview3.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "4.点击刷选工具，框选数据，点击DISPLAY按钮。随后可以在PortraitView看到被选中学生的指标平均值（黑色），Week/Student View后端正在计算\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "![image-preview4-1](src/README/image-preview4-1.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "5.再试着框选一些并点击DISPLAY，点击StudentView具体框可以展开\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "![image-preview4-2](src/README/image-preview4-2.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "6.WeekView展示的是被选中学生的每周不同知识点进展\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "![image-preview4-3](src/README/image-preview4-3.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "7. 其他一些样例，请欣赏\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "![image-preview5-1](src/README/image-preview5-1.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "![image-preview5-2](src/README/image-preview5-2.png)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "\u003cimg src=\"src/README/image-preview7.png\" alt=\"image-preview7\" style=\"zoom: 27%;\" /\u003e \u003cimg src=\"src/README/image-preview6.png\" alt=\"image-preview6\" style=\"zoom: 27%;\" /\u003e"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "0. 参见**problem.md**前往官网下载数据集，放置在data文件夹下\r\n\r\n1. 克隆项目到本地：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ngit clone https://github.com/holyguacamoleCoder/NorthClassVision.git\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. 进入项目目录：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd NorthClassVision\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n3. 安装后端依赖：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\npip install -r requirements.txt\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n4. 启动后端服务：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd backend\r\nflask run\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n5. 安装前端依赖\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\ncd ../frontend\r\nnpm install\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n6. 启动前端服务：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\r\nnpm run serve\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n7. 打开浏览器，访问 &#96;http://localhost:8080&#96; 查看可视化效果。\r\n\r\n## 样式预览\r\n\r\n1. 选择配置班级和专业\r\n\r\n![image-preview1](src/README/image-preview1.png)\r\n\r\n2.点击submit按钮，等待后端配置成功\r\n\r\n![image-preview2](src/README/image-preview2.png)\r\n\r\n3.此时后端配置完成，前端部分组件也已经更新渲染\r\n\r\n![image-preview3](src/README/image-preview3.png)\r\n\r\n4.点击刷选工具，框选数据，点击DISPLAY按钮。随后可以在PortraitView看到被选中学生的指标平均值（黑色），Week/Student View后端正在计算\r\n\r\n![image-preview4-1](src/README/image-preview4-1.png)\r\n\r\n5.再试着框选一些并点击DISPLAY，点击StudentView具体框可以展开\r\n\r\n![image-preview4-2](src/README/image-preview4-2.png)\r\n\r\n6.WeekView展示的是被选中学生的每周不同知识点进展\r\n\r\n![image-preview4-3](src/README/image-preview4-3.png)\r\n\r\n7. 其他一些样例，请欣赏\r\n\r\n![image-preview5-1](src/README/image-preview5-1.png)\r\n\r\n![image-preview5-2](src/README/image-preview5-2.png)\r\n\r\n\u003cimg src=\"src/README/image-preview7.png\" alt=\"image-preview7\" style=\"zoom: 27%;\" /\u003e \u003cimg src=\"src/README/image-preview6.png\" alt=\"image-preview6\" style=\"zoom: 27%;\" /\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 167,
            "line": 171
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 95
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "README.md"
      },
      "score": 0.20822429656982422
    },

        "originalContents": "import axios from 'axios'\r\nconst instance = axios.create({\r\n  baseURL: 'http://localhost:5000/api/',\r\n  timeout: 40000\r\n})\r\n\r\n// 自定义配置\r\n// 请求/响应拦截器\r\n// 添加请求拦截器\r\ninstance.interceptors.request.use(function (config) {\r\n  return config\r\n}, function (error) {\r\n  // 对请求错误做些什么\r\n  return Promise.reject(error)\r\n})",

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "export default createStore({\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 7,

          },

          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 46,

            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    /**\r"

          {

            "text": "    async fetchSelectedData(context){\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n  actions: {\r\n    // 后端获取数据:{stu_id: cluster}\r\n    async fetchClusterData(context) {\r\n      const { data } = await getClusterEveryone()\r\n      context.commit('setStudentClusterInfo', data)\r\n    },\r\n    // 前端交互获得被选中的学生id\r\n    toggleSelectedIds(context, student_ids){\r\n      context.commit('setSelectedStudents', student_ids)\r\n      // console.log('selectedStudentIds', student_ids)\r\n    },\r\n    // 后端获取被选中的学生数据\r\n    /**\r\n     * 返回的数据格式：\r\n     * stu_id:{\r\n     *  \"bonus\": {xxx},\r\n     *  \"knowledge\": {xxx}\r\n     * } \r\n     */\r\n    async fetchSelectedData(context){\r\n      const { data } = await getSelectedData(context.state.selectedStudentIds)\r\n      const selectedStudentData = {}\r\n      for(let i = 0; i \u003c context.state.selectedStudentIds.length; i++){\r\n        selectedStudentData[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]] = {\r\n          ...data[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]],\r\n          cluster: context.state.studentClusterInfo[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]]\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      context.commit('setSelectedStudentData', selectedStudentData)\r\n      // alert('已获取被选择数据')\r\n    },\r\n  },\r\n  getters: {\r\n    getConfigLoaded: state =\u003e state.configLoaded,\r\n    getStudentClusterInfo: state =\u003e state.studentClusterInfo,\r\n    getSelectedIds: state =\u003e state.selectedStudentIds,\r\n    getSelectedData: state =\u003e state.selectedStudentData,\r\n    getColors: state =\u003e state.colors,\r\n  }\r\n})",

          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "import { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r"

            "text": "export default {\r"

            "lineNumber": 95,

          {

        ],
        "originalContents": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter\"\u003eKnowledge:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 555px\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationQ\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\"/\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'QuestionView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    Dropdown,\r\n    DropdownContent,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      QuestionData: [],\r\n      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r\n      selectedKnowledge: {},\r\n      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r\n      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r\n      difficultyIndex: null,\r\n      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r\n      submissionMin: null,\r\n      submissionMax: null,\r\n      scoreMin: null,\r\n      scoreMax: null,\r\n    };\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    this.getQuestionData()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters([]),\r\n    displayButton() {\r\n      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r\n      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r\n      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r\n      else return 'None'\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getQuestionData() {\r\n      // 获取问题数据\r\n      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r\n      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r\n      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r"

            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "    handleScroll() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254,
            "text": "      const scrollPosition = container.scrollTop\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "      const containerHeight = container.clientHeight\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256,
            "text": "      // const totalHeight = container.scrollHeight\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "      const panelHeight = 100 // 假设每个面板的高度为80px，可以根据实际情况调整\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "      const startIdx = Math.floor(scrollPosition / panelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "      const endIdx = Math.ceil((scrollPosition + containerHeight) / panelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "      for (let i = startIdx; i \u003c= endIdx \u0026\u0026 i \u003c this.filteredTreeData.length; i++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "    togglePanelHeight(element, index) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "      const targetHeight = this.expandedIndices.has(index) ? 80 : this.PanelsHeight[index]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "      element\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "        .transition()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "        .duration(400)  // 动画时长 300ms\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "        .attr(\"height\", targetHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "      if (this.expandedIndices.has(index)) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "        this.expandedIndices.delete(index)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "      } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "        this.expandedIndices.add(index)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "    applyFilter() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "text": "      this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "    async loadData(render = true) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "      this.loading = true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "      if(render){\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "        await this.getTreeData(this.getSelectedIds) // 初始化时获取学生数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "        this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "      this.loading = false\r"
          },

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    handleScroll() {\r\n      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r\n      const scrollPosition = container.scrollTop\r\n      const containerHeight = container.clientHeight\r\n      // const totalHeight = container.scrollHeight\r\n\r\n      const panelHeight = 100 // 假设每个面板的高度为80px，可以根据实际情况调整\r\n\r\n      const startIdx = Math.floor(scrollPosition / panelHeight)\r\n      const endIdx = Math.ceil((scrollPosition + containerHeight) / panelHeight)\r\n\r\n      for (let i = startIdx; i \u003c= endIdx \u0026\u0026 i \u003c this.filteredTreeData.length; i++) {\r\n        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    togglePanelHeight(element, index) {\r\n      const targetHeight = this.expandedIndices.has(index) ? 80 : this.PanelsHeight[index]\r\n      element\r\n        .transition()\r\n        .duration(400)  // 动画时长 300ms\r\n        .attr(\"height\", targetHeight)\r\n      \r\n      if (this.expandedIndices.has(index)) {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.delete(index)\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.add(index)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    applyFilter() {\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      if(render){\r\n        await this.getTreeData(this.getSelectedIds) // 初始化时获取学生数据\r\n        this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  ",

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "export default createStore({\r"

          {

          },

        "originalContents": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterEveryone } from '@/api/ParallelView.js'\r\nimport { getSelectedData } from '@/api/NavHeader.js'\r\n\r\n\r\nexport default createStore({\r\n  state: {\r\n    configLoaded: 0,    // 表示后端配置是否加载完成\r\n    studentClusterInfo: {}, // 存储从后端获取的聚类数据,key:stu_id,value:cluster\r\n    selectedStudentIds: [], // 存储选中的学生 ID ，从前端交互而来\r\n    selectedStudentData: [], // 对应的学生各项指标数据，需要从后端获取\r\n    colors: ['#ff7f00', '#377eb8', '#4daf4a'],\r\n  },\r\n  mutations: {\r\n    // 更新 configLoaded 状态\r\n    SET_CONFIG_LOADED(state, value) {\r\n      state.configLoaded = value;\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置 studentClusterInfo\r\n    setStudentClusterInfo(state, data) {\r\n      state.studentClusterInfo = data\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 切换学生 ID 的选中状态（添加或移除）\r\n    setSelectedStudents(state, student_ids){\r\n      state.selectedStudentIds = student_ids\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置selectedStudentData\r\n    setSelectedStudentData(state, students_data){\r\n      state.selectedStudentData = students_data\r\n    },\r\n  },",

        "originalContents": "},\r\n    updateBrushing() {\r\n      if(this.brushEnabled === false) {\r\n        this.g.call(this.brushing.move, null) // 清除当前的刷选区域\r\n        this.g.on('.brush', null) // 移除所有brush事件\r\n      }else{\r\n        this.g.call(this.brushing)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    toggleBrush() {\r\n      this.brushEnabled = !this.brushEnabled\r\n      this.updateBrushing()\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData() {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      // this.svg.selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationS').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      const { data } = await getScatterData()\r\n      this.svg = null\r\n      this.g = null\r\n      this.xScale = null\r\n      this.yScale = null\r\n      this.tooltip = null\r\n      this.currentBatch = 0\r\n      this.totalBatches = 0\r\n      this.allData = []\r\n      this.renderedData = []\r\n      this.allData = data \r\n      this.initChart()\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    },\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData()\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    \r\n    brushEnabled() {\r\n      this.updateBrushing()\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 64,

        ],
        "originalContents": "import request from '@/utils/request'\r\n\r\n// 获取问题视图相关数据\r\nexport const getQuestions = () =\u003e {\r\n  return request.get('/question/questions')\r\n}",

            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    transformScores(scores) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "    updateKind() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "      if (this.showPeakView) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "      this.renderPeakData();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "      } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "        this.renderWeekData();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "    async loadData(render = true) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501,
            "text": "      this.loading = true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502,
            "text": "      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503,
            "text": "      this.WeekData = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "      this.PeakData = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "      if (render) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "        if (this.showPeakView) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "        } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 509,
            "text": "          await this.getWeekData(this.getSelectedIds);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "      this.loading = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,
            "text": "  watch: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "    configLoaded(newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "        // 重新加载逻辑\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 519,
            "text": "        this.loadData(false)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520,
            "text": "        this.isWaiting = true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,
            "text": "      if (!newVal) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 525,
            "text": "        return\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 526,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527,
            "text": "      this.isWaiting = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 528,
            "text": "      this.loadData() \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 529,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "    // 监听 switch 变化，重新加载数据并渲染\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "    showPeakView() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "      this.isWaiting = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "      this.loadData()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    selectedDay() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "      if(this.showPeakView){\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "        this.isWaiting = false;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538,
            "text": "        this.loadData();\r"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "#week-view {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "  .title {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n          // 连接线\r\n          rg.append(\"line\")\r\n            .attr(\"x1\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y1\", firstHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"x2\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y2\", secondHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke-width\", 1)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke\", \"#fff\");\r\n        }); // w\r\n      }); // s\r\n    },\r\n    transformScores(scores) {\r\n      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r\n    },\r\n    updateKind() {\r\n      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n      this.renderPeakData();\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.renderWeekData();\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.WeekData = []\r\n      this.PeakData = []\r\n      if (render) {\r\n        if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r\n        } else {\r\n          await this.getWeekData(this.getSelectedIds);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    },\r\n    // 监听 switch 变化，重新加载数据并渲染\r\n    showPeakView() {\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData()\r\n    },\r\n    selectedDay() {\r\n      if(this.showPeakView){\r\n        this.isWaiting = false;\r\n        this.loadData();\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"portrait-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003ePortrait View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"vis-container\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"vis-panel\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization0\" ref=\"visualization0\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization1\" ref=\"visualization1\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization2\" ref=\"visualization2\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-bar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-radar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-legend\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters, mapActions } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterStudents } from '@/api/PortraitView'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'PortraitView',\r\n  components:{\r\n    LoadingSpinner,\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      PortraitData: {},\r\n      arc: null,\r\n      radarLine: null,\r\n      ourGroup: [null, null, null],\r\n      hadRender: [false, false, false],\r\n _**Agent (default)**_

启动时 5 秒延迟的原因和优化方向如下。

## 性能瓶颈分析

### 1. 后端启动时的同步初始化（主要瓶颈）

问题位置：`backend/routes/__init__.py` 第 14 行

```python
feature_factory = FeatureFactory(config)  # 这行在启动时立即执行
```

这会在启动时执行：
- 读取 CSV（约 19,517 行）
- 计算 8 个特征（包括耗时操作）
- 执行两次聚合计算
- PCA 降维
- K-Means 聚类

### 2. 慢速特征计算操作

问题位置：`backend/tools/features.py`

**a) 第 89-91 行：`groupby().apply()` 很慢**
```python
self.df['explore_bonus'] = self.df.groupby(['student_ID', 'title_ID'])\
    .apply(calculate_exploration_bonus)\
    .reset_index(name='explore_bonus')['explore_bonus']
```
`apply()` 在大量分组上很慢。

**b) 第 19 行：`df.to_string()` 计算哈希很慢**
```python
data_hash = hash(df.to_string())  # 对19517行数据转字符串非常慢！
```

**c) 第 71 行：多次排序和 rank**
```python
self.df['rank_bonus'] = self.df.sort_values(...)['score'].rank(...)
```

### 3. 前端等待后端初始化

问题位置：`frontend/src/components/ScatterView.vue` 第 52-55 行

```javascript
async mounted() {
  const { data } = await getScatterData()  // 需要等待后端完全初始化
  ...
}
```

前端在 mounted 时立即请求数据，但此时后端可能仍在初始化。

## 优化方案

### 方案1：延迟初始化（Lazy Loading）- 推荐

不要在后端启动时立即初始化 FeatureFactory，改为首次请求时初始化：

```python
# backend/routes/__init__.py
class LazyFeatureFactory:
    _instance = None
    _factory = None
    
    def __getattr__(self, name):
        if self._factory is None:
            self._factory = FeatureFactory(config)
        return getattr(self._factory, name)

feature_factory = LazyFeatureFactory()
```

### 方案2：优化特征计算（向量化操作）

将 `groupby().apply()` 改为向量化计算：

```python
# 优化 _calculate_explore_bonus
def _calculate_explore_bonus(self):
    # 先标记完全正确的记录
    self.df['is_correct'] = (self.df['state'] == '完全正确').astype(int)
    
    # 找到每组第一次完全正确的时间
    first_correct = self.df[self.df['is_correct'] == 1]\
        .groupby(['student_ID', 'title_ID'])['timestamp']\
        .first()\
        .reset_index(name='first_correct_time')
    
    # merge后计算探索次数（向量化操作）
    self.df = self.df.merge(first_correct, on=['student_ID', 'title_ID'], how='left')
    self.df['explore_bonus'] = (self.df['timestamp'] > self.df['first_correct_time']).astype(int)
    self.df['explore_bonus'] = self.df.groupby(['student_ID', 'title_ID'])['explore_bonus'].cumsum()
```

### 方案3：优化哈希计算

不要使用 `df.to_string()`，改用更快的哈希方法：

```python
# 使用 pandas 的 hash 或者更快的哈希方法
import hashlib
data_hash = hash(tuple(pd.util.hash_pandas_object(df, index=True)))
```

### 方案4：添加缓存机制

缓存计算结果，避免重复计算：

```python
import pickle
import hashlib
import os

def get_cache_key(df):
    # 使用数据的哈希值作为缓存key
    return hashlib.md5(pd.util.hash_pandas_object(df).values.tobytes()).hexdigest()

def load_or_compute_features(df):
    cache_key = get_cache_key(df)
    cache_file = f'cache/features_{cache_key}.pkl'
    
    if os.path.exists(cache_file):
        return pickle.load(open(cache_file, 'rb'))
    else:
        result = compute_features(df)
        pickle.dump(result, open(cache_file, 'wb'))
        return result
```

### 方案5：异步初始化

使用线程池异步初始化，让前端先渲染基础界面：

```python
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor

class FeatureFactory:
    _initialized = False
    _executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=1)
    
    def __init__(self, config):
        self.config = config
        # 异步初始化
        self._future = self._executor.submit(self._initialize_features)
        FeatureFactory._initialized = False
    
    def _ensure_initialized(self):
        if not FeatureFactory._initialized:
            self._future.result()  # 等待初始化完成
            FeatureFactory._initialized = True
```

## 立即可实施的快速优化（预计可减少 2-3 秒）

1. 移除哈希计算中的 `df.to_string()`
   ```python
   # 替换 features.py:19
   data_hash = hash(tuple(pd.util.hash_pandas_object(df).values[:100]))  # 只hash前100行
   ```

2. 优化 `explore_bonus` 计算（避免 apply）
   - 使用向量化操作替代 `groupby().apply()`

3. 添加加载提示
   - 前端显示“正在初始化...”的加载状态

需要我帮您实现这些优化吗？建议先做方案1（延迟初始化）+ 方案2（优化特征计算），效果会较明显。

已完成方案2和方案3的优化。总结如下：

## 已完成的优化

### 方案3：优化哈希计算（第19-27行）
- 原方案：使用 `hash(df.to_string())`，对19517行数据转字符串非常慢
- 优化：使用 `pd.util.hash_pandas_object()` 只哈希前1000行
- 预期性能提升：减少1-2秒的哈希计算时间

### 方案2：优化特征计算（向量化操作）

1. `_calculate_time_complexity_bonus()`（第51-56行）
   - 原方案：`df.apply(lambda row: ...)`
   - 优化：使用 `np.where()` 向量化操作
   - 预期性能提升：10-100倍

2. `_calculate_memory_complexity_bonus()`（第58-62行）
   - 原方案：`df.apply(lambda row: ...)`
   - 优化：使用 `np.where()` 向量化操作
   - 预期性能提升：10-100倍

3. `_calculate_error_type_penalty()`（第64-69行）
   - 原方案：`df.apply(lambda row: ...)`
   - 优化：直接使用布尔运算 `(df['state'] != correct_state).astype(int)`
   - 预期性能提升：10-100倍

4. `_calculate_explore_bonus()`（第83-104行）— 最大优化点
   - 原方案：`groupby().apply(calculate_exploration_bonus)`，包含循环和迭代
   - 优化：使用 `merge` + `transform('sum')` 向量化操作
   - 预期性能提升：10-50倍（这是最慢的操作）

## 总体预期性能提升

- 哈希计算：减少 1-2 秒
- 特征计算：减少 2-3 秒
- 总计：启动时间从约 5 秒降至约 1-2 秒

## 注意事项

优化后的逻辑应与原逻辑等价：
- `explore_bonus`：每个组的每行都是该组的总探索次数（与原代码行为一致）
- 其他特征计算：使用向量化操作，结果应相同

可以启动后端测试性能。如需进一步优化（如延迟初始化、缓存机制），我可以继续实现。

\u003cdiv class=\"display-options\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"option-class\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cspan\u003eClass:\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"text-content\"\u003e{{ selectedClasses }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"option-major\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cspan\u003eMajor:\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"text-content\"\u003e{{ selectedMajors }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"config-button\" @click=\"toggleConfigPanel\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"cluster-button\" @click=\"handleClusterClick\"\u003eDISPLAY\u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \r\n  \u003cConfigPanel \r\n    v-if=\"isConfigPanelVisible\"\r\n    @close=\"hideConfigPanel\"\r\n    :selectedClasses=\"selectedClasses\"\r\n    :selectedMajors=\"selectedMajors\"\r\n  /\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapActions } from 'vuex'\r\nimport IconBlock from '@/components/IconBlock.vue'\r\nimport ConfigPanel from './ConfigPanel.vue'\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'NavHeader',\r\n  components: {\r\n    IconBlock,\r\n    ConfigPanel,\r\n  },\r\n  props: {\r\n    brushedStudents: {\r\n      type: Array,\r\n      default: () =\u003e []\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      isConfigPanelVisible: false,\r\n      selectedClasses: 'Part',\r\n      selectedMajors: 'All',\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed:{\r\n    // ...mapGetters(['getSelectedIds'])\r\n  },\r\n  created(){\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['fetchSelectedData']),\r\n   toggleConfigPanel(){\r\n      this.isConfigPanelVisible = !this.isConfigPanelVisible;\r\n    },\r\n    hideConfigPanel(classesText, majorsText){\r\n      this.isConfigPanelVisible = false;\r\n      this.selectedClasses = classesText\r\n      this.selectedMajors = majorsText\r\n    },\r\n    handleClusterClick() {\r\n      // console.log(this.getSelectedIds)\r\n      this.fetchSelectedData(this.getSelection) \r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n};\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter\"\u003eKnowledge:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 555px\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationQ\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\"/\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getQuestions } from '@/api/QuestionView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport { Dropdown, DropdownContent } from 'v-dropdown'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'QuestionView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    Dropdown,\r\n    DropdownContent,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      QuestionData: [],\r\n      uniqueKnowledge: [],\r\n      selectedKnowledge: {},\r\n      selectAllKnowledge: true,\r\n      sortAscending: true, // 默认按升序排序\r\n      difficultyIndex: null,\r\n      // 提交数量和平均分的最大最小值，用于标准化\r\n      submissionMin: null,\r\n      submissionMax: null,\r\n      scoreMin: null,\r\n      scoreMax: null,\r\n    };\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    this.getQuestionData()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters([]),\r\n    displayButton() {\r\n      if (this.selectAllKnowledge) return 'All'\r\n      const selectedCount = Object.values(this.selectedKnowledge).filter(Boolean).length\r\n      if (selectedCount \u003e 0) return 'Part'\r\n      else return 'None'\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getQuestionData() {\r\n      // 获取问题数据\r\n      const { data } = await getQuestions()\r\n      this.QuestionData = data // Flatten the nested structure\r\n      // console.log('Qdata:', data)\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n      this.CheckoutMajors = config.majors.map(item =\u003e ({\r\n        text: item.text,\r\n        checked: backendMajors.includes(item.text)\r\n      }))\r\n      console.log('Config loaded successfully');\r\n    } else {\r\n      console.error('Failed to fetch config data:', response);\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  mounted(){\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    // ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['updateConfig']),\r\n    updateSelectedClasses(selectedClasses, text) {\r\n      this.displayClassesText = text\r\n    },\r\n    updateSelectedMajors(selectedMajors, text) {\r\n      this.displayMajorsText = text\r\n    },\r\n    async submitConfigData(){\r\n      const selectedClasses = this.CheckoutClasses.filter(item =\u003e item.checked).map(item =\u003e item.text)      \r\n      const selectedMajors = this.CheckoutMajors.filter(item =\u003e item.checked).map(item =\u003e item.text)\r\n      if(selectedClasses.length === 0){\r\n        alert('Please select at least one class.')\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      if(selectedMajors.length === 0) {\r\n        alert('Please select at least one major.')\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      console.log('Selected Classes:', selectedClasses)\r\n      console.log('Selected Majors:', selectedMajors)\r\n      this.loading =  true\r\n      const data  = await setConfig(selectedClasses, selectedMajors)\r\n      if(data.status === 200){\r\n        console.log('Config updated successfully')\r\n        // this.closePanel()\r\n        this.$store.commit('SET_CONFIG_LOADED', Date.now()); // 重置状态以触发重新加载\r\n        this.loading = false\r\n        this.closePanel()\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    closePanel() {\r\n      this.$emit('close', this.displayClassesText, this.displayMajorsText)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n};\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n*{\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  padding: 0;\r\n  box-sizing: border-box;\r\n}\r\n@config-panel-width: 400px;\r\n@config-panel-height: 250px;\r\n",

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'ScatterView',\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      svg: null,\r\n      g: null,\r\n      xScale: null,\r\n      yScale: null,\r\n      tooltip: null,\r\n      brushing: null,\r\n      batchSize: 100, // 每批加载的数据量\r\n      currentBatch: 0, // 当前批次索引\r\n      totalBatches: 0, // 总批次数\r\n      allData: [], // 所有数据\r\n      renderedData: [], // 已渲染的数据\r\n      clickedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushEnabled: false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  components: {\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    const { data } = await getScatterData()\r\n    this.allData = data \r\n    this.initChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getColors']),\r\n \r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['toggleSelectedIds']),\r\n    updateChart(event){\r\n      if (!event.selection) return\r\n      function isBrushed(brush_coords, cx, cy) {\r\n           var x0 = brush_coords[0][0],\r\n               x1 = brush_coords[1][0],\r\n               y0 = brush_coords[0][1],\r\n               y1 = brush_coords[1][1];\r\n          return x0 \u003c= cx \u0026\u0026 cx \u003c= x1 \u0026\u0026 y0 \u003c= cy \u0026\u0026 cy \u003c= y1;    // This return TRUE or FALSE depending on if the points is in the selected area\r\n      }\r\n      const extent = event.selection\r\n      const circles = this.g.selectAll('.circle-scatter')\r\n      circles\r\n      .classed(\"selected\", (d) =\u003e{ \r\n        const selected = isBrushed(extent, this.xScale(d.transform.x), this.yScale(d.transform.y))\r\n        if (selected) {\r\n          // console.log(d.student_id)\r\n          this.brushedStudent.add(d.student_id)\r\n        }\r\n        // console.log(this.brushedStudent)\r\n        return selected\r\n      })\r\n      this.updateCircles() // 立即更新圆点样式\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "  right: -70px; /* 距离 config-button 左侧的距离 */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "  z-index: 100; /* 确保 ConfigPanel 在其他元素之上 */\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "\u003c/style\u003e\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "*{\r\n  margin: 0;\r\n  padding: 0;\r\n  box-sizing: border-box;\r\n}\r\n@total_width : 2300px;\r\n.header-container{\r\n  position: relative;\r\n  height: 50px;\r\n  background-color: #2a2a2a;\r\n  border-radius: 5px 5px 0 0;\r\n  .left-label{\r\n    float: left;\r\n    .title{\r\n      float: left;\r\n      color: #fff;\r\n      font-size: 20px;\r\n      font-weight: 700;\r\n      margin-left: 4px;\r\n      line-height: 50px;\r\n    }\r\n    .icon-radar{\r\n      float: left;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  .right-label{\r\n    position: absolute;\r\n    top: 50%;\r\n    right: 3px;\r\n    transform: translateY(-50%);\r\n    padding: 0 20px 0 0;\r\n    display: flex;\r\n    align-items: center;\r\n    justify-content: flex-end;\r\n    .display-options{      \r\n      display: flex;\r\n      align-items: center;\r\n      [class^=\"option-\"]{\r\n        color: #fff;\r\n        padding: 0 20px;\r\n        font-size: 17px;\r\n        display: flex;\r\n        align-items: center;\r\n        span{\r\n          padding: 0 20px 0 0;\r\n        }\r\n        .text-content{\r\n          padding: 0 30px;\r\n          border-bottom: 1px solid #fff;\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    .config-button{\r\n      position: relative;\r\n      margin-left: 20px;\r\n      background-color: #fff;\r\n      background: no-repeat center/60% url('~@/assets/images/settings.png') #fff;\r\n      border-radius: 100%;\r\n      height: 40px;\r\n      width: 40px;\r\n    }\r\n    .cluster-button{\r\n      margin-left: 40px;\r\n      padding: 4px 10px;\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n      border-radius: 5px;\r\n      background-color: #fff;\r\n      cursor: pointer;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n.config-container {\r\n  position: absolute; /* 绝对定位 */\r\n  top: 53px; /* 距离 config-button 底部的距离 */\r\n  right: -70px; /* 距离 config-button 左侧的距离 */\r\n  z-index: 100; /* 确保 ConfigPanel 在其他元素之上 */\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n",

          {

\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters, mapActions } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterStudents } from '@/api/PortraitView'\r\nimport true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      PortraitData: {},\r\n      arc: null,\r\n      radarLine: null,\r\n      ourGroup: [null, null, null],\r\n      hadRender: [false, false, false],\r\n this.getPortraitData()\r\n    this.initialChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getSelectedData', 'getColors']),\r\n  },\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv id=\"question-view\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cspan\u003eQuestion View\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      \u003c!-- 困难度排序按钮 --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"filter difficulty\" @click=\"toggleSortOrder\"\u003eDifficulty Order:{{ this.sortAscending ? \" ↑\" : \" ↓\" }}\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      \u003c!-- 下拉菜单筛选知识点 --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "      \u003cDropdown\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        \u003c!-- trigger element --\u003e\r"

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"question-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003eQuestion View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n      \u003c!-- 困难度排序按钮 --\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"filter difficulty\" @click=\"toggleSortOrder\"\u003eDifficulty Order:{{ this.sortAscending ? \" ↑\" : \" ↓\" }}\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c!-- 下拉菜单筛选知识点 --\u003e\r\n\r\n      \u003cDropdown\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- trigger element --\u003e\r\n        \u003ctemplate #trigger\u003e\r\n          \u003cbutton type=\"button\" style=\"font-weight: bold\"\u003e\r\n            {{ displayButton }}\r\n          \u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003c/template\u003e\r\n        \u003cDropdownContent\u003e\r\n          \u003c!-- contents display in dropdown --\u003e\r\n          \u003cform id=\"checkboxs\" name=\"myForm\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"selectK\" v-for=\"(item, index) in uniqueKnowledge\" :key=\"index\" style=\"border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px\"\u003e\r\n              \u003cinput \r\n              type=\"checkbox\"\r\n              :name=\"item\"\r\n              v-model=\"selectedKnowledge[item]\"\r\n              @change=\"handleKnowledgeCheck\"\r\n              /\u003e\r\n              \u003clabel\r\n              style=\"list-style: none;\r\n              width: 80px;\r\n              border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n              margin-top: 5px;\r\n              padding-bottom: 8px;\r\n              text-align: center;\"\r\n              \u003e\r\n              {{ item }}\r\n            \u003c/label\u003e\r\n          \u003c/div\u003e\r\n          \r\n          \u003cdiv class=\"all\" style=\"border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cinput \r\n            name=\"all\"\r\n            type=\"checkbox\"\r\n            class=\"knowledge-list\"\r\n            v-model=\"selectAllKnowledge\"\r\n            @change=\"handleSelectAllKnowledge\"\r\n            /\u003e\r\n            \u003clabel \r\n            for=\"all\"\r\n            style=\"list-style: none;\r\n            width: 80px;\r\n            border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n            margin-top: 5px;\r\n            padding-bottom: 8px;\r\n            text-align: center;\"\r\n            \u003e\r\n            All\r\n          \u003c/label\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n          \u003c/form\u003e\r\n        \u003c/DropdownContent\u003e\r\n      \u003c/Dropdown\u003e\r\n",

            "text": "class PortraitRoutes:\r"

            "text": "    def __init__(self, feature_factory):\r"

            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {

            "text": "def cluster_everyone(self):\r"

          {

            "text": "        return jsonify(result)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    def cluster_center_students(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        target_stu_info = self.feature_factory.cluster_analysis.get_cluster_center_students_ID()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        # 取出对应student_ID的'circular_bar'和'radar'数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        result = {}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        for student_info in target_stu_info:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            student_ID = student_info['student_ID']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            cluster_index = student_info['cluster']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            # 获取df对应行并转为对应字典\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            # print(self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            knowledge = self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            bonus = self.feature_factory.feature_bonus.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            result[student_ID] = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "                'cluster': cluster_index,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "                'knowledge': knowledge,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "                'bonus': bonus\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "            }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        return jsonify(result), 200\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    def display_students(self):\r"

            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        # 获取请求参数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        if not student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "            return jsonify({\"error\": \"No student IDs provided.\"}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        # 获取相应学生的特征数据\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 48,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        for student_id in student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "                knowledge = self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "                bonus = self.feature_factory.feature_bonus.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 56,

        "originalContents": "\r\n    def cluster_center_students(self):\r\n        target_stu_info = self.feature_factory.cluster_analysis.get_cluster_center_students_ID()\r\n        # 取出对应student_ID的'circular_bar'和'radar'数据\r\n        result = {}\r\n        for student_info in target_stu_info:\r\n            student_ID = student_info['student_ID']\r\n            cluster_index = student_info['cluster']\r\n            # 获取df对应行并转为对应字典\r\n            # print(self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge)\r\n            knowledge = self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r\n            bonus = self.feature_factory.feature_bonus.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r\n            result[student_ID] = {\r\n                'cluster': cluster_index,\r\n                'knowledge': knowledge,\r\n                'bonus': bonus\r\n            }\r\n        return jsonify(result), 200\r\n    \r\n    def display_students(self):\r\n        # 获取请求参数\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n        if not student_ids:\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": \"No student IDs provided.\"}), 400\r\n\r\n        # 获取相应学生的特征数据\r\n        result = {}\r\n        for student_id in student_ids:\r\n            try:\r\n                knowledge = self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r\n                bonus = self.feature_factory.feature_bonus.loc[student_id].to_dict()\r\n                result[student_id] = {\r\n                    'knowledge': knowledge,\r\n                    'bonus': bonus\r\n                }\r\n            except KeyError:\r\n                result[student_id] = {\r\n                    'error': f\"Student ID {student_id} not found.\"\r\n                }\r\n\r\n        return jsonify(result), 200\r\n    # 以下弃用，使用依赖注入而非观察者模式\r\n    # def update_data(self):\r\n    #     self.cluster_analysis = self.feature_factory.cluster_analysis\r\n    #     self.feature_bonus = self.feature_factory.feature_bonus\r\n    #     self.feature_knowledge = self.feature_factory.feature_knowledge\r\n\r\n    # def cluster_center_students(self):\r\n    #     self.update_data()\r\n    #     target_stu_info = self.cluster_analysis.get_cluster_center_students_ID()\r\n    #     # 取出对应student_ID的'circular_bar'和'radar'数据\r\n    #     result = {}\r\n    #     for student_info in target_stu_info:\r\n    #         student_ID = student_info['student_ID']\r\n    #         cluster_index = student_info['cluster']\r\n    #         # 获取df对应行并转为对应字典\r\n    #         knowledge = self.feature_knowledge.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r\n    #         bonus = self.feature_bonus.loc[student_ID].to_dict()\r\n    #         result[student_ID] = {\r\n    #             'cluster': cluster_index,\r\n    #             'knowledge': knowledge,\r\n    #             'bonus': bonus\r\n    #         }\r\n    #     return jsonify(result)",

            "text": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv id=\"scatter-chart\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cspan\u003eScatter View\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "      \u003cbutton class=\"brush-button\" @click=\"toggleBrush\"\u003e\r"

          {

            "text": "      \u003c!-- \u003cbutton class=\"click-button\" @click=\"toggleBrush\"\u003e\u003c/button\u003e --\u003e\r"

            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      \u003cdiv class=\"label\" v-for=\"(color, i) in getColors\" :key=\"i\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        cluster{{i}}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"color-box\" :style=\"{ backgroundColor: color }\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },

          },

            "text": "    \u003cdiv\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationS\" ref=\"visualizationS\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=loading /\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "      \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "import { getScatterData } from '@/api/ScatterView'\r"
          },

          },

            "text": "export default {\r"

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"scatter-chart\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003eScatter View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n      \u003cbutton class=\"brush-button\" @click=\"toggleBrush\"\u003e\r\n      \u003c/button\u003e\r\n      \u003c!-- \u003cbutton class=\"click-button\" @click=\"toggleBrush\"\u003e\u003c/button\u003e --\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"label\" v-for=\"(color, i) in getColors\" :key=\"i\"\u003e\r\n        cluster{{i}}\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"color-box\" :style=\"{ backgroundColor: color }\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationS\" ref=\"visualizationS\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=loading /\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getScatterData } from '@/api/ScatterView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapActions, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n",

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

'black' : 'none')\r\n          .attr('stroke-width', d =\u003e this.clickedStudent.has(d.student_id) || this.brushedStudent.has(d.student_id) ? 2 : 1)\r\n          .attr('opacity', d =\u003e this.clickedStudent.has(d.student_id) || this.brushedStudent.has(d.student_id) ? 1 : 0.8)\r\n          // .classed('selected', d =\u003e this.brushedStudent.has(d.student_id))\r\n          .on('click', (e, d) =\u003e {\r\n            if(this.clickedStudent.has(d.student_id)){\r\n              this.clickedStudent.delete(d.student_id)\r\n            }\r\n            else this.clickedStudent.add(d.student_id)\r\n            this.updateCircles()\r\n            // console.log(this.clickedStudent)\r\n          })\r\n          .on('mouseover', (e, d) =\u003e {\r\n            this.tooltip.style('visibility', 'visible')\r\n                .html(&#96;student: ${d.student_id} \u003cbr\u003ecluster: ${d.cluster}&#96;)\r\n                .style('left', &#96;${e.pageX + 10}px&#96;)\r\n                .style('top', &#96;${e.pageY + 10}px&#96;)\r\n          })\r\n          .on('mouseout', () =\u003e {\r\n            this.tooltip.style('visibility', 'hidden')\r\n          })\r\n\r\n      circles.exit().remove()\r\n\r\n      this.currentBatch++\r\n      setTimeout(() =\u003e this.renderNextBatch(), 0) // 使用setTimeout来模拟异步加载\r\n      \r\n      \r\n    },\r\n    updateCircles() {\r\n      // 使用 enter-update-exit 模式\r\n      const circles = this.g.selectAll('.circle-scatter')\r\n          .data(this.renderedData, d =\u003e d.student_id)\r\n",
