            "text": "    loadStudentPanel(index) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      if (this.visibleIndices.has(index)) return // 如果已经加载过，则跳过\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "      const width = 440 // SVG 宽度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "      const studentTitleHeight = 30 // 学生标题高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "      const labelPadding = 5 // 标签内边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "      const labelMargin = 20 // 标签外边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "      const labelContent = ['name', 'class', 'major'] // 标签内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 10, left: 20 } // 边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "      const padding = { top: 5, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 5 } // 内边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "      const studentTipHeight = 40 // 学生提示高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "      const tipBlockWidth = (width - margin.right - margin.left) / 3 // 提示块宽度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "      const tipContent = ['Knowledge', 'State', 'Score'] // 提示内容\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationStu') // 选择 SVG 元素\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "      const s = this.filteredTreeData[index]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "      this.currentCluster = this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.name] // 设置当前集群\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "      const studentPanelHeight = studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight + margin.bottom // 计算学生面板高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "      const varToggleFunc = this.togglePanelHeight\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "      const studentPanel = g.append('svg') // 创建学生面板\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${0})&#96;)  \r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "        .attr('class', 'student-panel')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        .attr('width', width - margin.left - margin.right)\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "        .attr('height', studentPanelHeight)\r"

          {

            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "        .on(\"click\", function() {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "          // 点击时，切换面板的高度\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "      let nowBoxStartPosition = 0\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,

          },

            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    loadStudentPanel(index) {\r\n      if (this.visibleIndices.has(index)) return // 如果已经加载过，则跳过\r\n\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const width = 440 // SVG 宽度\r\n      const studentTitleHeight = 30 // 学生标题高度\r\n      const labelPadding = 5 // 标签内边距\r\n      const labelMargin = 20 // 标签外边距\r\n      const labelContent = ['name', 'class', 'major'] // 标签内容\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 10, left: 20 } // 边距\r\n      const padding = { top: 5, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 5 } // 内边距\r\n      const studentTipHeight = 40 // 学生提示高度\r\n      const tipBlockWidth = (width - margin.right - margin.left) / 3 // 提示块宽度\r\n      const tipContent = ['Knowledge', 'State', 'Score'] // 提示内容\r\n\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationStu') // 选择 SVG 元素\r\n\r\n      const g = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n      \r\n      const s = this.filteredTreeData[index]\r\n      \r\n      this.currentCluster = this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.name] // 设置当前集群\r\n      const studentPanelHeight = studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight + margin.bottom // 计算学生面板高度\r\n      const varToggleFunc = this.togglePanelHeight\r\n      const studentPanel = g.append('svg') // 创建学生面板\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${0})&#96;)  \r\n        .attr('class', 'student-panel')\r\n        .attr('width', width - margin.left - margin.right)\r\n        .attr('height', studentPanelHeight)\r\n        // .attr('height', this.PanelsHeight[index])\r\n        .style('box-shadow', '0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)')\r\n        .on(\"click\", function() {\r\n          // 点击时，切换面板的高度\r\n          varToggleFunc(d3.select(this), index)\r\n        })\r\n\r\n      const sg = studentPanel.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${studentTitleHeight})&#96;)\r\n",
        "range": {

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'StudentView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      loading: false, // 加载状态\r\n      treeData: [], // 树形数据\r\n      currentCluster: null, // 当前集群\r\n      selectedMajor: '', // 选中的专业\r\n      factLength: null, // 实际的学生数量\r\n      PanelsHeight: [], // 面板高度\r\n      visibleIndices: new Set(), // 可见的学生索引集合\r\n      expandedIndices: new Set(), // 展开的学生索引集合\r\n      batchSize: 20, // 每次加载的数量\r\n      uniqueMajors: [] // 唯一的专业列表\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredTreeData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedMajor) return this.treeData\r\n      return this.treeData.filter(student =\u003e student.major === this.selectedMajor)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n    \r\n  },\r\n  mounted() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getTreeData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data: { children } } = await getStudents(stu_ids) // 获取学生树形数据\r\n      // console.log('studentData', children)\r\n      // 筛选出选中的学生数据\r\n      this.treeData = children\r\n      this.factLength = children.length // 设置实际的学生数量\r\n      this.PanelsHeight = new Array(this.factLength).fill(0) // 初始化学生面板高度数组\r\n      this.uniqueMajors = [...new Set(children.map(student =\u003e student.major))] // 获取唯一的专业列表\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    renderQuestions(svg, questions, th) {\r\n      if (!questions || questions.length === 0) return // 如果没有问题，直接返回\r\n",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    getColors: state =\u003e state.colors,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "})"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n  actions: {\r\n    // 后端获取数据:{stu_id: cluster}\r\n    async fetchClusterData(context) {\r\n      const { data } = await getClusterEveryone()\r\n      context.commit('setStudentClusterInfo', data)\r\n    },\r\n    // 前端交互获得被选中的学生id\r\n    toggleSelectedIds(context, student_ids){\r\n      context.commit('setSelectedStudents', student_ids)\r\n      // console.log('selectedStudentIds', student_ids)\r\n    },\r\n    // 后端获取被选中的学生数据\r\n    /**\r\n     * 返回的数据格式：\r\n     * stu_id:{\r\n     *  \"bonus\": {xxx},\r\n     *  \"knowledge\": {xxx}\r\n     * } \r\n     */\r\n    async fetchSelectedData(context){\r\n      const { data } = await getSelectedData(context.state.selectedStudentIds)\r\n      const selectedStudentData = {}\r\n      for(let i = 0; i \u003c context.state.selectedStudentIds.length; i++){\r\n        selectedStudentData[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]] = {\r\n          ...data[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]],\r\n          cluster: context.state.studentClusterInfo[context.state.selectedStudentIds[i]]\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      context.commit('setSelectedStudentData', selectedStudentData)\r\n      // alert('已获取被选择数据')\r\n    },\r\n  },\r\n  getters: {\r\n    getConfigLoaded: state =\u003e state.configLoaded,\r\n    getStudentClusterInfo: state =\u003e state.studentClusterInfo,\r\n    getSelectedIds: state =\u003e state.selectedStudentIds,\r\n    getSelectedData: state =\u003e state.selectedStudentData,\r\n    getColors: state =\u003e state.colors,\r\n  }\r\n})",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 73
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 52,
            "line": 2
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/store/index.js"
      },
      "score": 0.41742849349975586
    },

        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'ScatterView',\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      svg: null,\r\n      g: null,\r\n      xScale: null,\r\n      yScale: null,\r\n      tooltip: null,\r\n      brushing: null,\r\n      batchSize: 100, // 每批加载的数据量\r\n      currentBatch: 0, // 当前批次索引\r\n      totalBatches: 0, // 总批次数\r\n      allData: [], // 所有数据\r\n      renderedData: [], // 已渲染的数据\r\n      clickedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushEnabled: false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  components: {\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    const { data } = await getScatterData()\r\n    this.allData = data \r\n    this.initChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getColors']),\r\n \r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['toggleSelectedIds']),\r\n    updateChart(event){\r\n      if (!event.selection) return\r\n      function isBrushed(brush_coords, cx, cy) {\r\n           var x0 = brush_coords[0][0],\r\n               x1 = brush_coords[1][0],\r\n               y0 = brush_coords[0][1],\r\n               y1 = brush_coords[1][1];\r\n          return x0 \u003c= cx \u0026\u0026 cx \u003c= x1 \u0026\u0026 y0 \u003c= cy \u0026\u0026 cy \u003c= y1;    // This return TRUE or FALSE depending on if the points is in the selected area\r\n      }\r\n      const extent = event.selection\r\n      const circles = this.g.selectAll('.circle-scatter')\r\n      circles\r\n      .classed(\"selected\", (d) =\u003e{ \r\n        const selected = isBrushed(extent, this.xScale(d.transform.x), this.yScale(d.transform.y))\r\n        if (selected) {\r\n          // console.log(d.student_id)\r\n          this.brushedStudent.add(d.student_id)\r\n        }\r\n        // console.log(this.brushedStudent)\r\n        return selected\r\n      })\r\n      this.updateCircles() // 立即更新圆点样式\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { getClusterEveryone } from '@/api/ParallelView.js'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { getSelectedData } from '@/api/NavHeader.js'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "export default createStore({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  state: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    configLoaded: 0,    // 表示后端配置是否加载完成\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    studentClusterInfo: {}, // 存储从后端获取的聚类数据,key:stu_id,value:cluster\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    selectedStudentIds: [], // 存储选中的学生 ID ，从前端交互而来\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    selectedStudentData: [], // 对应的学生各项指标数据，需要从后端获取\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    colors: ['#ff7f00', '#377eb8', '#4daf4a'],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  mutations: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    // 更新 configLoaded 状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    SET_CONFIG_LOADED(state, value) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "      state.configLoaded = value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    // 设置 studentClusterInfo\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    setStudentClusterInfo(state, data) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "      state.studentClusterInfo = data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    // 切换学生 ID 的选中状态（添加或移除）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    setSelectedStudents(state, student_ids){\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      state.selectedStudentIds = student_ids\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    // 设置selectedStudentData\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    setSelectedStudentData(state, students_data){\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      state.selectedStudentData = students_data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  actions: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    // 后端获取数据:{stu_id: cluster}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    async fetchClusterData(context) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "      const { data } = await getClusterEveryone()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    }"

        ],
        "originalContents": "import { createStore } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterEveryone } from '@/api/ParallelView.js'\r\nimport { getSelectedData } from '@/api/NavHeader.js'\r\n\r\n\r\nexport default createStore({\r\n  state: {\r\n    configLoaded: 0,    // 表示后端配置是否加载完成\r\n    studentClusterInfo: {}, // 存储从后端获取的聚类数据,key:stu_id,value:cluster\r\n    selectedStudentIds: [], // 存储选中的学生 ID ，从前端交互而来\r\n    selectedStudentData: [], // 对应的学生各项指标数据，需要从后端获取\r\n    colors: ['#ff7f00', '#377eb8', '#4daf4a'],\r\n  },\r\n  mutations: {\r\n    // 更新 configLoaded 状态\r\n    SET_CONFIG_LOADED(state, value) {\r\n      state.configLoaded = value;\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置 studentClusterInfo\r\n    setStudentClusterInfo(state, data) {\r\n      state.studentClusterInfo = data\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 切换学生 ID 的选中状态（添加或移除）\r\n    setSelectedStudents(state, student_ids){\r\n      state.selectedStudentIds = student_ids\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    // 设置selectedStudentData\r\n    setSelectedStudentData(state, students_data){\r\n      state.selectedStudentData = students_data\r\n    },\r\n  },",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 73
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import request from '@/utils/request'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "// 获取学生视图相关数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "export const getStudents = (selectedIds) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  return request.get('student/tree_data',selectedIds ? {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    params: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "      student_ids: selectedIds\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  } : null)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "}"

        "originalContents": "\r\n    loadStudentPanel(index) {\r\n      if (this.visibleIndices.has(index)) return // 如果已经加载过，则跳过\r\n\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const width = 440 // SVG 宽度\r\n      const studentTitleHeight = 30 // 学生标题高度\r\n      const labelPadding = 5 // 标签内边距\r\n      const labelMargin = 20 // 标签外边距\r\n      const labelContent = ['name', 'class', 'major'] // 标签内容\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 10, left: 20 } // 边距\r\n      const padding = { top: 5, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 5 } // 内边距\r\n      const studentTipHeight = 40 // 学生提示高度\r\n      const tipBlockWidth = (width - margin.right - margin.left) / 3 // 提示块宽度\r\n      const tipContent = ['Knowledge', 'State', 'Score'] // 提示内容\r\n\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationStu') // 选择 SVG 元素\r\n\r\n      const g = svg.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n      \r\n      const s = this.filteredTreeData[index]\r\n      \r\n      this.currentCluster = this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.name] // 设置当前集群\r\n      const studentPanelHeight = studentTitleHeight + studentTipHeight + margin.bottom // 计算学生面板高度\r\n      const varToggleFunc = this.togglePanelHeight\r\n      const studentPanel = g.append('svg') // 创建学生面板\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${0})&#96;)  \r\n        .attr('class', 'student-panel')\r\n        .attr('width', width - margin.left - margin.right)\r\n        .attr('height', studentPanelHeight)\r\n        // .attr('height', this.PanelsHeight[index])\r\n        .style('box-shadow', '0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)')\r\n        .on(\"click\", function() {\r\n          // 点击时，切换面板的高度\r\n          varToggleFunc(d3.select(this), index)\r\n        })\r\n\r\n      const sg = studentPanel.append('g') // 创建一个新的组\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left}, ${studentTitleHeight})&#96;)\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 40,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,

            "text": "  name: 'WeekView',\r"

            "text": "  components: {\r"

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      showPeakView: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      selectedDay: 5\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 58,

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,

          },

            "text": "    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r"

          {

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 67,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  async created() {\r"

            "lineNumber": 73,

          },

          },

          {

            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "      const height = 600\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r"

          {

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 98,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'WeekView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      WeekData: [],\r\n      PeakData:[],\r\n      selectedKind: '',\r\n      showPeakView: false,\r\n      selectedDay: 5\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredWeekData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r\n      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    },\r\n    filteredPeakData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r\n      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r\n      this.WeekData = data\r\n      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r\n      this.renderWeekData()\r\n    },\r\n    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r\n      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r\n      this.PeakData = data\r\n      this.renderPeakData()\r\n    },\r\n    renderWeekData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 600\r\n      const width = 1000\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r\n      const stu_icon = 40\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r\n\r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r\n\r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 102
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 39
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "        { text: 'features', lineStyle: 'dashed' }\r"
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "      legendItems.forEach((item, index) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        const y = index * 20 + 10\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        svg.append('line')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "          .attr('x1', 0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "          .attr('y1', y)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "          .attr('x2', 80)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "          .attr('y2', y)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "          .style('stroke', 'black')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "          .style('stroke-width', 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "          .style('stroke-dasharray', item.lineStyle === 'dashed' ? '4, 4' : '')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "        svg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "          .attr('x', 90)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "          .attr('y', y + 5)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "          .text(item.text)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "          .style('font-size', '0.6em')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "          .style('text-anchor', 'start')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "      })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "    renderSelectedData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "      // const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "      const selectedData = this.getSelectedData\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "      // 分别渲染三种类型数据平均值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "      for (let kind = 0; kind \u003c 3; kind++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "        // 筛选出i类数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "        const data = Object.values(selectedData).filter(d =\u003e d.cluster === kind)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "        // 如果没有，则不渲染\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "        if (data.length === 0) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "          continue\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "        console.log(data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "        // 计算当前类中所有学生的指标平均值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428,
            "text": "        const calculateAverage = (datum) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429,
            "text": "          // 初始化平均值对象\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 430,
            "text": "          const avgBonus = {}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 431,
            "text": "          const avgKnowledge = {}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 432,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 433,
            "text": "            // 初始化各项指标的总和\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 434,
            "text": "            this.radar_dimension.forEach(feature =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 435,
            "text": "            avgBonus[feature] = 0;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 436,
            "text": "          })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 437,
            "text": "          Object.keys(datum[0].knowledge).forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438,
            "text": "            avgKnowledge[knowledge] = 0;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 439,

          {
            "lineNumber": 440,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441,
            "text": "          // 计算各项指标的总和\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 442,
            "text": "          datum.forEach(item =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 443,
            "text": "            this.radar_dimension.forEach(feature =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 444,
            "text": "              avgBonus[feature] += item.bonus[feature];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 446,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447,
            "text": "            Object.keys(item.knowledge).forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448,
            "text": "              avgKnowledge[knowledge] += item.knowledge[knowledge];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449,
            "text": "            })\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 450,
            "text": "          })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 451,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 452,
            "text": "          // 计算平均值\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      legendItems.forEach((item, index) =\u003e {\r\n        const y = index * 20 + 10\r\n        svg.append('line')\r\n          .attr('x1', 0)\r\n          .attr('y1', y)\r\n          .attr('x2', 80)\r\n          .attr('y2', y)\r\n          .style('stroke', 'black')\r\n          .style('stroke-width', 1)\r\n          .style('stroke-dasharray', item.lineStyle === 'dashed' ? '4, 4' : '')\r\n        \r\n        svg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', 90)\r\n          .attr('y', y + 5)\r\n          .text(item.text)\r\n          .style('font-size', '0.6em')\r\n          .style('text-anchor', 'start')\r\n      })\r\n    },\r\n    renderSelectedData() {\r\n      // const d3 = this.$d3\r\n\r\n      const selectedData = this.getSelectedData\r\n      // 分别渲染三种类型数据平均值\r\n      for (let kind = 0; kind \u003c 3; kind++) {\r\n        // 筛选出i类数据\r\n        const data = Object.values(selectedData).filter(d =\u003e d.cluster === kind)\r\n        // 如果没有，则不渲染\r\n        \r\n        if (data.length === 0) {\r\n          continue\r\n        }\r\n        console.log(data)\r\n        // 计算当前类中所有学生的指标平均值\r\n        const calculateAverage = (datum) =\u003e {\r\n          // 初始化平均值对象\r\n          const avgBonus = {}\r\n          const avgKnowledge = {}\r\n\r\n            // 初始化各项指标的总和\r\n            this.radar_dimension.forEach(feature =\u003e {\r\n            avgBonus[feature] = 0;\r\n          })\r\n          Object.keys(datum[0].knowledge).forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r\n            avgKnowledge[knowledge] = 0;\r\n          })\r\n\r\n          // 计算各项指标的总和\r\n          datum.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n            this.radar_dimension.forEach(feature =\u003e {\r\n              avgBonus[feature] += item.bonus[feature];\r\n            })\r\n\r\n            Object.keys(item.knowledge).forEach(knowledge =\u003e {\r\n              avgKnowledge[knowledge] += item.knowledge[knowledge];\r\n            })\r\n          })\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"portrait-view\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003ePortrait View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"vis-container\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"vis-panel\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=\"loading\" /\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization0\" ref=\"visualization0\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization1\" ref=\"visualization1\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"visualization2\" ref=\"visualization2\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-bar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-radar\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv id=\"label-legend\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters, mapActions } from 'vuex'\r\nimport { getClusterStudents } from '@/api/PortraitView'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'PortraitView',\r\n  components:{\r\n    LoadingSpinner,\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      PortraitData: {},\r\n      arc: null,\r\n      radarLine: null,\r\n      ourGroup: [null, null, null],\r\n      hadRender: [false, false, false],\r\n      radar_dimension: [\r\n          'Error-Free Bonus', \r\n          'Test-Free Bonus',\r\n          'Score',\r\n          'Explore', \r\n          'Mem Bonus', \r\n          'TC Bonus', \r\n          'Rank',\r\n          'Enthusiasm', \r\n        ] //便于控制指标渲染顺序\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  created() {\r\n    this.hadRender = [false, false, false]\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    await this.getPortraitData()\r\n    this.initialChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getSelectedData', 'getColors']),\r\n  },\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "},\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n#student-view {\r\n  .title {\r\n    font-size: 20px;\r\n    font-weight: bold;\r\n    margin-left: 10px;\r\n    margin-top: 10px;\r\n    padding: 5px;\r\n    padding-top: 0;\r\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n    .filter {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      margin-right: 5px;\r\n      font-size: 17px;\r\n      font-weight: 400;\r\n    }\r\n    .filter-input {\r\n      float: right;\r\n      width: 100px;\r\n      height: 26px;\r\n      margin-right: 10px;\r\n      border: 1px solid #ccc;\r\n      border-radius: 4px;\r\n      padding: 2px;\r\n      font-size: 14px;\r\n    }\r\n    .filter{\r\n      font-weight: bold;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  .wait-prompt{\r\n    position: absolute;\r\n    top: 50%;\r\n    left: 50%;\r\n    transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-50%);;\r\n    font-size: 30px;\r\n    font-weight: bold;\r\n    color: #eee;\r\n  }\r\n  .student-panel {\r\n    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\r\n    cursor: pointer;\r\n    /*超出页面增加滚动效果*/\r\n    overflow-y: scroll;\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n/deep/ .simplebar-vertical {\r\n  width: 16px;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    handleScroll() {\r\n      const container = this.$refs.scrollContainer.querySelector('.simplebar-content-wrapper')\r\n      const scrollPosition = container.scrollTop\r\n      const containerHeight = container.clientHeight\r\n      // const totalHeight = container.scrollHeight\r\n\r\n      const panelHeight = 100 // 假设每个面板的高度为80px，可以根据实际情况调整\r\n\r\n      const startIdx = Math.floor(scrollPosition / panelHeight)\r\n      const endIdx = Math.ceil((scrollPosition + containerHeight) / panelHeight)\r\n\r\n      for (let i = startIdx; i \u003c= endIdx \u0026\u0026 i \u003c this.filteredTreeData.length; i++) {\r\n        this.loadStudentPanel(i)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    togglePanelHeight(element, index) {\r\n      const targetHeight = this.expandedIndices.has(index) ? 80 : this.PanelsHeight[index]\r\n      element\r\n        .transition()\r\n        .duration(400)  // 动画时长 300ms\r\n        .attr(\"height\", targetHeight)\r\n      \r\n      if (this.expandedIndices.has(index)) {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.delete(index)\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.expandedIndices.add(index)\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n\r\n    applyFilter() {\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.visibleIndices.clear() // 清空可见索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.expandedIndices.clear() // 清空展开索引集合并重新加载\r\n      this.$refs.visualizationStu.innerHTML = '' // 清空现有内容\r\n      if(render){\r\n        await this.getTreeData(this.getSelectedIds) // 初始化时获取学生数据\r\n        this.loadInitialBatch() // 重新加载初始批次的数据\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  ",

_**Agent (default)**_

已修复该问题。修复内容：

## 修复内容

### 1. **NavHeader.vue** - 修复 DISPLAY 按钮点击逻辑
- 问题：使用了不存在的 `this.getSelection` 变量
- 修复：
  - 添加 `mapGetters` 获取 `getSelectedIds`
  - 移除错误的参数传递（`fetchSelectedData` action 不需要参数）
  - 添加空数组检查：如果没有选中学生，提示用户

### 2. **store/index.js** - 增强错误处理
- 问题：如果 `selectedStudentIds` 为空数组，可能会导致后续处理出错
- 修复：
  - 在 `fetchSelectedData` action 开始处检查空数组
  - 添加数据验证，确保后端返回的数据存在
  - 添加 try-catch 错误处理，避免崩溃

### 3. **ScatterView.vue** - 同步选中状态到 store
- 问题：点击圆点只更新了本地状态，没有同步到 store
- 修复：
  - 点击圆点时，合并 `clickedStudent` 和 `brushedStudent`，并同步更新到 store
  - 确保 DISPLAY 按钮能获取到最新的选中学生 ID

## 现在的行为

1. 未选中任何点就点击 DISPLAY：会显示提示 "Please select at least one student point in the Scatter View before clicking DISPLAY."
2. 选中点后点击 DISPLAY：正常获取并显示选中学生的数据
3. 点击圆点或刷选：自动同步更新到 store，DISPLAY 按钮可以立即使用

可以测试一下，应该不会再报错了。

---

        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 定义半径缩放尺\r\n      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, 1])\r\n        .range([innerRadius, outerRadius])\r\n\r\n      // 定义曲线生成器\r\n      const arc = d3.arc()\r\n        .innerRadius(innerRadius)\r\n        .outerRadius(d =\u003e radiusY(d.value))\r\n        .startAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge))\r\n        .endAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge) + angleX.bandwidth())\r\n        .padAngle(0.05)\r\n        .padRadius(innerRadius)\r\n      const colors = this.getColors\r\n      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo\r\n       filteredWeekData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id]\r\n        // console.log(kind)\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind]\r\n\r\n        // 定义legend组\r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生名称\r\n        const labelPadding = 5 // 背景矩形的内边距\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5))\r\n\r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r\n",

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'WeekView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      WeekData: [],\r\n      PeakData:[],\r\n      selectedKind: '',\r\n      showPeakView: false,\r\n      selectedDay: 5\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredWeekData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r\n      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    },\r\n    filteredPeakData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r\n      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r\n      this.WeekData = data\r\n      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r\n      this.renderWeekData()\r\n    },\r\n    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r\n      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r\n      this.PeakData = data\r\n      this.renderPeakData()\r\n    },\r\n    renderWeekData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 600\r\n      const width = 1000\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r\n      const stu_icon = 40\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r\n\r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r\n\r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r\n",

          "startPosition": {

          {
            "lineNumber": 400,

          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n      filteredPeakData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id;\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks;\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id];\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind];\r\n      \r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n      \r\n        const labelPadding = 5;\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5));\r\n      \r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox();\r\n      \r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child')\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0');\r\n      \r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png';\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar);\r\n      \r\n        const peaKHeight = 25;\r\n        const peakWidth = weekWidth / 2;\r\n      \r\n        const positionYBase = studentsY(i) + 4 * studentsY.bandwidth() / 5;\r\n      ",

        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 添加 tooltip\r\n      const tooltip = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\r\n        .attr(\"class\", \"tooltip\")\r\n        .style(\"position\", \"absolute\")\r\n        .style(\"text-align\", \"center\")\r\n        .style(\"padding\", \"4px\")\r\n        .style(\"background\", \"#fff\")\r\n        .style(\"border\", \"0px\")\r\n        .style(\"border-radius\", \"8px\")\r\n        .style(\"pointer-events\", \"none\")\r\n        .style(\"font-size\", \"12px\")\r\n        .style(\"opacity\", 0);\r\n    \r\n      // 区分x轴奇数列\r\n      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r\n        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r\n          rg.append('rect')\r\n            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r\n            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5')\r\n            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r\n            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r\n        }\r\n      \r\n        rg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r\n          .attr('y', 0)\r\n          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .attr('font-size', 14)\r\n          .attr('font-weight', 'bold');\r\n      }\r\n    \r\n      const colors = this.getColors;\r\n      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo;\r\n    ",

          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "      // 定义缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "      // 计算每个周的宽度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "          rg.append('rect')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        // 绘制每个周的标签\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        rg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "          .attr('y', 0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "          .attr('font-size', 14)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "      const radius = width / 24\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "      const outerRadius = radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      // 定义角度缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        .domain(knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      // 定义半径缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n      const g = svg.append('g')\r\n\r\n      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n      // 定义缩放尺\r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r\n\r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r\n\r\n      // 计算每个周的宽度\r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r\n\r\n      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r\n      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r\n        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r\n          rg.append('rect')\r\n            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r\n            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r\n            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r\n            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 绘制每个周的标签\r\n        rg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r\n          .attr('y', 0)\r\n          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .attr('font-size', 14)\r\n          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r\n      const radius = width / 24\r\n      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r\n      const outerRadius = radius\r\n      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r\n\r\n      // 定义角度缩放尺\r\n      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(knowledge)\r\n        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r\n        .align(0)\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194,
            "text": "        // 添加背景矩形\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195,
            "text": "        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196,
            "text": "          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,
            "text": "          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199,
            "text": "          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200,
            "text": "          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201,
            "text": "          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202,
            "text": "          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204,
            "text": "        // 渲染学生头像\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206,
            "text": "        lg.append('image')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207,
            "text": "          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 208,
            "text": "          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209,
            "text": "          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210,
            "text": "          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211,
            "text": "          .attr('href', userAvatar)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 213,
            "text": "        // 对每一周\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214,
            "text": "        student_weeks.forEach(w =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215,
            "text": "          const position = &#96;translate(${weekX(w.week) + weekWidth}, ${studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2})&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216,
            "text": "          const radarChartG = rg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 217,
            "text": "            .attr('class', 'radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 218,
            "text": "            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 219,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220,
            "text": "          // 绘制柱状图\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221,
            "text": "          radarChartG.selectAll('.radar')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 222,
            "text": "            .data(this.transformScores(w.scores))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223,
            "text": "            .enter()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 224,
            "text": "            .append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225,
            "text": "            .append(\"path\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 226,
            "text": "            .attr('fill', &#96;${student_color}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227,
            "text": "            .attr('d', arc)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 229,
            "text": "          // 绘制标签圆\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 230,
            "text": "          const labelOuterRadius = innerRadius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 231,
            "text": "          const labelInnerRadius = 0.7 * labelOuterRadius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232,
            "text": "          const innerCircleRadius = 0.8 * labelInnerRadius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "          const labelArc = d3.arc()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,

          },
          {

            "text": "            .startAngle(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "            .endAngle(Math.PI * 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "text": "          const circleOuterData = [{\r"
          },

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        // 添加背景矩形\r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生头像\r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png'\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar)\r\n\r\n        // 对每一周\r\n        student_weeks.forEach(w =\u003e {\r\n          const position = &#96;translate(${weekX(w.week) + weekWidth}, ${studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2})&#96;\r\n          const radarChartG = rg.append('g')\r\n            .attr('class', 'radar')\r\n            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制柱状图\r\n          radarChartG.selectAll('.radar')\r\n            .data(this.transformScores(w.scores))\r\n            .enter()\r\n            .append('g')\r\n            .append(\"path\")\r\n            .attr('fill', &#96;${student_color}&#96;)\r\n            .attr('d', arc)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制标签圆\r\n          const labelOuterRadius = innerRadius\r\n          const labelInnerRadius = 0.7 * labelOuterRadius\r\n          const innerCircleRadius = 0.8 * labelInnerRadius\r\n          const labelArc = d3.arc()\r\n            .innerRadius(d =\u003e d.r1)\r\n            .outerRadius(d =\u003e d.r2)\r\n            .startAngle(0)\r\n            .endAngle(Math.PI * 2)\r\n",
        "range": {

          "startPosition": {
            "line": 190

        "originalContents": "\r\n          const circleOuterData = [{\r\n            r1: labelInnerRadius,\r\n            r2: labelOuterRadius\r\n          }]\r\n          // const circleMiddleData = [{\r\n          //   r1: innerCircleRadius,\r\n          //   r2: labelInnerRadius\r\n          // }]\r\n          const circleInnerData = [{\r\n            r1: 0,\r\n            r2: innerCircleRadius\r\n          }]\r\n          // outer外圈圆\r\n          const labelOG = rg.append('g')\r\n            .attr('class', 'label-circle')\r\n            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n          // middle灰色圈\r\n          // const labelMG = rg.append('g')\r\n          //   .attr('class', 'label-circle')\r\n          //   .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n          // 外围白色圈\r\n          const labelG = rg.append('g')\r\n            .attr('class', 'label-circle')\r\n            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n\r\n          labelOG.selectAll('.label-circle')\r\n            .data(circleOuterData)\r\n            .enter()\r\n            .append('g')\r\n            .append(\"path\")\r\n            .attr('fill', &#96;${'#FFFFFF'}&#96;)\r\n            .attr('d', labelArc)\r\n\r\n          // labelMG.selectAll('.label-circle')\r\n          //   .data(circleMiddleData)\r\n          //   .enter()\r\n          //   .append('g')\r\n          //   .append(\"path\")\r\n          //   .attr('fill', &#96;${'#eee'}&#96;)\r\n          //   .attr('d', labelArc)\r\n\r\n          labelG.selectAll('.label-circle')\r\n            .data(circleInnerData)\r\n            .enter()\r\n            .append('g')\r\n            .append(\"path\")\r\n            .attr('fill', &#96;${student_color}&#96;)\r\n            .attr('opacity', 0.5)\r\n            .attr('d', labelArc)\r\n        }) // forEach.w\r\n      ",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    renderPeakData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "      const height = 600;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "      const width = 1000;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "      const stu_icon = 40;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "      // 定义维度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "      );\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "      // 添加 tooltip\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "      const tooltip = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "}) // forEach.s\r\n    },\r\n    renderPeakData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3;\r\n      const height = 600;\r\n      const width = 1000;\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r\n      const stu_icon = 40;\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r\n    \r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r\n        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r\n      );\r\n    \r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r\n    \r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r\n      const g = svg.append('g');\r\n    \r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n    \r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r\n    \r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r\n    \r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r\n    ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 328
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 287
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/WeekView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.39983808994293213
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    # 获取\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    return {\"students\": students}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "def calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    df = df.copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    # 计算周数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    # 判断时间段\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        columns='period',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        values='count',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        fill_value=0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        aggfunc='sum'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    result_list = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "        weeks = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "            weeks.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "                \"week\": week_num,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        result_list.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "            \"id\": student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    return {\"peaks\": result_list}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r\n    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r\n    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r\n    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df = df.copy()\r\n    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r\n    start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n\r\n    # 计算周数\r\n    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n\r\n    # 判断时间段\r\n    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r\n    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r\n\r\n    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r\n    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r\n    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r\n    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r\n        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r\n        columns='period',\r\n        values='count',\r\n        fill_value=0,\r\n        aggfunc='sum'\r\n    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r\n    \r\n    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r\n     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r\n    result_list = []\r\n    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r\n            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_num,\r\n                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r\n                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r\n            })\r\n        result_list.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    return {\"peaks\": result_list}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 33,
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 20
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/WeekView.py"
      },
      "score": 0.3918040990829468
    },
