      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "def calculate_week_of_year(timestamp, start_date=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    delta = (timestamp - start_timestamp).days // 7\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    return delta\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    将提供的数据转换为适合前端可视化的格式。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "    参数:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    - data (dict): 包含学生ID及其知识点分数的数据字典。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    - e.g. data = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    '01d8aa21ef476b66c573': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    返回:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    - dict: 转换后的数据字典，适合JSON序列化。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    - e.g.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    \"students\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            \"id\": \"01d8aa21ef476b66c573\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "                {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "                    \"week\": 36,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "                    \"scores\": {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "                        \"r8S3g\": 0.0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "                        \"t5V9e\": 0.0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "                        ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "                    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "                },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "                ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        ...\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    students = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    for student_id, weekly_scores in data.items():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        weeks = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        # 遍历每个学生的所有周数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "        for week_number in range(min([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]), max([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]) + 1):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "            scores = {kp: weekly_scores.get((week_number, kp), 0.0) for kp in set(kp for _, kp in weekly_scores.keys())}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            weeks.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "                \"week\": week_number,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "                \"scores\": scores\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        students.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "            \"id\": student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    # 获取\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    return {\"students\": students}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "def calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    将提供的数据转换为适合前端可视化的格式。\r\n    \r\n    参数:\r\n    - data (dict): 包含学生ID及其知识点分数的数据字典。\r\n    - e.g. data = {\r\n    '01d8aa21ef476b66c573': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    ...\r\n}\r\n    \r\n    返回:\r\n    - dict: 转换后的数据字典，适合JSON序列化。\r\n    - e.g.\r\n    {\r\n    \"students\": [\r\n        {\r\n            \"id\": \"01d8aa21ef476b66c573\",\r\n            \"weeks\": [\r\n                {\r\n                    \"week\": 36,\r\n                    \"scores\": {\r\n                        \"r8S3g\": 0.0,\r\n                        \"t5V9e\": 0.0,\r\n                        ...\r\n                    }\r\n                },\r\n                ...\r\n            ]\r\n        },\r\n        ...\r\n    ]\r\n}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    students = []\r\n    \r\n    for student_id, weekly_scores in data.items():\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        \r\n        # 遍历每个学生的所有周数据\r\n        for week_number in range(min([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]), max([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]) + 1):\r\n            scores = {kp: weekly_scores.get((week_number, kp), 0.0) for kp in set(kp for _, kp in weekly_scores.keys())}\r\n            \r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_number,\r\n                \"scores\": scores\r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        students.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    \r\n    # 获取\r\n    return {\"students\": students}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 2
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/WeekView.py"
      },
      "score": 0.3706890344619751
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 474,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 475,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476,
            "text": "          // 连接线\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 477,
            "text": "          rg.append(\"line\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478,
            "text": "            .attr(\"x1\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 479,
            "text": "            .attr(\"y1\", firstHalfHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "            .attr(\"x2\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "            .attr(\"y2\", secondHalfHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "            .attr(\"stroke-width\", 1)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "            .attr(\"stroke\", \"#fff\");\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,
            "text": "        }); // w\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485,
            "text": "      }); // s\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 486,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "    transformScores(scores) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 488,
            "text": "      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 489,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 490,
            "text": "    updateKind() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 491,
            "text": "      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493,
            "text": "      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 494,
            "text": "      if (this.showPeakView) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 495,
            "text": "      this.renderPeakData();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 496,
            "text": "      } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "        this.renderWeekData();\r"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 547,

        "originalContents": "\r\n          // 连接线\r\n          rg.append(\"line\")\r\n            .attr(\"x1\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y1\", firstHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"x2\", positionX + peakWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr(\"y2\", secondHalfHeight)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke-width\", 1)\r\n            .attr(\"stroke\", \"#fff\");\r\n        }); // w\r\n      }); // s\r\n    },\r\n    transformScores(scores) {\r\n      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r\n    },\r\n    updateKind() {\r\n      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n      this.renderPeakData();\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.renderWeekData();\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.WeekData = []\r\n      this.PeakData = []\r\n      if (render) {\r\n        if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r\n        } else {\r\n          await this.getWeekData(this.getSelectedIds);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    },\r\n    // 监听 switch 变化，重新加载数据并渲染\r\n    showPeakView() {\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData()\r\n    },\r\n    selectedDay() {\r\n      if(this.showPeakView){\r\n        this.isWaiting = false;\r\n        this.loadData();\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r\nfrom tools import WeekView as wv\r\nfrom tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\n\r\nclass WeekRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n    \r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        \r\n    def week_analysis(self):\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n\r\n        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n        if student_ids:\r\n            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r\n            \r\n        start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r\n        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r\n\r\n        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r\n        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r\n        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r\n\r\n        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r\n        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r\n        return jsonify(result)",

'p' : 'r'}}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003clabel class=\"switch\"\u003e\r\n          \u003cinput type=\"checkbox\" class=\"switch-input\" v-model=\"showPeakView\" /\u003e\r\n          \u003cspan class=\"slider round\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/label\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cselect class=\"kind-select\" v-model=\"selectedKind\" @change=\"updateKind\"\u003e\r\n        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eAll Kinds\u003c/option\u003e\r\n        \u003coption v-for=\"i in 3\" :key=\"i\" :value=\"i\"\u003e{{ i - 1 }}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n      \u003c/select\u003e\r\n      \u003cselect \r\n        v-model=\"selectedDay\" \r\n        @change=\"loadData\"\r\n        :disabled=\"!showPeakView\"\r\n        class=\"day-select\"\r\n        title=\"Only available in Peak View mode\"\r\n      \u003e\r\n        \u003coption v-for=\"day in 7\" :key=\"day\" :value=\"day\"\u003eDay {{ day }}\u003c/option\u003e\r\n      \u003c/select\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"limit\"\u003ekind:\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cSimplebar style=\"height: 550px; width: 98%\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cLoadingSpinner v-if=loading /\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"wait-prompt\"  v-if=\"isWaiting\"\u003eWaiting for brush :) ...\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationW\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/Simplebar\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { getWeeks, getPeaks } from '@/api/WeekView'\r\nimport { mapState, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\nimport Simplebar from 'simplebar-vue'\r\nimport 'simplebar-vue/dist/simplebar.min.css'\r\nimport LoadingSpinner from './LoadingSpinner.vue'\r\n\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    将提供的数据转换为适合前端可视化的格式。\r\n    \r\n    参数:\r\n    - data (dict): 包含学生ID及其知识点分数的数据字典。\r\n    - e.g. data = {\r\n    '01d8aa21ef476b66c573': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef': {(36, 'r8S3g'): 0.0, (36, 't5V9e'): 0.0, ...},\r\n    ...\r\n}\r\n    \r\n    返回:\r\n    - dict: 转换后的数据字典，适合JSON序列化。\r\n    - e.g.\r\n    {\r\n    \"students\": [\r\n        {\r\n            \"id\": \"01d8aa21ef476b66c573\",\r\n            \"weeks\": [\r\n                {\r\n                    \"week\": 36,\r\n                    \"scores\": {\r\n                        \"r8S3g\": 0.0,\r\n                        \"t5V9e\": 0.0,\r\n                        ...\r\n                    }\r\n                },\r\n                ...\r\n            ]\r\n        },\r\n        ...\r\n    ]\r\n}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    students = []\r\n    \r\n    for student_id, weekly_scores in data.items():\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        \r\n        # 遍历每个学生的所有周数据\r\n        for week_number in range(min([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]), max([w for w, _ in weekly_scores.keys()]) + 1):\r\n            scores = {kp: weekly_scores.get((week_number, kp), 0.0) for kp in set(kp for _, kp in weekly_scores.keys())}\r\n            \r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_number,\r\n                \"scores\": scores\r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        students.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    \r\n    # 获取\r\n    return {\"students\": students}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n      filteredPeakData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id;\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks;\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id];\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind];\r\n      \r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n      \r\n        const labelPadding = 5;\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5));\r\n      \r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox();\r\n      \r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child')\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0');\r\n      \r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png';\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar);\r\n      \r\n        const peaKHeight = 25;\r\n        const peakWidth = weekWidth / 2;\r\n      \r\n        const positionYBase = studentsY(i) + 4 * studentsY.bandwidth() / 5;\r\n      ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 406
          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    # 获取\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    return {\"students\": students}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "def calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "    df = df.copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "    # 计算周数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    # 判断时间段\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        columns='period',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        values='count',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        fill_value=0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        aggfunc='sum'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    result_list = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "        weeks = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "            weeks.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "                \"week\": week_num,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        result_list.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "            \"id\": student_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "            \"weeks\": weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    return {\"peaks\": result_list}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef calculate_peak_data(df, day):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    接收原始数据，返回按学生、周、半周分类的提交数量统计\r\n    :param df: pd.DataFrame 原始数据，必须包含 'student_ID', 'time'\r\n    :param day: int (1~7)，指定划分前半周/后半周的临界星期\r\n    :return: dict 格式 {student_id: {week: {'Mon_to_Day': cnt, 'after_Day_to_Sun': cnt}}}\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    df = df.copy()\r\n    df['time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['time'], unit='s')\r\n    start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n\r\n    # 计算周数\r\n    df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n\r\n    # 判断时间段\r\n    df['weekday'] = df['time'].dt.weekday\r\n    df['period'] = df['weekday'].apply(lambda x: 'Mon_to_Day' if x \u003c= day else 'after_Day_to_Sun')\r\n\r\n    # 按照 student_ID + week + period 分组统计\r\n    grouped = df.groupby(['student_ID', 'week', 'period']).size().reset_index(name='count')\r\n    # pivot 表格，将 period 转换为列\r\n    pivoted = grouped.pivot_table(\r\n        index=['student_ID', 'week'],\r\n        columns='period',\r\n        values='count',\r\n        fill_value=0,\r\n        aggfunc='sum'\r\n    ).reindex(columns=['Mon_to_Day', 'after_Day_to_Sun'], fill_value=0)\r\n    \r\n    # 格式转换成想要的结构\r\n     # ✅ 新增：格式转换成你想要的结构\r\n    result_list = []\r\n    for student_id, group in pivoted.groupby(level='student_ID'):\r\n        weeks = []\r\n        for week_num in group.index.get_level_values('week').unique():\r\n            row = group.xs(week_num, level='week')\r\n            weeks.append({\r\n                \"week\": week_num,\r\n                \"Mon_to_Day\": int(row['Mon_to_Day'].iloc[0]),\r\n                \"after_Day_to_Sun\": int(row['after_Day_to_Sun'].iloc[0])\r\n            })\r\n        result_list.append({\r\n            \"id\": student_id,\r\n            \"weeks\": weeks\r\n        })\r\n    return {\"peaks\": result_list}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 33,
            "line": 123
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 20
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/WeekView.py"
      },
      "score": 0.43845120072364807
    },

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "export default {\r"

            "text": "  name: 'WeekView',\r"

            "lineNumber": 44,

          },
          {

            "text": "    }\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r"

          {

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  async created() {\r"

          },

          },

          {

            "text": "      const height = 600\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "      const width = 1000\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      const stu_icon = 40\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'WeekView',\r\n  components: {\r\n    Simplebar,\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      isWaiting: true,\r\n      WeekData: [],\r\n      PeakData:[],\r\n      selectedKind: '',\r\n      showPeakView: false,\r\n      selectedDay: 5\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getStudentClusterInfo','getSelectedIds', 'getSelectedData','getColors']),\r\n    filteredWeekData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.WeekData.students\r\n      return this.WeekData.students.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    },\r\n    filteredPeakData() {\r\n      if (!this.selectedKind) return this.PeakData.peaks\r\n      return this.PeakData.peaks.filter(s =\u003e this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.id] === this.selectedKind - 1)\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async created() {\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    async getWeekData(stu_ids) {\r\n      const { data } = await getWeeks(stu_ids)\r\n      this.WeekData = data\r\n      // console.log('WeekData', this.WeekData)\r\n      this.renderWeekData()\r\n    },\r\n    async getPeakData(stu_ids, day) {\r\n      const { data } = await getPeaks(stu_ids, day)\r\n      this.PeakData = data\r\n      this.renderPeakData()\r\n    },\r\n    renderWeekData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      const height = 600\r\n      const width = 1000\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 ,right: 20 }\r\n      const stu_icon = 40\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20 // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredWeekData = this.filteredWeekData\r\n\r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredWeekData, d =\u003e d.weeks.length)\r\n\r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 102
          },
          "startPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": ".domain(knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      // 定义半径缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        .domain([0, 1])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        .range([innerRadius, outerRadius])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "      // 定义曲线生成器\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "      const arc = d3.arc()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        .innerRadius(innerRadius)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        .outerRadius(d =\u003e radiusY(d.value))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        .startAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        .endAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge) + angleX.bandwidth())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        .padAngle(0.05)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "        .padRadius(innerRadius)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "      const colors = this.getColors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "       filteredWeekData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        const student_id = s.id\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        const student_weeks = s.weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        // console.log(kind)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "        const student_color = colors[kind]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        // 定义legend组\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179,
            "text": "        const lg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "        // 渲染学生名称\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "        const labelPadding = 5 // 背景矩形的内边距\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184,
            "text": "        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 185,
            "text": "          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186,
            "text": "          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      // 定义半径缩放尺\r\n      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, 1])\r\n        .range([innerRadius, outerRadius])\r\n\r\n      // 定义曲线生成器\r\n      const arc = d3.arc()\r\n        .innerRadius(innerRadius)\r\n        .outerRadius(d =\u003e radiusY(d.value))\r\n        .startAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge))\r\n        .endAngle(d =\u003e angleX(d.knowledge) + angleX.bandwidth())\r\n        .padAngle(0.05)\r\n        .padRadius(innerRadius)\r\n      const colors = this.getColors\r\n      const studentClusterInfo = this.getStudentClusterInfo\r\n       filteredWeekData.forEach((s, i) =\u003e {\r\n        const student_id = s.id\r\n        const student_weeks = s.weeks\r\n        const kind = studentClusterInfo[student_id]\r\n        // console.log(kind)\r\n        const student_color = colors[kind]\r\n\r\n        // 定义legend组\r\n        const lg = g.append('g')\r\n          .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生名称\r\n        const labelPadding = 5 // 背景矩形的内边距\r\n        const textElement = lg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', (margin.left - stu_icon) / 2)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 + stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('dy', '.35em')\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .style('font-size', '14px')\r\n          .text(student_id.slice(-5))\r\n\r\n        let Bbox = textElement.node().getBBox()\r\n",

        "originalContents": "import request from '@/utils/request'\r\n\r\n// 获取周视图相关数据\r\nexport const getWeeks = (selectedIds) =\u003e {\r\n  return request.get('week/week_data', selectedIds ? {\r\n    params: {\r\n      student_ids: selectedIds\r\n    }\r\n  } : null)\r\n}",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools import WeekView as wv\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class WeekRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.register_routes()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def register_routes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    def week_analysis(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        if student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        return jsonify(result)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    def peak_analysis(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        student_ids"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r\nfrom tools import WeekView as wv\r\nfrom tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\n\r\nclass WeekRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n    \r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        \r\n    def week_analysis(self):\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n\r\n        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n        if student_ids:\r\n            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r\n            \r\n        start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r\n        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r\n\r\n        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r\n        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r\n        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r\n\r\n        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r\n        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r\n        return jsonify(result)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/week_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.38380369544029236
    },

            "lineNumber": 238,

          {

            "text": "          const circleOuterData = [{\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        // 添加背景矩形\r\n        lg.insert('rect', ':first-child') // 在第一个子元素之前插入，确保它位于文本下方\r\n          .attr('x', Bbox.x - labelPadding) // 留出一些额外的空间\r\n          .attr('y', Bbox.y - labelPadding)\r\n          .attr('rx', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2) // 圆角半径\r\n          .attr('ry', (Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2) / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', Bbox.width + labelPadding * 2) // 考虑额外空间\r\n          .attr('height', Bbox.height + labelPadding * 2)\r\n          .attr('fill', '#f0f0f0') // 背景颜色\r\n\r\n        // 渲染学生头像\r\n        const userAvatar = '/images/user_avatar.png'\r\n        lg.append('image')\r\n          .attr('x', margin.left / 2 - stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('y', studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2 - stu_icon / 2)\r\n          .attr('width', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('height', stu_icon)\r\n          .attr('href', userAvatar)\r\n\r\n        // 对每一周\r\n        student_weeks.forEach(w =\u003e {\r\n          const position = &#96;translate(${weekX(w.week) + weekWidth}, ${studentsY(i) + studentsY.bandwidth() / 2})&#96;\r\n          const radarChartG = rg.append('g')\r\n            .attr('class', 'radar')\r\n            .attr(\"transform\", position)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制柱状图\r\n          radarChartG.selectAll('.radar')\r\n            .data(this.transformScores(w.scores))\r\n            .enter()\r\n            .append('g')\r\n            .append(\"path\")\r\n            .attr('fill', &#96;${student_color}&#96;)\r\n            .attr('d', arc)\r\n\r\n          // 绘制标签圆\r\n          const labelOuterRadius = innerRadius\r\n          const labelInnerRadius = 0.7 * labelOuterRadius\r\n          const innerCircleRadius = 0.8 * labelInnerRadius\r\n          const labelArc = d3.arc()\r\n            .innerRadius(d =\u003e d.r1)\r\n            .outerRadius(d =\u003e d.r2)\r\n            .startAngle(0)\r\n            .endAngle(Math.PI * 2)\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    def peak_analysis(self):\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n        day = request.args.get('day', type=int)\r\n\r\n        if day is None or not (1 \u003c= day \u003c= 7):\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid day parameter. Must be between 1 and 7.\"}), 400\r\n\r\n        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n        # print(student_ids)\r\n        if student_ids:\r\n            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r\n\r\n        result_dict = wv.calculate_peak_data(df, day)\r\n        # print(result_dict)\r\n        return jsonify(result_dict)",

          {

            "text": "        }) // forEach.w\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "      }) // forEach.s\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "    },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "    renderPeakData() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "      const height = 600;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "      const width = 1000;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "      const stu_icon = 40;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "      // 定义维度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "      );\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "      // 添加 tooltip\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "      const tooltip = d3.select(\"body\").append(\"div\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "}) // forEach.s\r\n    },\r\n    renderPeakData() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3;\r\n      const height = 600;\r\n      const width = 1000;\r\n      const margin = { top: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20, right: 20 };\r\n      const stu_icon = 40;\r\n      const weekLabelHeight = 20; // 周标签高度\r\n      const filteredPeakData = this.filteredPeakData;\r\n    \r\n      // 定义维度\r\n      const numWeeks = d3.max(filteredPeakData, d =\u003e\r\n        d3.max(d.weeks, w =\u003e w.week)\r\n      );\r\n    \r\n      // 根据选中的 kind 过滤数据\r\n      const numStudents = filteredPeakData.length;\r\n    \r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight);\r\n      const g = svg.append('g');\r\n    \r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;);\r\n    \r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)]);\r\n    \r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents]);\r\n    \r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0);\r\n    ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 328
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 287
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "frontend/src/components/WeekView.vue"
      },
      "score": 0.32399630546569824

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      const numStudents = filteredWeekData.length\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        .append('svg')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "      const g = svg.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "      const rg = g.append('g')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "      // 定义缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "      // 计算每个周的宽度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "          rg.append('rect')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        // 绘制每个周的标签\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "        rg.append('text')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "          .attr('y', 0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "          .attr('font-size', 14)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "      const radius = width / 24\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "      const outerRadius = radius\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "      // 定义角度缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "        .domain(knowledge)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "        .align(0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "      // 定义半径缩放尺\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "      const radiusY = d3.scaleLinear()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n      const svg = d3.select('#visualizationW')\r\n        .append('svg')\r\n        .attr('width', margin.left + margin.right + stu_icon + width / 9 * (numWeeks + 1))\r\n        .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n      const g = svg.append('g')\r\n\r\n      // 定义rect组，放置深色矩形和各个环\r\n      const rg = g.append('g')\r\n        .attr('transform', &#96;translate(${margin.left + stu_icon}, ${weekLabelHeight})&#96;)\r\n\r\n      // 定义缩放尺\r\n      const weekX = d3.scaleLinear()\r\n        .domain([0, numWeeks])\r\n        .range([0, width / 9 * (numWeeks)])\r\n\r\n      const studentsY = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(d3.range(numStudents))\r\n        .range([0, (height / 5) * numStudents])\r\n\r\n      // 计算每个周的宽度\r\n      const weekWidth = weekX(1) - weekX(0)\r\n\r\n      // 区分x轴,奇数填充为深色列\r\n      for (let i = 1; i \u003c= numWeeks + 1; i++) {\r\n        if (i % 2 !== 0) {\r\n          rg.append('rect')\r\n            .attr('x', weekX(i) - weekWidth / 2)\r\n            .attr('y', -weekLabelHeight)\r\n            .attr('fill', '#F5F5F5') // 奇数列为浅灰色\r\n            .attr('width', weekWidth)\r\n            .attr('height', (height / 5) * numStudents + weekLabelHeight)\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 绘制每个周的标签\r\n        rg.append('text')\r\n          .attr('x', weekX(i))\r\n          .attr('y', 0)\r\n          .text(&#96;Week${i}&#96;)\r\n          .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')\r\n          .attr('font-size', 14)\r\n          .attr('font-weight', 'bold')\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // ------------------每个元素：Bar Radar部分-----------------\r\n      const radius = width / 24\r\n      const innerRadius = 0.4 * radius\r\n      const outerRadius = radius\r\n      const knowledge = Object.keys(filteredWeekData[0].weeks[0].scores)\r\n\r\n      // 定义角度缩放尺\r\n      const angleX = d3.scaleBand()\r\n        .domain(knowledge)\r\n        .range([0, 2 * Math.PI])\r\n        .align(0)\r\n",

// w\r\n      }); // s\r\n    },\r\n    transformScores(scores) {\r\n      return Object.entries(scores).map(([knowledge, value]) =\u003e ({ knowledge, value }))\r\n    },\r\n    updateKind() {\r\n      // 清除之前的SVG元素\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n      this.renderPeakData();\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.renderWeekData();\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async loadData(render = true) {\r\n      this.loading = true\r\n      this.$d3.select('#visualizationW').selectAll('*').remove()\r\n      this.WeekData = []\r\n      this.PeakData = []\r\n      if (render) {\r\n        if (this.showPeakView) {\r\n          await this.getPeakData(this.getSelectedIds, this.selectedDay);\r\n        } else {\r\n          await this.getWeekData(this.getSelectedIds);\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      this.loading = false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  watch: {\r\n    configLoaded(newVal) {\r\n      if (newVal \u0026\u0026 this.debugger) {\r\n        // 重新加载逻辑\r\n        this.loadData(false)\r\n        this.isWaiting = true\r\n      }\r\n    },\r\n    async getSelectedData(newVal) {\r\n      if (!newVal) {\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData() \r\n    },\r\n    // 监听 switch 变化，重新加载数据并渲染\r\n    showPeakView() {\r\n      this.isWaiting = false\r\n      this.loadData()\r\n    },\r\n    selectedDay() {\r\n      if(this.showPeakView){\r\n        this.isWaiting = false;\r\n        this.loadData();\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cstyle scoped lang=\"less\"\u003e\r\n",

_**Agent (default)**_

已修复黑色显示问题。原因和处理如下：

## 问题原因

在 WeekView 中，当 `studentClusterInfo[student_id]` 为 `undefined` 时：
1. `kind` 为 `undefined`
2. `colors[undefined]` 为 `undefined`
3. 浏览器可能将 `undefined` 的颜色值渲染为黑色

可能原因：
- 学生 ID 格式不匹配（字符串 vs 数字）
- 部分学生未在 `studentClusterInfo` 中记录

## 修复方案

已在两个地方添加了保护逻辑：

### 1. `renderWeekData()` 方法（第174-180行）
### 2. `renderPeakData()` 方法（第366-372行）

修复内容：
1. 类型兼容：同时尝试字符串和数字格式的键
2. 默认值：找不到时使用 `0`
3. 边界检查：确保 `kind` 在 `colors` 数组范围内
4. 双重保险：使用 `|| colors[0]` 确保颜色不为 `undefined`

现在即使 `studentClusterInfo` 中没有某个学生的记录，也会使用默认颜色（`colors[0]`，即橙色），而不会显示黑色。

可以测试一下，应该不会再出现黑色了。

---

+       // 修复：处理 kind 为 undefined 的情况，提供默认值 0
+       // 同时处理键类型不匹配的情况（尝试字符串和数字两种格式）

+         // 尝试将 student_id 转换为字符串或数字
+         currentCluster = studentClusterInfo[String(s.name)] ?? studentClusterInfo[Number(s.name)] ?? 0
+       }
+       // 确保 currentCluster 是有效数字，且在 colors 数组范围内
+       const colors = this.getColors
+       currentCluster = (currentCluster &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; currentCluster &lt; colors.length) ? currentCluster : 0
+       this.currentCluster = currentCluster // 设置当前集群

        const varToggleFunc = this.togglePanelHeight

_**Agent (default)**_

已修复 StudentView 中的颜色问题。修复点如下：

## 修复内容

### 1. **loadStudentPanel 方法（第189行）** - 设置 currentCluster 时
- 问题：`this.currentCluster = this.getStudentClusterInfo[s.name]` 可能为 `undefined`
- 修复：
  - 类型兼容：尝试字符串和数字格式的键
  - 默认值：找不到时使用 `0`
  - 边界检查：确保 `currentCluster` 在 `colors` 数组范围内

### 2. **renderQuestion 方法（第92行）** - 获取颜色时
- 问题：`this.getColors[this.currentCluster]` 可能为 `undefined`（当 `currentCluster` 无效时）
- 修复：
  - 边界检查：确保 `currentCluster` 在 `colors` 数组范围内
  - 默认值：使用 `|| colors[0]` 确保颜色不为 `undefined`

## 现在的行为

- WeekView：即使 `studentClusterInfo` 中没有某个学生的记录，也会使用默认颜色（橙色）
- StudentView：即使 `studentClusterInfo` 中没有某个学生的记录，也会使用默认颜色（橙色）

两个视图不会再显示黑色。请测试确认。

        "originalContents": "export default {\r\n  name: 'ScatterView',\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      debugger: true,\r\n      loading: false,\r\n      svg: null,\r\n      g: null,\r\n      xScale: null,\r\n      yScale: null,\r\n      tooltip: null,\r\n      brushing: null,\r\n      batchSize: 100, // 每批加载的数据量\r\n      currentBatch: 0, // 当前批次索引\r\n      totalBatches: 0, // 总批次数\r\n      allData: [], // 所有数据\r\n      renderedData: [], // 已渲染的数据\r\n      clickedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushedStudent: new Set(),\r\n      brushEnabled: false\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  components: {\r\n    LoadingSpinner\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    const { data } = await getScatterData()\r\n    this.allData = data \r\n    this.initChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapState(['configLoaded']),\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getColors']),\r\n \r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['toggleSelectedIds']),\r\n    updateChart(event){\r\n      if (!event.selection) return\r\n      function isBrushed(brush_coords, cx, cy) {\r\n           var x0 = brush_coords[0][0],\r\n               x1 = brush_coords[1][0],\r\n               y0 = brush_coords[0][1],\r\n               y1 = brush_coords[1][1];\r\n          return x0 \u003c= cx \u0026\u0026 cx \u003c= x1 \u0026\u0026 y0 \u003c= cy \u0026\u0026 cy \u003c= y1;    // This return TRUE or FALSE depending on if the points is in the selected area\r\n      }\r\n      const extent = event.selection\r\n      const circles = this.g.selectAll('.circle-scatter')\r\n      circles\r\n      .classed(\"selected\", (d) =\u003e{ \r\n        const selected = isBrushed(extent, this.xScale(d.transform.x), this.yScale(d.transform.y))\r\n        if (selected) {\r\n          // console.log(d.student_id)\r\n          this.brushedStudent.add(d.student_id)\r\n        }\r\n        // console.log(this.brushedStudent)\r\n        return selected\r\n      })\r\n      this.updateCircles() // 立即更新圆点样式\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv id=\"parallel-chart\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "      \u003cspan\u003eParallel View\u003c/span\u003e\r"

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 7,

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        cluster{{i}}\r"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 12,

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "import { mapActions, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "export default {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  name: 'ParallelView',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  data() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      loading: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      lines: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      svg: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      g: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      dimensionsX: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "      scoreY: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "      lineGenerator: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      yAxis: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      tooltip: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      batchSize: 100, // 每批加载的数据量\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "      currentBatch: 0, // 当前批次索引\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "      totalBatches: 0, // 总批次数\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "      allData: [], // 所有数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "      renderedData: [] // 已渲染的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  async mounted() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    // 获取维度\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    if (Object.keys(this.getClusterData).length === 0) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        console.error('No cluster data available');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        return;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    this.initChart()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "  computed: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "    ...mapGetters(['getClusterData', 'getSelection', 'getColors', 'getHadFilter']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  },\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "  methods: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    ...mapActions(['fetchClusterData', 'toggleSelection']),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    initChart() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      const d3 = this.$d3\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      if (!d3) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      console.error(\"d3 is not available!\");\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "      return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      const height = 450\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "      const width = 350\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      const margin = { top: 30, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 30 }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      // 初始化SVG和G元素\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "      this.svg = d3.select(\"#visualizationP\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "          .append(\"svg\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "          .attr(\"width\", width)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "          .attr(\"height\", height)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      console.log(this.svg)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      this.g = this.svg.append(\"g\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "          .attr(\"transform\", &#96;translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "      \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      const dimensions = Object.keys(Object.values(this.getClusterData)[0].knowledge)\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003ctemplate\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv id=\"parallel-chart\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"title\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cspan\u003eParallel View\u003c/span\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"labels\"\u003e\r\n      \u003cdiv class=\"label\" v-for=\"(color, i) in getColors\" :key=\"i\"\u003e\r\n        cluster{{i}}\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"color-box\" :style=\"{ backgroundColor: color }\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n      \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"visualizationP\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/template\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nimport { mapActions, mapGetters } from 'vuex'\r\n\r\nexport default {\r\n  name: 'ParallelView',\r\n  data() {\r\n    return {\r\n      loading: true,\r\n      lines: null,\r\n      svg: null,\r\n      g: null,\r\n      dimensionsX: null,\r\n      scoreY: null,\r\n      lineGenerator: null,\r\n      yAxis: null,\r\n      tooltip: null,\r\n      batchSize: 100, // 每批加载的数据量\r\n      currentBatch: 0, // 当前批次索引\r\n      totalBatches: 0, // 总批次数\r\n      allData: [], // 所有数据\r\n      renderedData: [] // 已渲染的数据\r\n    }\r\n  },\r\n  async mounted() {\r\n    // 获取维度\r\n    if (Object.keys(this.getClusterData).length === 0) {\r\n        console.error('No cluster data available');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    this.initChart()\r\n  },\r\n  computed: {\r\n    ...mapGetters(['getClusterData', 'getSelection', 'getColors', 'getHadFilter']),\r\n  },\r\n  methods: {\r\n    ...mapActions(['fetchClusterData', 'toggleSelection']),\r\n    initChart() {\r\n      const d3 = this.$d3\r\n      if (!d3) {\r\n      console.error(\"d3 is not available!\");\r\n      return;\r\n      }\r\n      const height = 450\r\n      const width = 350\r\n      const margin = { top: 30, right: 10, bottom: 10, left: 30 }\r\n\r\n      // 初始化SVG和G元素\r\n      this.svg = d3.select(\"#visualizationP\")\r\n          .append(\"svg\")\r\n          .attr(\"width\", width)\r\n          .attr(\"height\", height)\r\n      console.log(this.svg)\r\n      this.g = this.svg.append(\"g\")\r\n          .attr(\"transform\", &#96;translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})&#96;)\r\n\r\n      \r\n",
