    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "class PreliminaryFeatureCalculator:\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    # 初步处理df数据，并不改变df结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    def _calculate_test_num_penalty(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        # 尝试次数扣减\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "        # 题目尝试次数越少，该值越高\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "        # 初步计算，给每个title_ID标记，从1开始\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        self.df['test_num_penalty'] = self.df.groupby(['student_ID','title_ID']).cumcount() + 1\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    def _calculate_rank_bonus(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "        # 排名加成（优化：使用更高效的排名方法，避免多次排序和索引丢失）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "        # 题目排名越高，该值越高（通过题目最终得分和提交次序排名，先比较得分，得分相同比较提交次序)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "        # 先按 score 升序，再按 time 降序，然后计算排名\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        # 创建组合排序键：score 为主要排序，time 为次要排序（使用归一化的 time 作为小数部分）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        time_max = self.df['time'].max()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        time_min = self.df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "        time_range = time_max - time_min if time_max != time_min else 1\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "        # 组合排序键：score 越大越好，time 越小越好\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "        # 使用归一化的倒时间作为小数部分，确保 score 相同时间不同的记录能正确排序\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "        sort_key = self.df['score'].values + (1 - (self.df['time'].values - time_min) / time_range) * 0.000001\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "        # 使用 pandas 的 rank 方法（内部使用高效算法）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "        self.df['rank_bonus'] = pd.Series(sort_key, index=self.df.index).rank(method='first', ascending=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    def _calculate_explore_bonus(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        # 探索加成（优化：使用向量化操作替代 groupby().apply()，性能提升10-50倍）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "        # 题目回答正确后，仍然尝试探索，探索次数越多该值越高\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "        # 标记是否为完全正确的状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "        is_correct = (self.df['state'] == '完全正确')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        # 按学生和题目分组，找到每组第一次完全正确的时间戳\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        first_correct_df = self.df[is_correct].groupby(['student_ID', 'title_ID'])['timestamp'].first().reset_index()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        first_correct_df.columns = ['student_ID', 'title_ID', '_first_correct_time']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        # 将第一次完全正确的时间戳合并回原 DataFrame\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        self.df = self.df.merge(first_correct_df, on=['student_ID', 'title_ID'], how='left')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "        # 标记哪些记录是在第一次完全正确之后的提交\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "        after_first_correct = (self.df['timestamp'] \u003e self.df['_first_correct_time']) \u0026 self.df['_first_correct_time'].notna()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        # 计算每组中在第一次完全正确之后的提交总次数（使用 transform 使每行都有相同的组总值）\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        # 尝试次数扣减\r\n        # 题目尝试次数越少，该值越高\r\n        # 初步计算，给每个title_ID标记，从1开始\r\n        self.df['test_num_penalty'] = self.df.groupby(['student_ID','title_ID']).cumcount() + 1\r\n\r\n    def _calculate_rank_bonus(self):\r\n        # 排名加成（优化：使用更高效的排名方法，避免多次排序和索引丢失）\r\n        # 题目排名越高，该值越高（通过题目最终得分和提交次序排名，先比较得分，得分相同比较提交次序)\r\n        # 先按 score 升序，再按 time 降序，然后计算排名\r\n        \r\n        # 创建组合排序键：score 为主要排序，time 为次要排序（使用归一化的 time 作为小数部分）\r\n        time_max = self.df['time'].max()\r\n        time_min = self.df['time'].min()\r\n        time_range = time_max - time_min if time_max != time_min else 1\r\n        \r\n        # 组合排序键：score 越大越好，time 越小越好\r\n        # 使用归一化的倒时间作为小数部分，确保 score 相同时间不同的记录能正确排序\r\n        sort_key = self.df['score'].values + (1 - (self.df['time'].values - time_min) / time_range) * 0.000001\r\n        \r\n        # 使用 pandas 的 rank 方法（内部使用高效算法）\r\n        self.df['rank_bonus'] = pd.Series(sort_key, index=self.df.index).rank(method='first', ascending=True)\r\n\r\n    def _calculate_explore_bonus(self):\r\n        # 探索加成（优化：使用向量化操作替代 groupby().apply()，性能提升10-50倍）\r\n        # 题目回答正确后，仍然尝试探索，探索次数越多该值越高\r\n        \r\n        # 标记是否为完全正确的状态\r\n        is_correct = (self.df['state'] == '完全正确')\r\n        \r\n        # 按学生和题目分组，找到每组第一次完全正确的时间戳\r\n        first_correct_df = self.df[is_correct].groupby(['student_ID', 'title_ID'])['timestamp'].first().reset_index()\r\n        first_correct_df.columns = ['student_ID', 'title_ID', '_first_correct_time']\r\n        \r\n        # 将第一次完全正确的时间戳合并回原 DataFrame\r\n        self.df = self.df.merge(first_correct_df, on=['student_ID', 'title_ID'], how='left')\r\n        \r\n        # 标记哪些记录是在第一次完全正确之后的提交\r\n        after_first_correct = (self.df['timestamp'] \u003e self.df['_first_correct_time']) \u0026 self.df['_first_correct_time'].notna()\r\n        ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 133
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 36,
            "line": 7
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/features.py"
      },
      "score": 0.15804046392440796
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools import WeekView as wv\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class WeekRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.register_routes()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def register_routes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    def week_analysis(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        if student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        start_date = df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        return jsonify(result)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    def peak_analysis(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        student_ids"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, jsonify, request\r\nfrom tools import WeekView as wv\r\nfrom tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\n\r\nclass WeekRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        self.week_bp = Blueprint('week', __name__)\r\n        self.register_routes()\r\n\r\n    def register_routes(self):\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/week_data', view_func=self.week_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.week_bp.add_url_rule('/week/peak_data', view_func=self.peak_analysis, methods=['GET'])\r\n    \r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge()\r\n        \r\n    def week_analysis(self):\r\n        student_ids = request.args.getlist('student_ids[]')\r\n\r\n        df = self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n        if student_ids:\r\n            df = df[df['student_ID'].isin(student_ids)]\r\n            \r\n        start_date = df['time'].min()\r\n        df['week'] = df['time'].apply(lambda x: wv.calculate_week_of_year(x, start_date=start_date))\r\n        pre_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(df)\r\n        pre_calc_submit_records = pre_calculator.get_features()\r\n\r\n        # 计算每个学生的总分，不区分知识点\r\n        final_calculator = FinalFeatureCalculator(pre_calc_submit_records, ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge'])\r\n        final_result = final_calculator.calc_final_features()\r\n\r\n        result = final_result.to_dict(orient='index')\r\n        result = wv.transform_data_for_visualization(result)\r\n        return jsonify(result)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/week_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.1562608927488327
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "# -------------周视图部分--------------\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "def calculate_week_of_year(timestamp, start_date=None):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    根据给定的时间戳计算其属于哪一周。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    参数:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    - timestamp (int): 时间戳，单位秒。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    - start_date (datetime.datetime): 可选参数，指定起始周的第一天。如果没有提供，\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "      则使用数据集中最早的日期作为起始周的第一天。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    返回:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    - int: 对应的时间戳所在的周数。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    timestamp = pd.to_datetime(timestamp, unit='s')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    start_timestamp = pd.to_datetime(start_date, unit='s') if start_date else None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    delta = (timestamp - start_timestamp).days // 7\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    return delta\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "def transform_data_for_visualization(data):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    \"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n# -------------周视图部分--------------\r\ndef calculate_week_of_year(timestamp, start_date=None):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    根据给定的时间戳计算其属于哪一周。\r\n    \r\n    参数:\r\n    - timestamp (int): 时间戳，单位秒。\r\n    - start_date (datetime.datetime): 可选参数，指定起始周的第一天。如果没有提供，\r\n      则使用数据集中最早的日期作为起始周的第一天。\r\n    \r\n    返回:\r\n    - int: 对应的时间戳所在的周数。\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    timestamp = pd.to_datetime(timestamp, unit='s')\r\n    start_timestamp = pd.to_datetime(start_date, unit='s') if start_date else None\r\n    delta = (timestamp - start_timestamp).days // 7\r\n    return delta",

          },

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \"#  手动实现 PCA 主成分分析\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \"本 Notebook 用于学习PCA，一步步拆解 PCA 算法的实现过程，并解释其背后的数学原理。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \"###  PCA 是什么？\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \"- PCA（Principal Component Analysis）是一种常用的无监督降维技术。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \"- 它通过找到数据中方差最大的方向（主成分），将高维数据投影到低维空间。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \"- 目标：保留尽可能多的信息（方差），同时减少特征数量。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \"###  核心步骤回顾\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    \"1. 数据标准化（中心化）\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \"2. 计算协方差矩阵\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    \"3. 特征值分解 → 得到主成分方向\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \"4. 投影到前 n 个主成分空间\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,

        "originalContents": "{\n \"cells\": [\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"#  手动实现 PCA 主成分分析\\n\",\n    \"本 Notebook 用于学习PCA，一步步拆解 PCA 算法的实现过程，并解释其背后的数学原理。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"###  PCA 是什么？\\n\",\n    \"- PCA（Principal Component Analysis）是一种常用的无监督降维技术。\\n\",\n    \"- 它通过找到数据中方差最大的方向（主成分），将高维数据投影到低维空间。\\n\",\n    \"- 目标：保留尽可能多的信息（方差），同时减少特征数量。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"###  核心步骤回顾\\n\",\n    \"1. 数据标准化（中心化）\\n\",\n    \"2. 计算协方差矩阵\\n\",\n    \"3. 特征值分解 → 得到主成分方向\\n\",\n    \"4. 投影到前 n 个主成分空间\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 1,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"import numpy as np\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.datasets import load_iris\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.decomposition import PCA\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 1: 加载数据\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 3,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [\n    {\n     \"name\": \"stdout\",\n     \"output_type\": \"stream\",\n     \"text\": [\n      \"原始数据 X shape: (150, 4)\\n\",\n      \"前5个样本:\\n\",\n      \" [[5.1 3.5 1.4 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.9 3.  1.4 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.7 3.2 1.3 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [4.6 3.1 1.5 0.2]\\n\",\n      \" [5.  3.6 1.4 0.2]]\\n\"\n     ]\n    }\n   ],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 加载鸢尾花数据集\\n\",\n    \"data = load_iris()\\n\",\n    \"X = data.data\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"原始数据 X shape:\\\", X.shape)\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"前5个样本:\\\\n\\\", X[:5])\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 2: 数据标准化（中心化）\"\n   ]\n  },\n",

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "classFilename = os.path.join(class_dir, 'SubmitRecord-Class1.csv') # 提交记录表格\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,

          },

        "originalContents": "import os\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\n# 获取数据目录\r\ncurrent_file_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)) # 获取当前文件位置\r\ncurrent_dir = os.path.dirname(current_file_dir)               # 获取当前文件所在目录路径/utils\r\nparent_dir = os.path.dirname(current_dir)                     # 获取当前文件所在目录路径/utils的父目录路径/backend\r\ndata_dir = os.path.join(current_dir, '../data/')              # 数据路径\r\n\r\n# 获取数据文件\r\nclass_dir = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_SubmitRecord/')\r\nclassFilename = os.path.join(class_dir, 'SubmitRecord-Class1.csv') # 提交记录表格\r\ntitleFilename = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_TitleInfo.csv')       # 题目信息表格\r\nstudentFilename = os.path.join(data_dir, 'Data_StudentInfo.csv')   # 学生信息表格\r\n\r\n# 加载数据\r\ndef load_data(filename):\r\n    try:\r\n        df = pd.read_csv(filename)\r\n        return df\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error loading data: {e}\")\r\n        return None",

          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "class PreliminaryFeatureCalculator:\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    # 初步处理df数据，并不改变df结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "def _calculate_explore_bonus(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        # 探索加成（优化：使用向量化操作替代 groupby().apply()，性能提升10-50倍）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "        # 题目回答正确后，仍然尝试探索，探索次数越多该值越高\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "        # 标记是否为完全正确的状态\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": " self.df['_first_correct_time'].notna()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "        # 计算每组中在第一次完全正确之后的提交总次数（使用 transform 使每行都有相同的组总值）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "        self.df['explore_bonus'] = after_first_correct.groupby([self.df['student_ID'], self.df['title_ID']]).transform('sum').astype(int)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "        # 清理辅助列\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "        self.df.drop(columns=['_first_correct_time'], inplace=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    def _calculate_enthusiasm_bonus(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        # 热情加成\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "        # 题目发布后，全部提交次数的时间平均值越早，说明该生完成题目的热情越高\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "        max_time = self.df['time'].max()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        min_time = self.df['time'].min()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "        self.df['enthusiasm_bonus'] = (max_time - self.df['time']) / (max_time - min_time)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    def get_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "        return self.df\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    def parallel_calculate_features(self, num_workers=1):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "        chunk_size = math.ceil(len(self.df) / num_workers)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "        chunks = [self.df.iloc[i:i + chunk_size] for i in range(0, len(self.df), chunk_size)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "        with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=num_workers) as executor:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "            results = list(executor.map(lambda chunk: PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(chunk).get_features(), chunks))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        return pd.concat(results).sort_index()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "class FinalFeatureCalculator:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, df, group_apply):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "        # group_apply:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "        #  ['student_ID']:只按照学生分组，用于radar plot\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "        #  ['student_ID', 'knowledge']:按照学生和知识点分组，用于circular bar plot\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "        #  ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge']:按照学生、周和知识点分组，用于week view\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "        self.df = df.copy()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "        self.group_apply = group_apply\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "        self.result = self.calc_final_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    def calc_final_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "        # 在初步计算数据的基础上聚合计算\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "        grouped = self.df.groupby(self.group_apply).agg({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "            'score_bonus': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "            'tc_bonus': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "            'mem_bonus': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "            'error_type_penalty': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "            'test_num_penalty': \"max\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "            'rank_bonus': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "            'explore_bonus': \"sum\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "            'enthusiasm_bonus': \"mean\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        grouped['total_score'] = grouped.sum(axis=1)  # 计算总分\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "        # 将多层索引转换为单层索引，并添加知识点列\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        # 计算每组中在第一次完全正确之后的提交总次数（使用 transform 使每行都有相同的组总值）\r\n        self.df['explore_bonus'] = after_first_correct.groupby([self.df['student_ID'], self.df['title_ID']]).transform('sum').astype(int)\r\n        \r\n        # 清理辅助列\r\n        self.df.drop(columns=['_first_correct_time'], inplace=True)\r\n\r\n    def _calculate_enthusiasm_bonus(self):\r\n        # 热情加成\r\n        # 题目发布后，全部提交次数的时间平均值越早，说明该生完成题目的热情越高\r\n        max_time = self.df['time'].max()\r\n        min_time = self.df['time'].min()\r\n        self.df['enthusiasm_bonus'] = (max_time - self.df['time']) / (max_time - min_time)\r\n\r\n    def get_features(self):\r\n        return self.df\r\n\r\n    def parallel_calculate_features(self, num_workers=1):\r\n        chunk_size = math.ceil(len(self.df) / num_workers)\r\n        chunks = [self.df.iloc[i:i + chunk_size] for i in range(0, len(self.df), chunk_size)]\r\n\r\n        with ProcessPoolExecutor(max_workers=num_workers) as executor:\r\n            results = list(executor.map(lambda chunk: PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(chunk).get_features(), chunks))\r\n        \r\n        return pd.concat(results).sort_index()\r\n\r\nclass FinalFeatureCalculator:\r\n    def __init__(self, df, group_apply):\r\n        # group_apply:\r\n        #  ['student_ID']:只按照学生分组，用于radar plot\r\n        #  ['student_ID', 'knowledge']:按照学生和知识点分组，用于circular bar plot\r\n        #  ['student_ID', 'week', 'knowledge']:按照学生、周和知识点分组，用于week view\r\n        self.df = df.copy()\r\n        self.group_apply = group_apply\r\n        self.result = self.calc_final_features()\r\n\r\n    def calc_final_features(self):\r\n        \r\n        # 在初步计算数据的基础上聚合计算\r\n        grouped = self.df.groupby(self.group_apply).agg({\r\n            'score_bonus': \"sum\",\r\n            'tc_bonus': \"sum\",\r\n            'mem_bonus': \"sum\",\r\n            'error_type_penalty': \"sum\",\r\n            'test_num_penalty': \"max\",\r\n            'rank_bonus': \"sum\",\r\n            'explore_bonus': \"sum\",\r\n            'enthusiasm_bonus': \"mean\"\r\n        })\r\n        grouped['total_score'] = grouped",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 200
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 9
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/tools/features.py"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import numpy as np\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "def generate_parallel_view_data(num_students=1000, num_titles=50, num_knowledges=10):\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    # Generate student IDs and title IDs\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    student_ids = [f'student{i}' for i in range(num_students)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    title_ids = [i for i in range(1, num_titles + 1)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    knowledge_ids = [f'knowledge{j}' for j in range(num_knowledges)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    # Generate SubmitRecord data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    submit_records = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    for student_id in student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        for _ in range(np.random.randint(1, 100)):  # Each student submits between 1 to 9 titles\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            title_id = np.random.choice(title_ids)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "            score = np.random.randint(1, 100)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            timeconsume = np.random.uniform(1, 60)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            memory = np.random.uniform(1, 1024)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            state = np.random.choice(['Absolutely_Correct', 'Incorrect'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "            method = np.random.choice(['methodA', 'methodB', 'methodC'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            timestamp = pd.Timestamp.now() - pd.Timedelta(days=np.random.randint(0, 365))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            submit_records.append({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "                'index': len(submit_records),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "                'class': f'class{np.random.randint(1, 11)}',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "                'time': timestamp,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "                'state': state,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "                'score': score,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "                'title_ID': title_id,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "                'method': method,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                'memory': memory,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "                'timeconsume': timeconsume,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "                'student_ID': student_id\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    submit_record_df = pd.DataFrame(submit_records)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    # Generate StuInfo data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    stu_info = []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    for student_id in student_ids:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        sex = np.random.choice(['Male', 'Female'])"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\n\r\ndef generate_parallel_view_data(num_students=1000, num_titles=50, num_knowledges=10):\r\n    # Generate student IDs and title IDs\r\n    student_ids = [f'student{i}' for i in range(num_students)]\r\n    title_ids = [i for i in range(1, num_titles + 1)]\r\n    knowledge_ids = [f'knowledge{j}' for j in range(num_knowledges)]\r\n\r\n    # Generate SubmitRecord data\r\n    submit_records = []\r\n    for student_id in student_ids:\r\n        for _ in range(np.random.randint(1, 100)):  # Each student submits between 1 to 9 titles\r\n            title_id = np.random.choice(title_ids)\r\n            score = np.random.randint(1, 100)\r\n            timeconsume = np.random.uniform(1, 60)\r\n            memory = np.random.uniform(1, 1024)\r\n            state = np.random.choice(['Absolutely_Correct', 'Incorrect'])\r\n            method = np.random.choice(['methodA', 'methodB', 'methodC'])\r\n            timestamp = pd.Timestamp.now() - pd.Timedelta(days=np.random.randint(0, 365))\r\n            \r\n            submit_records.append({\r\n                'index': len(submit_records),\r\n                'class': f'class{np.random.randint(1, 11)}',\r\n                'time': timestamp,\r\n                'state': state,\r\n                'score': score,\r\n                'title_ID': title_id,\r\n                'method': method,\r\n                'memory': memory,\r\n                'timeconsume': timeconsume,\r\n                'student_ID': student_id\r\n            })\r\n\r\n    submit_record_df = pd.DataFrame(submit_records)\r\n\r\n    # Generate StuInfo data\r\n    stu_info = []",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 70
          },
          "startPosition": {}

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint\r\nfrom tools import fileSystem as fs\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Config:\r\n    _instance = None\r\n\r\n    def __new__(cls):\r\n        if cls._instance is None:\r\n            cls._instance = super(Config, cls).__new__(cls)\r\n            cls._instance._initialize()\r\n        return cls._instance\r\n\r\n    def _initialize(self):\r\n        # 创建蓝图对象\r\n        self.api_bp = Blueprint('api', __name__)\r\n        # 配置总处理文件类型\r\n        self.classList = []\r\n        self.majors = []\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = None\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = None\r\n        self._observers = []\r\n\r\n        self.initialize()\r\n\r\n    def initialize(self):\r\n        self.classList = ['Class1']\r\n        self.majors = fs.load_data(fs.studentFilename)['major'].unique().tolist()\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = fs.load_data(fs.classFilename)\r\n        self.data_with_title_knowledge = self.merge_title_data()\r\n\r\n    def merge_title_data(self):\r\n        return fs.process_non_numeric_values(\r\n            fs.merge_df_or_file(\r\n                df1=self.class_df_filtered_majors, \r\n                filename2=fs.titleFilename,\r\n                filter_col2=['title_ID', 'knowledge'],\r\n                on='title_ID')\r\n            )\r\n\r\n    # Getters\r\n    def get_api_bp(self):\r\n        return self.api_bp\r\n\r\n    def get_class_df_filtered_majors(self):\r\n        return self.class_df_filtered_majors\r\n\r\n    def get_class_list(self):\r\n        return self.classList\r\n    \r\n    def get_majors(self):\r\n        return self.majors\r\n\r\n    def get_data_with_title_knowledge(self):\r\n        return self.data_with_title_knowledge\r\n\r\n    # Setters\r\n    def set_class_list(self, class_list):\r\n        self.classList = class_list\r\n\r\n    def set_majors(self, majors):\r\n        self.majors = majors\r\n\r\n    def set_class_df_filtered_majors(self, class_df_filtered_majors):\r\n        self.class_df_filtered_majors = class_df_filtered_majors\r\n        # self.notify_observers()",

          {
            "lineNumber": 47,

          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        return np.array(features)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    def create_cluster_model(self, method: str=\"kmeans\", n_clusters: int = 3, **kwargs):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import numpy as np\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Union\r\n\r\nclass ClusterAnalysis:\r\n    def __init__(\r\n        self,\r\n        students_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]],\r\n        method: str = \"kmeans\",\r\n        n_clusters: int = 3,\r\n        **kwargs\r\n    ):\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        初始化聚类分析\r\n        \r\n        参数:\r\n            students_data: 学生数据，格式为 {学生ID: {科目: 分数}}\r\n            method: 聚类方法，支持 \"kmeans\", \"dbscan\", \"agg\", \"gmm\"\r\n            n_clusters: 聚类数量（仅适用于 K-Means、Agglomerative、GMM）\r\n            **kwargs: 传递给聚类算法的额外参数\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        self.raw_data = students_data\r\n        self.method = method.lower()\r\n        self.n_clusters = n_clusters\r\n        self.kwargs = kwargs\r\n        \r\n        # 提取特征向量\r\n        self.features_array = self.extract_features(self.raw_data)\r\n        \r\n        # 初始化聚类模型\r\n        self.cluster_model = self.create_cluster_model(\r\n            method=self.method,\r\n            n_clusters=self.n_clusters,\r\n            **self.kwargs\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # 训练模型\r\n        self.cluster_model.fit(self.features_array)\r\n\r\n    def extract_features(self, raw_data: Dict[str, Dict[str, float]]) -\u003e np.ndarray:\r\n        \"\"\"提取特征向量\"\"\"\r\n        features = []\r\n        for student_id, values in raw_data.items():\r\n            if isinstance(values, dict):\r\n                feature_vector = list(values.values())\r\n                features.append(feature_vector)\r\n            else:\r\n                raise ValueError(f\"Invalid data format for student {student_id}: {values}\")\r\n        return np.array(features)",

            "line": 144
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n  # 示例用法\r\n  # features_df是从features.py中计算得出的特征DataFrame\r\n  features_df = pd.DataFrame({\r\n      'student_ID': ['01d8aa21ef476b66c573', '03aa0b20dd4af1888eef', 'student3', 'student4'],\r\n      'score_bonus': [1.0, 0.8, 0.9, 0.7],\r\n      'tc_bonus': [0.5, 0.3, 0.4, 0.2],\r\n      'mem_bonus': [0.6, 0.4, 0.5, 0.3],\r\n      'error_type_penalty': [0.1, 0.2, 0.1, 0.3],\r\n      'test_num_penalty': [1, 2, 1, 3],\r\n      'rank_bonus': [2, 1, 3, 4],\r\n      'explore_bonus': [0, 1, 0, 2],\r\n      'enthusiasm_bonus': [0.8, 0.7, 0.9, 0.6]\r\n  })\r\n  \r\n  dimReduction_analysis = DimReduction(features_df)\r\n  transformed_data = dimReduction_analysis.get_transformed_data()\r\n  \r\n  print(\"Transformed Data:\\n\", transformed_data)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# NorthClassVis\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "ChinaVis 2024数据可视化竞赛作品复现\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "## 项目简介\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "本项目是2024年数据可视化竞赛的参赛作品非1:1复现(仅有大致原作成品参考，无原型图、设计稿等)，旨在基于可视化作品学习**D3.js**、**flask**的相关知识。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "项目包含：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "- 使用&#96;Vue2&#96;框架构建交互式用户界面，结合&#96;Vuex&#96;实现复杂状态管理和界面交互（未来可能重写为&#96;Vue3&#96;）。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- 基于&#96;D3.js&#96;开发多类型图表（平行线图、环形柱状图、雷达图、树形图等），支持动态数据绑定和实时更新。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- 使用&#96;axios&#96;接受和发起请求，构建可复用的api文件\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "- 使用&#96;Flask&#96;框架搭建高性能 API 服务，提供数据查询和分析接口。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "- 使用&#96;pandas&#96;/&#96;numpy&#96;对&#96;.csv&#96;文件处理，计算数据特征。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "- 利用自主实现&#96;PCA&#96;降维和&#96;kmeans&#96;聚类\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "- 利用&#96;sklearn&#96;库学习对比降维和聚类算法\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "- 应用面向对象设计模式，通过&#96;单例模式&#96;、&#96;工厂模式&#96;以及&#96;观察者模式&#96;优化全局配置和计算件管理，提高代码复用性和可维护性。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "- 整体采用&#96;批处理软件结构风格&#96;，优化前端性能和用户体验。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "- 通过&#96;依赖注入&#96;实现类，实现代码解耦和可维护性。\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "- ~~实现视口动态渲染和并行渲染技术，显著提升页面加载速度和用户体验。~~\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "- ~~利用静态 JSON 数据测试前端样式，确保界面一致性和兼容性。~~\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "- ~~使用&#96;pytest&#96;编写单元测试，覆盖关键业务逻辑，确保后端功能的稳定性和可靠性。~~\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "- ~~手写节流和防抖函数，优化用户体验。~~\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "笔者目前也在学习, 学习记录、学习资源见**notes**文件夹\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "## 项目结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "项目包含以下核心文件和目录：\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "NorthClassVision/\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "├── data/ # 数据集文件夹\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "│   ├── Data_SubmitRecord/\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "│   ├── Data_StudentInfo.csv\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "│   ├── Data_TitleInfo.csv\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "│   └── first_dataDes.docx\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# NorthClassVis\r\n\r\nChinaVis 2024数据可视化竞赛作品复现\r\n\r\n## 项目简介\r\n\r\n本项目是2024年数据可视化竞赛的参赛作品非1:1复现(仅有大致原作成品参考，无原型图、设计稿等)，旨在基于可视化作品学习**D3.js**、**flask**的相关知识。\r\n\r\n项目包含：\r\n\r\n- 使用&#96;Vue2&#96;框架构建交互式用户界面，结合&#96;Vuex&#96;实现复杂状态管理和界面交互（未来可能重写为&#96;Vue3&#96;）。\r\n\r\n- 基于&#96;D3.js&#96;开发多类型图表（平行线图、环形柱状图、雷达图、树形图等），支持动态数据绑定和实时更新。\r\n\r\n- 使用&#96;axios&#96;接受和发起请求，构建可复用的api文件\r\n\r\n- 使用&#96;Flask&#96;框架搭建高性能 API 服务，提供数据查询和分析接口。\r\n\r\n- 使用&#96;pandas&#96;/&#96;numpy&#96;对&#96;.csv&#96;文件处理，计算数据特征。\r\n\r\n- 利用自主实现&#96;PCA&#96;降维和&#96;kmeans&#96;聚类\r\n\r\n- 利用&#96;sklearn&#96;库学习对比降维和聚类算法\r\n\r\n- 应用面向对象设计模式，通过&#96;单例模式&#96;、&#96;工厂模式&#96;以及&#96;观察者模式&#96;优化全局配置和计算件管理，提高代码复用性和可维护性。\r\n\r\n- 整体采用&#96;批处理软件结构风格&#96;，优化前端性能和用户体验。\r\n\r\n- 通过&#96;依赖注入&#96;实现类，实现代码解耦和可维护性。\r\n\r\n- ~~实现视口动态渲染和并行渲染技术，显著提升页面加载速度和用户体验。~~\r\n\r\n- ~~利用静态 JSON 数据测试前端样式，确保界面一致性和兼容性。~~\r\n\r\n- ~~使用&#96;pytest&#96;编写单元测试，覆盖关键业务逻辑，确保后端功能的稳定性和可靠性。~~\r\n\r\n- ~~手写节流和防抖函数，优化用户体验。~~\r\n\r\n笔者目前也在学习, 学习记录、学习资源见**notes**文件夹\r\n\r\n## 项目结构\r\n\r\n项目包含以下核心文件和目录：\r\n\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nNorthClassVision/\r\n├── data/ # 数据集文件夹\r\n│   ├── Data_SubmitRecord/\r\n│   ├── Data_StudentInfo.csv\r\n│   ├── Data_TitleInfo.csv\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 51
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "README.md"
      },
      "score": 0.21607375144958496
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools.dim_reduction import DimReduction\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from tools.cluster_analysis import ClusterAnalysis\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class FeatureFactory:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    def _initialize_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        features = self.preliminary_feature_calculator.get_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        self.feature_bonus = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        self.feature_knowledge = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID', 'knowledge']).get_result()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        self.dim_reduction = DimReduction(self.feature_bonus)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        self.cluster_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data=self.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data().to_dict(orient='index'))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    def update_data(self, new_config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        self.config = new_config\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        self._initialize_features()"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from tools.features import PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, FinalFeatureCalculator\r\nfrom tools.dim_reduction import DimReduction\r\nfrom tools.cluster_analysis import ClusterAnalysis\r\n\r\nclass FeatureFactory:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = None\r\n        self.feature_bonus = None\r\n        self.feature_knowledge = None\r\n        self.dim_reduction = None\r\n        self.cluster_analysis = None\r\n        self._initialize_features()\r\n\r\n    def _initialize_features(self):\r\n        self.preliminary_feature_calculator = PreliminaryFeatureCalculator(self.config.get_data_with_title_knowledge())\r\n        features = self.preliminary_feature_calculator.get_features()\r\n        self.feature_bonus = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID']).get_result()\r\n        self.feature_knowledge = FinalFeatureCalculator(features, ['student_ID', 'knowledge']).get_result()\r\n\r\n        self.dim_reduction = DimReduction(self.feature_bonus)\r\n        self.cluster_analysis = ClusterAnalysis(students_data=self.dim_reduction.get_transformed_data().to_dict(orient='index'))\r\n\r\n    def update_data(self, new_config):\r\n        self.config = new_config\r\n        self._initialize_features()",

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@pytest.fixture\r\ndef test_df():\r\n    data = {\r\n        'student_ID': [1, 1, 2, 2],\r\n        'knowledge': ['Math', 'Math', 'Science', 'Science'],\r\n        'timeconsume': [10.0, 10.0, 20.0, 30.0],\r\n        'memory': [100.0, 200.0, 250.0, 300.0]\r\n    }\r\n    return pd.DataFrame(data)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from tools import fileSystem as fs\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "class NavRoutes:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, config):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.config = config\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp = Blueprint('nav', __name__)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        # 注册路由\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/filter', view_func=self.config_info, methods=['GET'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/config', view_func=self.process_classes, methods=['POST'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    def config_info(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        return jsonify(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            {\"classes\": self.config.classList,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "             \"majors\": self.config.majors,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            })\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    def process_classes(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 获取前端发送的数据，这里假设前端发送的是JSON格式的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        data = request.get_json()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        # 检查是否接收到有效的数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "        if not data or 'classes' not in data or 'majors' not in data:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            return jsonify({'error': 'No classes or majors provided'}), 400\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "        # 获取班级列表和专业列表\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        classes = data['classes']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        majors = data['majors']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        # 获取对应的DataFrame并合并\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "        contacted_df = fs.contact_df(fs.class_dir, classes)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        merged_df = fs.merge_df_or_file(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            df1=contacted_df, \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "            filename2=fs.studentFilename,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "            on='student_ID', \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "            filter_col2=['student_ID','major'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        # 根据majors参数筛选对应majors数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['major'].isin(majors)]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        # 更新配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        self.config.set_class_list(classes)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "        self.config.set_majors(majors)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "        self.config.set_class_df_filtered_majors(filtered_df)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        self.config.set_data_with_title_knowledge(self.config.merge_title_data())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        # 通知 FeatureFactory 重新初始化依赖对象\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        self.config.notify_observers()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "        return jsonify({'message': 'Classes have been successfully processed and filtered.'}), 200"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify\r\nfrom tools import fileSystem as fs\r\n\r\nclass NavRoutes:\r\n    def __init__(self, config):\r\n        self.config = config\r\n        self.nav_bp = Blueprint('nav', __name__)\r\n        # 注册路由\r\n        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/filter', view_func=self.config_info, methods=['GET'])\r\n        self.nav_bp.add_url_rule('/nav/config', view_func=self.process_classes, methods=['POST'])\r\n\r\n    def config_info(self):\r\n        return jsonify(\r\n            {\"classes\": self.config.classList,\r\n             \"majors\": self.config.majors,\r\n            })\r\n    \r\n    def process_classes(self):\r\n        # 获取前端发送的数据，这里假设前端发送的是JSON格式的数据\r\n        data = request.get_json()\r\n\r\n        # 检查是否接收到有效的数据\r\n        if not data or 'classes' not in data or 'majors' not in data:\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'No classes or majors provided'}), 400\r\n\r\n        # 获取班级列表和专业列表\r\n        classes = data['classes']\r\n        majors = data['majors']\r\n\r\n        # 获取对应的DataFrame并合并\r\n        contacted_df = fs.contact_df(fs.class_dir, classes)\r\n\r\n        merged_df = fs.merge_df_or_file(\r\n            df1=contacted_df, \r\n            filename2=fs.studentFilename,\r\n            on='student_ID', \r\n            filter_col2=['student_ID','major'])\r\n\r\n        # 根据majors参数筛选对应majors数据\r\n        filtered_df = merged_df[merged_df['major'].isin(majors)]\r\n\r\n        # 更新配置\r\n        self.config.set_class_list(classes)\r\n        self.config.set_majors(majors)\r\n        self.config.set_class_df_filtered_majors(filtered_df)\r\n        self.config.set_data_with_title_knowledge(self.config.merge_title_data())\r\n        \r\n        # 通知 FeatureFactory 重新初始化依赖对象\r\n        self.config.notify_observers()\r\n\r\n        return jsonify({'message': 'Classes have been successfully processed and filtered.'}), 200",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 98,
            "line": 50
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "backend/routes/nav_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.20447546243667603
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " \"cells\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \"# 手动实现 K-Means 聚类算法\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \"本 Notebook 用于学习K-Means，将一步步拆解 K-Means 算法的实现过程，帮助理解其内部机制。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \"### K-Means 是什么？\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \"- K-Means（K-Means Clustering）是一种常用的无监督聚类算法。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \"- 它通过将数据集划分为K个集群，使得每个集群的样本相似。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \"- 目标：将数据集划分成K个相似的子集，每个子集内样本相似。\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    \"\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    \"### 核心步骤回顾\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    \"1. 初始化聚类中心（随机数取）\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \"2. 迭代：\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    \"    - 计算每个样本到聚类中心的距离\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    \"    - 将样本分配到距离最近的聚类中心\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    \"    - 更新聚类中心\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    \"3. 停止：当聚类中心不再改变/到最大迭代次数，停止迭代\\n\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "   ]"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "  },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "   \"cell_type\": \"code\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "   \"execution_count\": 1,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "   \"metadata\": {},"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "   \"outputs\": [],"
          },

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "   \"source\": ["
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    \"import numpy as np\\n\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \"from sklearn.cluster import KMeans  # 用于最后对比\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "   ]"

        "originalContents": "{\n \"cells\": [\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 手动实现 K-Means 聚类算法\\n\",\n    \"本 Notebook 用于学习K-Means，将一步步拆解 K-Means 算法的实现过程，帮助理解其内部机制。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"### K-Means 是什么？\\n\",\n    \"- K-Means（K-Means Clustering）是一种常用的无监督聚类算法。\\n\",\n    \"- 它通过将数据集划分为K个集群，使得每个集群的样本相似。\\n\",\n    \"- 目标：将数据集划分成K个相似的子集，每个子集内样本相似。\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"### 核心步骤回顾\\n\",\n    \"1. 初始化聚类中心（随机数取）\\n\",\n    \"2. 迭代：\\n\",\n    \"    - 计算每个样本到聚类中心的距离\\n\",\n    \"    - 将样本分配到距离最近的聚类中心\\n\",\n    \"    - 更新聚类中心\\n\",\n    \"3. 停止：当聚类中心不再改变/到最大迭代次数，停止迭代\\n\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 1,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"import numpy as np\\n\",\n    \"from sklearn.cluster import KMeans  # 用于最后对比\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"markdown\",\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"source\": [\n    \"##  Step 1: 生成测试数据\"\n   ]\n  },\n  {\n   \"cell_type\": \"code\",\n   \"execution_count\": 2,\n   \"metadata\": {},\n   \"outputs\": [\n    {\n     \"name\": \"stdout\",\n     \"output_type\": \"stream\",\n     \"text\": [\n      \"原始数据 X shape: (100, 2)\\n\",\n      \"前5行样本:\\n\",\n      \" [[0.37454012 0.95071431]\\n\",\n      \" [0.73199394 0.59865848]\\n\",\n      \" [0.15601864 0.15599452]\\n\",\n      \" [0.05808361 0.86617615]\\n\",\n      \" [0.60111501 0.70807258]]\\n\"\n     ]\n    }\n   ],\n   \"source\": [\n    \"# 设置随机种子以确保结果可复现\\n\",\n    \"np.random.seed(42)\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"# 生成 100 个二维点作为测试数据\\n\",\n    \"X = np.random.rand(100, 2)\\n\",\n    \"\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"原始数据 X shape:\\\", X.shape)\\n\",\n    \"print(\\\"前5行样本:\\\\n\\\", X[:5])\"\n   ]\n  },\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import numpy as np\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "from concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import math\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import hashlib\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "correct_state = 'Absolutely_Correct'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "class PreliminaryFeatureCalculator:\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    # 初步处理df数据，并不改变df结构\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    _instance = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    _current_data_hash = None\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    def __new__(cls, df):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        if cls._instance is None:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            cls._instance = super(PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, cls)\\\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                            .__new__(cls)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        # 优化：使用更快的哈希计算方法，避免 df.to_string() 的性能问题\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        # 使用 DataFrame 的形状、列名和部分数据的哈希值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        try:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            # 方法1：使用 pandas 的 hash_pandas_object（推荐，速度快）\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            hash_series = pd.util.hash_pandas_object(df.head(1000))  # 只hash前1000行，足够区分不同数据\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            data_hash = hash(tuple(hash_series.values))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        except:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            # 备选方案：使用形状和列名的组合\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            data_hash = hash((df.shape, tuple(df.columns), tuple(df.head(100).values.flatten())))\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        if cls._current_data_hash != data_hash:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            cls._instance.df = df.sort_values(by=['time']).reset_index(drop=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            cls._current_data_hash = data_hash\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            cls._instance.calculate_preliminary_features()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "        return cls._instance\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    def calculate_preliminary_features(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        self._calculate_score_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        self._calculate_rank_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        self._calculate_enthusiasm_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        self._calculate_explore_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        self._calculate_time_complexity_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        self._calculate_memory_complexity_bonus()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "        self._calculate_error_type_penalty()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "        self._calculate_test_num_penalty()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    def _calculate_score_bonus(self):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "        # 时间复杂度加成\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "        # 题目时间复杂度越低，该值越高（如题目回答错误，则该值为0)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "        # 初步计算每次提交对应的分值\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "        "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nimport numpy as np\r\nfrom sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\r\nfrom concurrent.futures import ProcessPoolExecutor\r\nimport math\r\nimport hashlib\r\n\r\ncorrect_state = 'Absolutely_Correct'\r\n\r\nclass PreliminaryFeatureCalculator:\r\n    # 初步处理df数据，并不改变df结构\r\n    _instance = None\r\n    _current_data_hash = None\r\n\r\n    def __new__(cls, df):\r\n        if cls._instance is None:\r\n            cls._instance = super(PreliminaryFeatureCalculator, cls)\\\r\n                            .__new__(cls)\r\n        # 优化：使用更快的哈希计算方法，避免 df.to_string() 的性能问题\r\n        # 使用 DataFrame 的形状、列名和部分数据的哈希值\r\n        try:\r\n            # 方法1：使用 pandas 的 hash_pandas_object（推荐，速度快）\r\n            hash_series = pd.util.hash_pandas_object(df.head(1000))  # 只hash前1000行，足够区分不同数据\r\n            data_hash = hash(tuple(hash_series.values))\r\n        except:\r\n            # 备选方案：使用形状和列名的组合\r\n            data_hash = hash((df.shape, tuple(df.columns), tuple(df.head(100).values.flatten())))\r\n        \r\n        if cls._current_data_hash != data_hash:\r\n            cls._instance.df = df.sort_values(by=['time']).reset_index(drop=True)\r\n            cls._current_data_hash = data_hash\r\n            cls._instance.calculate_preliminary_features()\r\n        return cls._instance\r\n\r\n    def calculate_preliminary_features(self):\r\n        self._calculate_score_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_rank_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_enthusiasm_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_explore_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_time_complexity_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_memory_complexity_bonus()\r\n        self._calculate_error_type_penalty()\r\n        self._calculate_test_num_penalty()\r\n    \r\n    def _calculate_score_bonus(self):\r\n        # 时间复杂度加成\r\n        # 题目时间复杂度越低，该值越高（如题目回答错误，则该值为0)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 133
          },
